A paralyzed target repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

b5140fab-84c6-527a-8799-24a6238f0e15.name: Fire Breath (Behtu)
b5140fab-84c6-527a-8799-24a6238f0e15.description: The behtu exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area takes 21 (5d8) fire damage, or half damage with a successful DC 13 Dexterity saving throw.

attributes.description: The behtu exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area takes 21 (5d8) fire damage, or half damage with a successful DC 13 Dexterity saving throw.

b528d965-2fe7-50f7-acf7-64b02f292ae5.name: Ichorous Infusions
b528d965-2fe7-50f7-acf7-64b02f292ae5.description: Behtu war parties carry 1d6 vials of ichorous infusions. They often ingest an infusion before an ambush. For the next 2d6 rounds, the behtus gain a +4 bonus to their Strength and Constitution scores and quadruple their base speed (including their climb speed). Behtus also take a -4 penalty to their Intelligence and Wisdom scores for the duration of the infusion. A non-behtu character who ingests a behtu infusion becomes poisoned and takes 10 (3d6) poison damage; a successful DC 14 Constitution saving throw against poison reduces damage to half and negates the poisoned condition.

3aa47e13-8edc-5ac9-b48b-62fcc4ae3845.name: Arctic Hunter
3aa47e13-8edc-5ac9-b48b-62fcc4ae3845.description: Beli have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks and Wisdom (Perception) checks made in icy, natural surroundings.

attributes.description: Beli have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks and Wisdom (Perception) checks made in icy, natural surroundings.

200930d2-f591-52f1-8068-56d97cbce155.name: Cold Regeneration
200930d2-f591-52f1-8068-56d97cbce155.description: As long as the temperature is below freezing, the beli regains 3 hit points at the start of its turn. If the beli takes fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the beli's next turn. The beli dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and it doesn't regenerate.

f0072060-5ee1-51b6-8945-ca4516070b47.name: Flyby (Beli)
f0072060-5ee1-51b6-8945-ca4516070b47.description: The beli doesn't provoke an opportunity attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

attributes.description: The beli doesn't provoke an opportunity attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

cc532ed1-f932-5867-90a5-334607743a04.name: Innate Spellcasting (Beli)
cc532ed1-f932-5867-90a5-334607743a04.description:
the beli's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 12, +4 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: invisibility

3/day: chill touch

006427fa-dc84-5d96-914d-91e48e3aa3a3.name: Ice Dagger
006427fa-dc84-5d96-914d-91e48e3aa3a3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) cold damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) cold damage.

d35e3ebc-1dd1-5dd9-a076-9b625d7aa88b.name: Icy Shortbow
d35e3ebc-1dd1-5dd9-a076-9b625d7aa88b.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) cold damage, and the target must make a successful DC 13 Constitution saving throw or gain 2 levels of exhaustion from the arrow's icy chill. If the save succeeds, the target also becomes immune to further exhaustion from beli arrows for 24 hours (but any levels of exhaustion already gained remain in effect). A character who gains a sixth level of exhaustion doesn't die automatically but drops to 0 hit points and must make death saving throws as normal. The exhaustion lasts until the target recovers fully from the cold damage.

a84e6191-d55e-579c-8095-192143e67c9c.name: Claw (Bereginyas)
a84e6191-d55e-579c-8095-192143e67c9c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) slashing damage.

f87e4369-a0e4-5067-8151-dff053b0f007.name: Multiattack (Bereginyas)
f87e4369-a0e4-5067-8151-dff053b0f007.description: The bereginyas makes two claw attacks. If both attacks hit the same target, the target is grappled (escape DC 12) and the bereginyas immediately uses Smother against it as a bonus action.

attributes.description: The bereginyas makes two claw attacks. If both attacks hit the same target, the target is grappled (escape DC 12) and the bereginyas immediately uses Smother against it as a bonus action.

1c78cc44-4e2d-53d9-958d-f4fa30855df2.name: Smother
1c78cc44-4e2d-53d9-958d-f4fa30855df2.description: If the bereginyas grapples an opponent, it extends a semi-solid gaseous tendril down the target's throat as a bonus action. The target must make a successful DC 14 Strength saving or it is immediately out of breath and begins suffocating. Suffocation ends if the grapple is broken or if the bereginyas is killed.

3b483b46-4702-5d61-81e0-945a6069a659.name: False Presence
3b483b46-4702-5d61-81e0-945a6069a659.description: The berstuc counts as a fey for purposes of spells and magical effects that detect otherworldly creatures. Beasts and plants are comfortable around the berstuc and will not attack it unless ordered to or provoked.

attributes.description: The berstuc counts as a fey for purposes of spells and magical effects that detect otherworldly creatures. Beasts and plants are comfortable around the berstuc and will not attack it unless ordered to or provoked.

eb69a627-dda6-5a1a-95c5-37222c28fdea.name: Forest Camoflage
eb69a627-dda6-5a1a-95c5-37222c28fdea.description: The berstuc's stealth bonus is increased to +8 in forest terrain.

attributes.description: The berstuc's stealth bonus is increased to +8 in forest terrain.

c29b036a-d790-51a7-b74c-5af743aa9436.name: Magic Resistance (Berstuc)
c29b036a-d790-51a7-b74c-5af743aa9436.description: The berstuc has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The berstuc has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

2b6de39d-a175-5d86-9503-d92586046f9c.name: Twisted Path
2b6de39d-a175-5d86-9503-d92586046f9c.description: The berstuc leaves no path through natural terrain and can't be tracked with skill checks or other natural means. Creatures that travel with it can't retrace their own trails, and they become hopelessly lost after 1 hour of travel. Creatures led astray by a berstuc have disadvantage on attempts to discern their location or to navigate for 24 hours.

attributes.description: The berstuc leaves no path through natural terrain and can't be tracked with skill checks or other natural means. Creatures led astray by a berstuc have disadvantage on attempts to discern their location or to navigate for 24 hours.

759868a2-d60f-5bf6-a925-b4f54ce7927e.name: Absorb
759868a2-d60f-5bf6-a925-b4f54ce7927e.description: The berstuc draws a Medium or smaller creature it has grappled into its body. An absorbed creature is no longer grappled but is blinded and restrained, has total cover from attacks and other effects from outside the berstuc, and takes 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage plus 27 (5d10) poison damage at the start of each of the berstuc's turns. The berstuc can hold one absorbed creature at a time. If the berstuc takes 20 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the berstuc must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or expel the absorbed creature, which falls prone within 5 feet of the berstuc. If the berstuc dies, an absorbed creature is no longer restrained and can escape from the corpse by using 5 feet of movement, exiting prone.

f7ec33c4-98e4-55c3-b925-8948cadfeac3.name: Multiattack (Berstuc)

cb279189-b05b-5b9f-a56a-cdbc5f81a98a.name: Slam (Berstuc)
cb279189-b05b-5b9f-a56a-cdbc5f81a98a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage and the target is grappled (escape DC 16).

bae8b468-520b-5440-887b-535df7cf1e15.name: Charge
bae8b468-520b-5440-887b-535df7cf1e15.description: If the black knight commander is mounted and moves at least 30 feet in a straight line toward a target and then hits it with a melee attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 10 (3d6) damage.

98b26297-6aab-5079-8a9f-58de6a665ca7.name: Hateful Aura
98b26297-6aab-5079-8a9f-58de6a665ca7.description: The black knight commander and allies within 10 feet of the commander add its Charisma modifier to weapon damage rolls (included in damage below).

8bd4643b-3807-500f-8c76-d7d83cca6418.name: Magic Weapons (Black Knight Commander)
8bd4643b-3807-500f-8c76-d7d83cca6418.description: The black knight commander's weapon attacks are made with magical (+1) weapons.

attributes.description: The black knight commander's weapon attacks are made with magical (+1) weapons.

eaaba816-cf9e-5c32-b8c8-bc53048304e2.name: Frightful Charge
eaaba816-cf9e-5c32-b8c8-bc53048304e2.description: The black knight commander lets loose a terrifying cry and makes one melee attack at the end of a charge. Whether the attack hits or misses, all enemies within 15 feet of the target and aware of the black knight commander's presence must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A frightened creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

a87975d9-6f14-5636-a862-ea7128372172.name: Mace

faf46d21-2a8f-5f67-ae5f-dc89caf3c998.name: Multiattack (Black Knight Commander)
faf46d21-2a8f-5f67-ae5f-dc89caf3c998.description: The black knight commander makes two melee attacks.

bba9d69a-e9e9-51ed-b6b2-c1a1bf6439a8.name: Carnivorous Compulsion
bba9d69a-e9e9-51ed-b6b2-c1a1bf6439a8.description: If it can see an incapacitated creature, the blemmyes must succeed on a DC 11 Wisdom save or be compelled to move toward that creature and attack it.

attributes.description: If it can see an incapacitated creature, the blemmyes must succeed on a DC 11 Wisdom save or be compelled to move toward that creature and attack it.

55d2ef13-cc92-5e09-8d6b-141159db918a.name: Bite (Blemmyes)
55d2ef13-cc92-5e09-8d6b-141159db918a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller incapacitated creature, that creature is swallowed. While swallowed, the creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects from outside the blemmyes, and it takes 14 (4d6) acid damage at the start of each of the blemmyes' turns. If the blemmyes takes 20 damage or more during a single turn from a creature inside it, the blemmyes must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the swallowed creature, which falls prone in a space within 5 feet of the blemmyes. The blemmyes can have only one target swallowed at a time. If the blemmyes dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting prone.

c535b493-8130-5042-b127-dcf1bcbbb087.name: Blood Sense
c535b493-8130-5042-b127-dcf1bcbbb087.description: A blood hag automatically senses the blood of living creatures within 90 feet and can pinpoint their locations within 30 feet.

attributes.description: A blood hag automatically senses the blood of living creatures within 90 feet and can pinpoint their locations within 30 feet.

eba08625-746f-5ac0-b684-2e4edf74639c.name: Innate Spellcasting (Blood Hag)
eba08625-746f-5ac0-b684-2e4edf74639c.description:
the hag's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15). She can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: disguise self, knock, minor illusion, misty step, pass without trace, protection from evil and good, tongues, water breathing

3/day each: bestow curse, invisibility, mirror image

1/day each: cloudkill, modify memory

719865b2-c5bc-5d40-8fc1-707343654bb4.description: Blood Choke Curse. The target's mouth fills with blood, preventing any speech or spellcasting with verbal components for 1 minute.

attributes.description: Blood Choke Curse. The target's mouth fills with blood, preventing any speech or spellcasting with verbal components for 1 minute.

359c67c0-5ae4-5605-a8c0-55fc09c2c4ce.name: Blood Eye
359c67c0-5ae4-5605-a8c0-55fc09c2c4ce.description: Blood Eye. The target's eyes well up with bloody tears. The target is blinded for 1 minute.

ef42cf1a-aa4f-5967-896b-69bbe2d608fb.name: Heart Like Thunder
ef42cf1a-aa4f-5967-896b-69bbe2d608fb.description: Heart Like Thunder. The target hears only the rushing of blood and their thumping heart. They are deaf for 1 minute.

666c604f-211c-5a55-b915-387650f72693.name: Rupturing Arteries
666c604f-211c-5a55-b915-387650f72693.description: Rupturing Arteries. The victim suffers 7 (2d6) slashing damage as its veins and arteries burst open. The target repeats the saving throw at the beginning of each of its turns. It takes 3 (1d6) necrotic damage if the saving throw fails, but the effect ends on a successful save.

d3f95180-3260-5f60-9a93-2aea8f8b84f8.name: Blood-Drinking Hair
d3f95180-3260-5f60-9a93-2aea8f8b84f8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) piercing damage and a Medium or smaller target is grappled (escape DC 15). A grappled creature takes 13 (2d8 + 3) necrotic damage at the start of the hag's turns, and the hag heals half as many hit points. The hag gains excess healing as temporary hit points. The hag can grapple one or two creatures at a time. Also see Face Peel.

e2146b42-5338-5fa8-86f5-a491cff6d354.name: Call the Blood
e2146b42-5338-5fa8-86f5-a491cff6d354.description: The blood hag targets a living creature within 30 feet that she detects with her blood sense and makes the target bleed uncontrollably. The target must make a successful DC 16 Constitution saving throw or suffer one of the effects listed below. A target that saves successfully cannot be affected by this hag's ability again for 24 hours.

d6299aa2-1a26-5cc7-9a9f-1ace854bb7d8.name: Claws (Blood Hag)
d6299aa2-1a26-5cc7-9a9f-1ace854bb7d8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) slashing damage.

c1520c1b-95d0-58fd-be55-0fc8cfd386cc.name: Face Peel
c1520c1b-95d0-58fd-be55-0fc8cfd386cc.description: The blood hag peels the face off one grappled foe. The target must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw. If the saving throw fails, the face is torn off; the target takes 38 (8d6 + 10) slashing damage and is stunned until the start of the hag's next turn. If the save succeeds, the target takes half damage and isn't stunned. Heal, regeneration, or comparable magic restores the stolen features; other curative magic forms a mass of scar tissue. The peeled-off face is a tiny, animated object (per the spell-20 HP, AC 18, no attack, Str 4, Dex 18) under the hag's control. It retains the former owner's memories and personality. Blood hags keep such faces as trophies, but they can also wear someone's face to gain advantage on Charisma (Deception) checks made to imitate the face's former owner.

c6a52237-6c9e-5e93-a3e7-f2e37f4befeb.description: The boloti can breathe air and water.

9c798144-2deb-5cad-8497-5c9745397665.name: Innate Spellcasting (Boloti)
9c798144-2deb-5cad-8497-5c9745397665.description:
the boloti's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 11). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: detect magic, water walk

3/day: control water, create or destroy water, fog cloud, invisibility, see invisibility, water breathing

1/day: wall of ice

attributes.description:
the boloti's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 11). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: detect magic, water walk

3/day: control water, create or destroy water, fog cloud, invisibility, see invisibility, water breathing

1/day: wall of ice

6f4ecdd1-6263-5cdb-aae6-17146ea5550e.name: Water Mastery
6f4ecdd1-6263-5cdb-aae6-17146ea5550e.description: A boloti has advantage on attack rolls if both it and its opponent are in water. If the opponent and the boloti are both on dry ground, the boloti has disadvantage on attack rolls.

attributes.description: A boloti has advantage on attack rolls if both it and its opponent are in water. If the opponent and the boloti are both on dry ground, the boloti has disadvantage on attack rolls.

4e805404-c8c2-52b0-8972-cb02b1b0131a.name: Dagger (Boloti)
4e805404-c8c2-52b0-8972-cb02b1b0131a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d4 + 5) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d4 + 5) piercing damage.

55245cda-c1c7-5d80-8cfb-6107fb5c9e8f.name: Vortex
55245cda-c1c7-5d80-8cfb-6107fb5c9e8f.description: A boloti can transform into a vortex of swirling, churning water for up to 4 minutes. This ability can be used only while the boloti is underwater, and the boloti can't leave the water while in vortex form. While in vortex form, the boloti can enter another creature's space and stop there in vortex form. In this liquid form, the boloti still takes normal damage from weapons and magic. A creature in the same space as the boloti at the start of the creature's turn takes 9 (2d8) bludgeoning damage unless it makes a successful DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. If the creature is Medium or smaller, a failed saving throw also means it is grappled (escape DC 11). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and unable to breathe unless it can breathe water. If the saving throw succeeds, the target is pushed 5 feet so it is out of the boloti's space.

0581ba9a-1297-5c3c-baaf-1f526dd6cb89.name: Hive Mind
0581ba9a-1297-5c3c-baaf-1f526dd6cb89.description: All elements of a bone collective within 50 miles of their main body constantly communicate with each other. If one is aware of a particular danger, they all are. Any bone collective with at least 30 hit points forms a hive mind, giving it an Intelligence of 14. Below this hp threshold, it becomes mindless (Intelligence 0) and loses its innate spellcasting ability. At 0 hp, a few surviving sets of bones scatter, and must spend months to create a new collective.

At 0 hp, a few surviving sets of bones scatter, and must spend months to create a new collective.

5a858445-5248-5d06-bf9f-fbce8d1af144.name: Innate Spellcasting (Bone Collective)
5a858445-5248-5d06-bf9f-fbce8d1af144.description:
the bone collective's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: chill touch

3/day: animate dead (up to 5 skeletons or zombies)

attributes.description:
the bone collective's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: chill touch

3/day: animate dead (up to 5 skeletons or zombies)

f3c7de83-4ffc-551a-a164-f9210e517c7b.name: Swarm
f3c7de83-4ffc-551a-a164-f9210e517c7b.description: A bone collective can act as a swarm (composed of smaller elements), or it can grant a single member (called an exarch) control, acting as a singular creature. Changing between forms takes one action. In its singular form, the collective can't occupy the same space as another creature, but it can perform sneak attacks and cast spells. In swarm form, the bone collective can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and it can move through openings at least 1 foot square. It can't change to singular form while it occupies the same space as another creature. It uses its skills normally in either form.

c334a260-595d-58e4-aee8-dce9944d5885.name: Bite (Bone Collective)
c334a260-595d-58e4-aee8-dce9944d5885.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 31 (4d12 + 5) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 16 Constitution save or suffer the effects of Wyrmblood Venom.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 31 (4d12 + 5) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 16 Constitution save or suffer the effects of Wyrmblood Venom.

0bd23680-4543-531e-ae1a-c358f248fcba.name: Claw (Bone Collective)
0bd23680-4543-531e-ae1a-c358f248fcba.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (3d12 + 5) slashing damage.

9d381031-cdbf-5826-be57-eafb06da5a23.name: Multiattack (Bone Collective)
9d381031-cdbf-5826-be57-eafb06da5a23.description: The bone collective makes two claw attacks, or one claw and one bite attack, or one swarm attack.

attributes.description: The bone collective makes two claw attacks, or one claw and one bite attack, or one swarm attack.

0bafcd05-f98d-51a2-a8ac-b385a61abbda.name: Swarm
0bafcd05-f98d-51a2-a8ac-b385a61abbda.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 57 (8d12 + 5) piercing damage, or 31 (4d12 + 5) piercing damage if the bone collective has half its hit points or fewer. If the attack hits, the target must make a successful DC 15 Constitution save or suffer the effects of Wyrmblood Venom.

Hit: 57 (8d12 + 5) piercing damage, or 31 (4d12 + 5) piercing damage if the bone collective has half its hit points or fewer. If the attack hits, the target must make a successful DC 15 Constitution save or suffer the effects of Wyrmblood Venom.

9069fc22-b7c3-5d42-97a1-d02179f032ad.name: Wyrmblood Venom (Injury)
9069fc22-b7c3-5d42-97a1-d02179f032ad.description: Bone collectives create a reddish liquid, which they smear on their fangs. The freakish red mouths on the tiny skeletons are disturbing, and the toxin is deadly. A bitten creature must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned and take 1d6 Charisma damage. A poisoned creature repeats the saving throw every four hours, taking another 1d6 Charisma damage for each failure, until it has made two consecutive successful saves or survived for 24 hours. If the creature survives, the effect ends and the creature can heal normally. Lost Charisma can be regained with a lesser restoration spell or comparable magic.

If the creature survives, the effect ends and the creature can heal normally. Lost Charisma can be regained with a lesser restoration spell or comparable magic.

adfc7d9b-1131-5158-b9b7-a8f7109aaeae.name: Amphibious (Bone Crab)
adfc7d9b-1131-5158-b9b7-a8f7109aaeae.description: The bone crab can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The bone crab can breathe air and water.

3e8bfb5d-d4e8-5065-8609-b388047b6102.name: Bone Camouflage
3e8bfb5d-d4e8-5065-8609-b388047b6102.description: A bone crab has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks while it's among bones.

attributes.description: A bone crab has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks while it's among bones.

bc9d940f-2336-5c76-a466-cece4c393369.name: Hive Mind (Bone Crab)
bc9d940f-2336-5c76-a466-cece4c393369.description: A bone crab can communicate perfectly with all other bone crabs within 100 feet of it. If one is aware of danger, they all are.

attributes.description: A bone crab can communicate perfectly with all other bone crabs within 100 feet of it. If one is aware of danger, they all are.

22343f73-b03b-555e-8597-32df665f7c9a.name: Leap
22343f73-b03b-555e-8597-32df665f7c9a.description: Bone crabs have incredibly powerful legs and can leap up to 10 feet straight ahead or backward as part of its movement; this counts as withdraw action when moving away from a foe.

attributes.description: Bone crabs have incredibly powerful legs and can leap up to 10 feet straight ahead or backward as part of its movement; this counts as withdraw action when moving away from a foe.

79739df8-f44a-522a-a3f2-1b66f080a0c1.name: Multiattack (Bone Crab)
79739df8-f44a-522a-a3f2-1b66f080a0c1.description: The bone crab makes two claw attacks.

attributes.description: The bone crab makes two claw attacks.

caa89d9e-626e-5868-b6fb-628611b68890.name: White Ghost Shivers
caa89d9e-626e-5868-b6fb-628611b68890.description: A living creature that is injured by or makes physical contact with a creature carrying the white ghost shivers must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw at the end of the encounter to avoid becoming infected. This disease manifests after 24 hours, beginning as a mild chill, but increasingly severe after a day, accompanied by a fever. Hallucinations are common, and the fright they induce lends the disease its name. At onset, the infected creature gains two levels of exhaustion that cannot be removed until the disease is cured by lesser restoration, comparable magic, or rest. The infected creature makes another DC 11 Constitution saving throw at the end of each long rest; a successful save removes one level of exhaustion. If the saving throw fails, the disease persists. If both levels of exhaustion are removed by successful saving throws, the victim has recovered naturally.

072b127e-d80b-5094-9c84-a4c0f42964a7.name: Strength of Bone
072b127e-d80b-5094-9c84-a4c0f42964a7.description: A bone swarm can choose to deal bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage, and adds 1.5x its Strength bonus on swarm damage rolls as bits and pieces of broken skeletons claw, bite, stab, and slam at the victim.

attributes.description: A bone swarm can choose to deal bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage, and adds 1.5x its Strength bonus on swarm damage rolls as bits and pieces of broken skeletons claw, bite, stab, and slam at the victim.

1c99ab4d-b4b5-5421-9c75-235a67e6c752.name: Swarm (Bone Swarm)
1c99ab4d-b4b5-5421-9c75-235a67e6c752.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a human skull. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

attributes.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a human skull. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

d5dcbf1d-bf45-5628-ad61-f5110a62c94b.name: Death's Embrace
d5dcbf1d-bf45-5628-ad61-f5110a62c94b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: the target is grappled (escape DC 16) and enveloped within the swarm's bones. The swarm can force the creature to move at its normal speed wherever the bone swarm wishes. Any non-area attack against the bone swarm has a 50 percent chance of hitting a creature grappled in Death's Embrace instead.

bd5f81e5-2891-5e2f-a485-331716ab7d1f.name: Multiattack (Bone Swarm)
bd5f81e5-2891-5e2f-a485-331716ab7d1f.description: The bone swarm can attack every hostile creature in its space with swirling bones.

attributes.description: The bone swarm can attack every hostile creature in its space with swirling bones.

27d788af-b0f7-5811-afe6-2dc017c20775.name: Swirling Bones
27d788af-b0f7-5811-afe6-2dc017c20775.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 31 (5d8 + 9) bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage (includes Strength of Bone special ability).

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 31 (5d8 + 9) bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage (includes Strength of Bone special ability).

81cd4406-e496-5e8e-992f-0adfa33cc04d.name: Amorphous
81cd4406-e496-5e8e-992f-0adfa33cc04d.description: The bonepowder ghoul can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The bonepowder ghoul can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

4c2d33de-632c-55e9-afbc-43af464f700e.name: Coalesce
4c2d33de-632c-55e9-afbc-43af464f700e.description: Whenever a bonepowder ghoul drains life force from victims with Gravedust, it can use that energy transform its shape into a more solid form and maintain it. The new form is Small and semi-transparent but roughly the shape of a normal ghoul. In this form, the ghoul isn't amorphous and can't form a whirlwind, but it can speak normally and manipulate objects. The altered form lasts for 1 minute for every point of necrotic damage it delivered against living foes.

9cb66993-ad91-52a4-be1a-3091e29b40c0.name: Innate Spellcasting (Bonepowder Ghoul)
9cb66993-ad91-52a4-be1a-3091e29b40c0.description:
the bonepowder ghoul's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 18, +10 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: chill touch, darkness, dispel magic, ray of enfeeblement

3/day: blindness/deafness, circle of death (7th level; 10d6)

1/day: finger of death

f3cdcb2e-c8d5-5aa9-8397-666ff8faa7db.name: Turning Defiance
f3cdcb2e-c8d5-5aa9-8397-666ff8faa7db.description: The bonepowder ghoul and any other ghouls within 30 feet of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn undead.

attributes.description: The bonepowder ghoul and any other ghouls within 30 feet of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn undead.

cb4d643e-8974-5b35-b082-3f6f9cca67fb.name: Bite (Bonepowder Ghoul)
cb4d643e-8974-5b35-b082-3f6f9cca67fb.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) plus 1d4 Strength damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1d4 + 1 rounds. If the target creature is humanoid, it must succeed on a second DC 19 Constitution saving throw or contract darakhul fever.

4395b785-b337-5872-a7b7-62644838583b.name: Gravedust
4395b785-b337-5872-a7b7-62644838583b.description: A bonepowder ghoul can project a 40-ft. cone of grave dust. All targets within the area must make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw to avoid taking 4d8 necrotic damage, and must make a second DC 17 Constitution saving throw to avoid being infected with darakhul fever.

6d4b9efc-5cac-5763-8720-5ea843d99bbb.name: Whirlwind
6d4b9efc-5cac-5763-8720-5ea843d99bbb.description: A bonepowder ghoul can generate a whirlwind of bones and teeth. All creatures within a 20-foot cube take 66 (12d10) slashing damage and are drained of 1d6 Strength; a successful DC 17 Dexterity saving throw reduces damage to half and negates the Strength loss. The whirlwind dissipates after one round.

All creatures within a 20-foot cube take 66 (12d10) slashing damage and are drained of 1d6 Strength; a successful DC 17 Dexterity saving throw reduces damage to half and negates the Strength loss. The whirlwind dissipates after one round.

4e95cf09-df36-5234-afdc-cb71046f0f8b.name: Defiling Smear (1/Day)
4e95cf09-df36-5234-afdc-cb71046f0f8b.description: The bouda can secrete a disgusting whitish-yellow substance with the viscosity of tar to mark food and territory. As a bonus action, the bouda marks a single adjacent 5-foot space, object, or helpless creature. Any living creature within 30 feet of the smear at the start of its turn must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw against poison or be poisoned for 1d6 rounds. A creature that makes a successful saving throw is immune to that particular bouda's defiling smear for 24 hours. The stench of a smear remains potent for one week.

6425a9ad-45a5-5088-adc4-9423cf51fbbf.name: Innate Spellcasting (Bouda)
6425a9ad-45a5-5088-adc4-9423cf51fbbf.description:
the bouda's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the following spells, requiring no material components: Constant: detect evil and good, detect magic

at will: thaumaturgy

3/day: darkness, expeditious retreat

1/day: contagion

at will: thaumaturgy

3/day: darkness, expeditious retreat

1/day: contagion

03e3c08a-d2d7-5523-92fa-c847869708fa.name: Shapechanger
03e3c08a-d2d7-5523-92fa-c847869708fa.description: The bouda can use its action to polymorph into a human, a hyena, or its true form, which is a hyena-humanoid hybrid. Its statistics, other than its Mephitic Claw attack, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if destroyed, before turning to dust.

cbf7036c-54df-5a23-a759-f2eaf0dfd4f5.name: Bite (Bouda)
cbf7036c-54df-5a23-a759-f2eaf0dfd4f5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

ccad866f-2a84-5394-a1b7-2ed7c96413b9.name: Mephitic Claw
ccad866f-2a84-5394-a1b7-2ed7c96413b9.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage, and the target must make a successful DC 15 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 round by the visible cloud of vermin swarming around the bouda's forearms.

8b16439c-f4be-5d8a-8539-71a52a793d6d.name: Multiattack (Bouda)
8b16439c-f4be-5d8a-8539-71a52a793d6d.description: The bouda makes one bite attack and one mephitic claw attack.

attributes.description: The bouda makes one bite attack and one mephitic claw attack.

84d91873-5db2-55c4-bf00-ee57d2bea3f1.name: Ravenous Gorge
84d91873-5db2-55c4-bf00-ee57d2bea3f1.description: The bouda consumes the organs of a corpse in a space it occupies. It gains temporary hit points equal to the dead creature's HD that last 1 hour. Organs consumed by this ability are gone, and the creature can't be restored to life through spells and magical effects that require a mostly intact corpse.

19cb7e12-c9ca-5001-9488-1295706d1656.name: Immutable Form (Broodiken)
19cb7e12-c9ca-5001-9488-1295706d1656.description: The broodiken is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The broodiken is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

e774563d-e9ae-5038-8185-15bbf2816201.name: Magic Resistance (Broodiken)
e774563d-e9ae-5038-8185-15bbf2816201.description: The broodiken has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The broodiken has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

59cb2752-ee70-5871-acdd-b309ca8f510f.name: Shared Rage
59cb2752-ee70-5871-acdd-b309ca8f510f.description: A broodiken cannot speak with its creator telepathically, but it feels strong emotions and recognizes the objects of those emotions. A creator can telepathically order broodiken to hunt for and attack individuals by sending the broodiken an image of the creature and the appropriate emotion. As long as the broodiken is on such a hunt, it can be more than 100 feet away from its master without wailing.

A creator can telepathically order broodiken to hunt for and attack individuals by sending the broodiken an image of the creature and the appropriate emotion. 6fc06736-9284-5f00-94eb-031152827c15.name: Attach
6fc06736-9284-5f00-94eb-031152827c15.description: When a broodiken succeeds on a bite attack, its teeth latch on, grappling the target (escape DC 9). On each of its turns, its bite attack hits automatically as long as it can maintain its grapple.

32f5af4a-319c-51e6-826e-c4f9d5aadbfb.name: Bite (Broodiken)
32f5af4a-319c-51e6-826e-c4f9d5aadbfb.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage.

34197ac1-973a-5d57-a3d7-6d68c08fdf36.description: The bucca doesn't provoke an opportunity attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

the bucca's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

3/day each: darkness, ensnaring strike, locate object

12f836d3-441f-557d-acaa-c4b4ea260d8e.name: Vulnerability to Sunlight
12f836d3-441f-557d-acaa-c4b4ea260d8e.description: A bucca takes 1 point of radiant damage for every minute it is exposed to sunlight.

94ac443d-1d65-5039-bde6-f8c93f2a6f53.name: Dagger (Bucca)
94ac443d-1d65-5039-bde6-f8c93f2a6f53.description: Melee Weapon Damage: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw against poison or take 1d2 Strength damage. The target must repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, and it loses another 1d2 Strength for each failed saving throw. The effect ends when one of the saving throws succeeds or automatically after 4 rounds. All lost Strength returns after a long rest.

a47c6a53-9d19-592c-b521-32288d2ba11c.description: A bukavac can move its enormous bulk with remarkably quick hop of up to 20 feet, leaping over obstacles and foes. It may also use the hop as part of a withdraw action.

46a3118f-c002-509e-9670-38722baa25bb.name: Bite (Bukavac)

fe351c78-d147-51ce-ab2d-dfa35cb7f8c3.name: Croaking Blast
fe351c78-d147-51ce-ab2d-dfa35cb7f8c3.description: A bukavac can emit a howling thunderclap that deafens and damages those nearby. Creatures within 15 feet who fail a DC 17 Constitution saving throw take 36 (8d8) thunder damage and are permanently deafened. Those succeeding on the saving throw take half damage and are not deafened. The deafness can be cured with lesser restoration.

edd2dcca-d434-5d0d-b26d-c1b61481fd38.description: The bukavac makes four claw attacks, or two claw attacks and one bite attack, or two claw attacks and one gore attack, or one bite and one gore attack.

4dfac8a3-33bb-53ee-a979-ff10a9a6774c.name: Angelic Weapons
4dfac8a3-33bb-53ee-a979-ff10a9a6774c.description: The buraq's attacks are magical. When the buraq hits with its hooves, it deals an extra 4d8 radiant damage (included in the attack).

352ecc22-da4a-5f9a-bbe8-308a0c71d71f.name: Innate Spellcasting (Buraq)
352ecc22-da4a-5f9a-bbe8-308a0c71d71f.description:
the buraq's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17). The buraq can innately cast the following spells, requiring no components:

at will: comprehend languages, detect evil and good, holy aura, pass without trace

3/day each: haste, longstrider

1/day each: plane shift, wind walk

33598c3c-8524-54bd-8b53-a50f97442cf9.description: The buraq has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

87cff895-de3a-5324-ae44-f0c2db7c270b.name: Night Journey
87cff895-de3a-5324-ae44-f0c2db7c270b.description: When outdoors at night, a buraq's vision is not limited by nonmagical darkness. Once per month, the buraq can declare it is on a night journey; for the next 24 hours, it can use its Teleport once per round. Its destination must always be in an area of nonmagical darkness within its line of sight. At any point during the night journey, as a bonus action, the buraq can return itself and its rider to the location where it began the night journey.

7f28e09c-4097-53f5-8ea9-ddc2f0e96f3f.description: The buraq makes two attacks with its hooves.

7dab7ed9-d1c0-5d13-b09d-09bb508978b7.description: The buraq magically teleports itself and its rider, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, to a location the buraq is familiar with, up to 1 mile away.

42fca34e-cadc-58a9-8ed3-8ac41ee98a5c.description: A burrowling gets advantage on Perception checks if at least one other burrowling is awake within 10 feet.

ebb8e801-e493-5415-b116-860c04571ca1.name: Hail of Needles (1/Day)
ebb8e801-e493-5415-b116-860c04571ca1.description: When reduced below 10 hp (even below 0 hp), the cactid releases a hail of needles as a reaction. All creatures within 15 feet take 21 (6d6) piercing damage, or half damage with a successful DC 14 Dexterity saving throw.

2c7be7d9-9ed0-52d9-8f90-b235a5857f51.description: The cactid makes two attacks with its tendrils and uses Reel.

attributes.description: The cactid makes two attacks with its tendrils and uses Reel.

52f71bef-f054-5aed-8b96-5997b8954c95.name: Reel
52f71bef-f054-5aed-8b96-5997b8954c95.description: Each creature grappled by the cactid is pulled up to 5 feet straight toward the cactid.

attributes.description: Each creature grappled by the cactid is pulled up to 5 feet straight toward the cactid.

071b16f5-6f4c-51b2-b9e8-50ee73d53f3e.name: Tendril (Cactid)
071b16f5-6f4c-51b2-b9e8-50ee73d53f3e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 15 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) piercing damage, and a Medium or smaller target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. If the target is neither undead nor a construct, the cactid drains the target's body fluids; at the start of each of the target's turns, the target must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature's hit point maximum is reduced by 3 (1d6). If a creature's hit point maximum is reduced to 0 by this effect, the creature dies. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest and drinks abundant water or until it receives a greater restoration spell or comparable magic. The cactid has two tendrils, each of which can grapple one target at a time.

the cambium's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks). The cambium can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

constant: levitate

at will: alter self, detect thoughts, hold person, plane shift, spare the dying

3/day: cure wounds 21 (4d8 + 3), ray of sickness 18 (4d8), protection from poison, heal

1/day: finger of death

If this reduces a score to 0, the creature is unconscious until it regains at least one point.

9d6c37de-e905-599a-b174-df2f519bcd96.description: The cambium makes four needle fingers attacks.

da3c4ccb-294c-5ee1-a6c4-e4c4df546b50.name: Needle Fingers

In addition, the target must make a DC 19 Constitution saving throw; if it fails, the cambium can either inflict Ability Damage or Imbalance Humors. A target makes this saving throw just once per turn, even if struck by more than one needle fingers attack.

cc2fcca1-b52b-55f9-a741-ef78d1b4f18c.name: Tunneler
cc2fcca1-b52b-55f9-a741-ef78d1b4f18c.description: The cave dragon can burrow through solid rock at half its burrowing speed and leaves a 5-foot wide, 5-foot high tunnel in its wake.

34a77bc9-88f5-5756-bce2-5a0f9c2eca06.name: Bite (Cave Dragon Wyrmling)
34a77bc9-88f5-5756-bce2-5a0f9c2eca06.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.

234411a4-1e24-5daf-98f5-9d8ceedc5cd8.name: Poison Breath (Cave Dragon Wyrmling)
234411a4-1e24-5daf-98f5-9d8ceedc5cd8.description: The dragon exhales a cone of black poison gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) poison damage on a failed save and the target is poisoned if it is a creature. The poisoned condition lasts until the target takes a long or short rest or removes the condition with lesser restoration. If the save is successful, the target takes half the damage and does not become poisoned.

3f98faad-3931-5955-871c-9458b23b655a.name: Luminescence
3f98faad-3931-5955-871c-9458b23b655a.description: The chemicals within cavelight moss make the entire creature shed light as a torch. A cavelight moss cannot suppress this effect. It can, however, diminish the light produced to shed illumination as a candle.

3d6f980e-797a-50be-814f-18f5fecf0e82.name: Strength Drain
3d6f980e-797a-50be-814f-18f5fecf0e82.description: Living creatures hit by the cavelight moss's tendril attack or caught up in its grapple must make a successful DC 14 Constitution saving throw or 1 level of exhaustion. Creatures that succeed are immune to that particular cavelight moss's Strength Drain ability for 24 hours. For every level of exhaustion drained, the cavelight moss gains 5 temporary hit points.

0876141c-5cdb-572e-8f0a-53760827243f.name: Tendrils
0876141c-5cdb-572e-8f0a-53760827243f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 33 (4d12 + 7) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the cavelight moss can't use its tendrils against another target.

9bd07101-c9d1-515c-8f2b-3887dce3dd12.name: Magic Resistance (Chelicerae)
9bd07101-c9d1-515c-8f2b-3887dce3dd12.description: The chelicerae has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The chelicerae has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

049f6a22-430d-58ce-8a54-1d401bf4f0e7.name: Siphon Spell Slots
049f6a22-430d-58ce-8a54-1d401bf4f0e7.description: The chelicerae cannot replenish its spells naturally. Instead, it uses grappled spellcasters as spell reservoirs, draining uncast spells to power its own casting. Whenever the chelicerae wishes to cast a spell, it consumes a number of spell slots from its victim equal to the spell slots necessary to cast the spell. If the victim has too few spell slots available, the chelicerae cannot cast that spell. The chelicerae can also draw power from drained spellcasters or creatures without magic ability. It can reduce a grappled creature's Wisdom by 1d4, adding 2 spell slots to its spell reservoir for every point lowered. A creature reduced to 0 Wisdom is unconscious until it regains at least one point, and can't offer any more power. A creature regains all lost Wisdom when it finishes a long rest.

attributes.description: The chelicerae cannot replenish its spells naturally. Instead, it uses grappled spellcasters as spell reservoirs, draining uncast spells to power its own casting. Whenever the chelicerae wishes to cast a spell, it consumes a number of spell slots from its victim equal to the spell slots necessary to cast the spell. If the victim has too few spell slots available, the chelicerae cannot cast that spell. The chelicerae can also draw power from drained spellcasters or creatures without magic ability. It can reduce a grappled creature's Wisdom by 1d4, adding 2 spell slots to its spell reservoir for every point lowered. A creature reduced to 0 Wisdom is unconscious until it regains at least one point, and can't offer any more power. A creature regains all lost Wisdom when it finishes a long rest.

4623eaa4-ba28-5578-a7d9-ade225092b33.name: Spellcasting (Chelicerae)
4623eaa4-ba28-5578-a7d9-ade225092b33.description:
the chelicerae is an 8th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). It requires no material components to cast its spells. The chelicerae has the following wizard spells prepared:

cantrips: acid splash, mage hand, minor illusion, true strike
- **1st Level**: burning hands, detect magic, expeditious retreat, ray of sickness
- **2nd Level**: hold person, invisibility, scorching ray

608872c7-92b7-56d2-91cd-f2a7b1ace36b.name: Bite (Chelicerae)
608872c7-92b7-56d2-91cd-f2a7b1ace36b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 16). The target must also make a successful DC 16 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned. While poisoned this way, the target is unconscious and takes 1d4 Strength damage at the start of each of its turns. The poisoning ends after 4 rounds or when the target makes a successful DC 16 Constitution save at the end of its turn.

19e70cfe-93cf-519d-baa0-f29bf420e55a.name: Fey Blood
19e70cfe-93cf-519d-baa0-f29bf420e55a.description: Children of the briar count as both plant and fey for any effect related to type.

68733d58-b2f3-5fbf-9ea0-e87d25aa30f6.name: Entangle
68733d58-b2f3-5fbf-9ea0-e87d25aa30f6.description: Two children of the briar working together can cast a version of the entangle spell with no components, at will. Both creatures must be within 10 feet of each other, and both must use their action to cast the spell. The entangled area must include at least one of the casters but doesn't need to be centered on either caster. Creatures in the area must make a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be restrained. All children of the briar are immune to the spell's effects.

5c7fa77d-06b6-54c0-b413-f9e5c6398b08.description: A child of the briar's long thorny limbs help it grapple creatures up to Medium size. A grappled creature takes 2 (1d4) piercing damage at the end of the child's turn for as long as it remains grappled.

90ad897c-2e06-5594-8fb6-d7848e0c09c9.name: Temporal Body
90ad897c-2e06-5594-8fb6-d7848e0c09c9.description: When a chronalmental is subjected to a slow spell, haste spell, or similar effect, it automatically succeeds on the saving throw and regains 13 (3d8) hit points.

b6a3cd7f-98c5-524f-a05f-8cfa4f05fc0d.name: Displace
b6a3cd7f-98c5-524f-a05f-8cfa4f05fc0d.description: The chronalmental targets one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be magically shunted outside of time. The creature disappears for 1 minute. As an action, the displaced creature can repeat the saving throw. On a success, the target returns to its previously occupied space, or the nearest unoccupied space.

The creature disappears for 1 minute. As an action, the displaced creature can repeat the saving throw. On a success, the target returns to its previously occupied space, or the nearest unoccupied space.
The chronalmental makes 1d4 + 1 slam attacks.

49afc8bf-cb67-5ef4-b59b-c6d27df9b731.name: Slam (Chronalmental)
49afc8bf-cb67-5ef4-b59b-c6d27df9b731.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

5e35a35f-9f89-5482-bc24-70e8e806b758.name: Steal Time
5e35a35f-9f89-5482-bc24-70e8e806b758.description: The chronalmental targets one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The targeted creature must make a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. On a failed saving throw, the chronalmental draws some of the creature's time into itself and gains +10 to its position in initiative order. In addition, the target's speed is reduced by half, it can't take reactions, and it can take either an action or a bonus action on its turn, but not both. While it is stealing time, the chronalmental's speed increases by 30 feet, and when it takes the multiattack action, it can make an additional slam attack. The targeted creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

0dee6066-3495-5393-a9cb-f09b6e2f74ad.description: When a creature the chronalmental can see moves within 5 feet of it, the chronalmental can shift itself to a place it occupied in the past, teleporting up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying.

ce35b201-b0eb-5ed3-9900-e0fb866b1438.name: Orders to Attack
ce35b201-b0eb-5ed3-9900-e0fb866b1438.description: Each creature of the city watch captain's choice that is within 30 feet of it and can hear it makes one melee or ranged weapon attack as a reaction. This person could easily have been on the other side of the law, but he likes the way he looks in the city watch uniform-and the way city residents look at him when he walks down the street leading a patrol. With a long mustache and a jaunty cap, there's no denying that he cuts a rakishly handsome figure. While a trained investigator, the city watch captain is not afraid to draw his blade to end a threat to his city.

076a6f35-d2b6-56b7-9dbc-04fce8900c93.name: Net Cannon
076a6f35-d2b6-56b7-9dbc-04fce8900c93.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 5/15 ft., one target, size Large or smaller. Hit: the target is restrained. A mechanism within the clockwork huntsman's chest can fire a net with a 20-foot trailing cable anchored within the huntsman's chest. A creature can free itself (or another creature) from the net by using its action to make a successful DC 10 Strength check or by dealing 5 slashing damage to the net. The huntsman can fire up to four nets before it must be reloaded.

c77410f0-8acc-5af4-9ac9-b6bf6dca02d4.description: The clockwork myrmidon's alchemical flame reservoir explodes when the construct is destroyed, spraying nearby creatures with burning fuel. A creature within 5 feet of the myrmidon takes 19 (3d12) fire damage, or half damage with a successful DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. This explosion doesn't occur if the clockwork myrmidon has already fired its alchemical flame jet four times.

54fda2e3-2bd0-555b-ae92-a44c706d6306.name: Alchemical Flame Jet

Any creature in the path of the jet takes 26 (4d12) fire damage, or half damage with a successful DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. The clockwork myrmidon can use this attack four times before its internal reservoir is emptied.

80de87a9-3705-5d51-a73e-fd16fd38731f.name: Grease Spray
80de87a9-3705-5d51-a73e-fd16fd38731f.description: As a bonus action, the clockwork myrmidon's chest can fire a spray of alchemical grease with a range of 30 feet, covering a 10-by-10 foot square area and turning it into difficult terrain. Each creature standing in the affected area must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone. A creature that enters the area or ends its turn there must also succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone. The clockwork myrmidon can use this attack four times before its internal reservoir is emptied.

641e3a5e-0f54-5a30-919d-e60890c59562.name: Swarm (Cobbleswarm)
641e3a5e-0f54-5a30-919d-e60890c59562.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny stone. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

1cf4d3c5-8c4d-5127-92de-5fc9b6c2ebf1.name: Absorb the Dead
1cf4d3c5-8c4d-5127-92de-5fc9b6c2ebf1.description: Whenever a Small or larger non-undead creature dies within 20 feet of the corpse mound, that creature's remains join its form and the corpse mound regains 10 hit points.

5bc5a287-cd87-55f9-80fa-66ce2c6298e2.name: Noxious Aura
5bc5a287-cd87-55f9-80fa-66ce2c6298e2.description: Creatures that are within 20 feet of the corpse mound at the end of its turn must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned until the end of their next turn. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the Noxious Aura for 24 hours.

617966da-155f-5826-b21b-45113369c230.name: Zombie Drop
617966da-155f-5826-b21b-45113369c230.description: At the start of the corpse mound's turn during combat, one corpse falls from the mound onto the ground and immediately rises as a zombie under its control. Up to 10 such zombies can be active at one time. Zombies take their turns immediately after the corpse mound's turn.

attributes.description: At the start of the corpse mound's turn during combat, one corpse falls from the mound onto the ground and immediately rises as a zombie under its control. Up to 10 such zombies can be active at one time. Zombies take their turns immediately after the corpse mound's turn.

5afe2744-5ce8-56a2-a28d-da52bd2dea86.name: Bone Shard
5afe2744-5ce8-56a2-a28d-da52bd2dea86.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d6 + 7) piercing damage and 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. When hit, the target must make a successful DC 17 Strength check or be knocked prone, pinned to the ground by the shard, and restrained. To end this restraint, the target or a creature adjacent to it must use an action to make a successful DC 17 Strength (Athletics) check to remove the shard.

9ce665a9-a76a-5d3e-a60a-a8fe4cffdbf9.name: Envelop
9ce665a9-a76a-5d3e-a60a-a8fe4cffdbf9.description: The corpse mound makes a slam attack against a restrained creature. If the attack hits, the target takes damage as normal, is pulled 5 feet into the corpse mound's space, and is enveloped, which ends any grappled or prone condition. While enveloped, the creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the corpse mound, and it takes 21 (6d6) necrotic damage at the start of each of the corpse mound's turns. An enveloped creature can escape by using its action to make a successful DC 17 Strength saving throw. If the corpse mound takes 30 or more damage on a single turn from the enveloped creature, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or expel the creature, which falls prone in a space within 10 feet of the corpse mound. If the corpse mound dies, an enveloped creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape by using 10 feet of movement, exiting prone. A corpse mound can envelop up to 4 creatures at once.

60bffd6b-0e36-5401-a927-389908b8dfbd.name: Corrupting Touch

A mundane item is destroyed automatically; a magical item is destroyed if its owner fails to make a successful DC 16 Dexterity saving throw.

9bd552bd-5b3c-5767-a213-6d9b429d2194.description: The drake exhales fire in a 15-ft. cone. Each target in that cone takes 18 (4d8) fire damage, or half damage with a successful DC 12 Dexterity saving throw.

74fc5a89-8dbb-5ea8-a42c-df56a47039a1.name: Multiattack (Crimson Drake)

98fd60ed-08fd-58e7-a953-0ea8d29ea71a.name: Stinger (Crimson Drake)
98fd60ed-08fd-58e7-a953-0ea8d29ea71a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 hour. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the target takes 2 (1d4) poison damage at the start of each of its turns for 3 rounds. The target may repeat the saving throw at the end of its turn to end the effect early.

e966ded8-b7c5-5e2c-a35c-b6078f727b15.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
e966ded8-b7c5-5e2c-a35c-b6078f727b15.description: The crystalline devil deals an extra 7 (2d6) damage when it hits a target with an attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of the devil that isn't incapacitated and the devil doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

46e91c25-2329-59c7-95ad-e813daffb815.name: Variant: Devil Summoning
46e91c25-2329-59c7-95ad-e813daffb815.description:
some crystalline devils have an action option that allows them to summon other devils.

summon Devil (1/Day): The crystalline devil has a 25 percent chance of summoning one crystalline devil

22b1fd01-88a6-5a84-be22-79db59bc9730.name: Betraying Carbuncle
22b1fd01-88a6-5a84-be22-79db59bc9730.description: The crystalline devil takes the form of a gemstone worth 500 gp. It radiates magic in this form, but it can't be destroyed. It is fully aware and can see and hear its surroundings. Reverting to its usual form requires another action.

96adf654-8cf7-5745-980e-f975e76ee5d4.name: Claw (Crystalline Devil)

c0e45aaf-f3fc-5c9e-a46a-118053d014fd.description: The crystalline devil magically sprays shards of crystal in a 15-foot cone. Each target in that area takes 17 (7d4) piercing damage, or half damage with a successful DC 15 Dexterity saving throw.

5509d746-9f99-57dd-9fca-2fa358715c5b.name: Innate Spellcasting (Dau)
5509d746-9f99-57dd-9fca-2fa358715c5b.description:
the dau's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: detect thoughts

3/day each: invisibility, mirror image

1/day each: mirage arcana, programmed illusion, project image

4e8e9b43-eb84-5813-bf87-10e6bc680b30.name: Mirror Dodge
4e8e9b43-eb84-5813-bf87-10e6bc680b30.description: When the dau would be hit by an attack or affected by a spell, the dau replaces itself with an illusory duplicate and teleports to any unoccupied space within 30 feet in sight. The dau isn't affected and the illusory duplicate is destroyed.

d2e735a9-4bf8-5d10-a08e-6ae773e8dd0f.name: Multiattack (Dau)
d2e735a9-4bf8-5d10-a08e-6ae773e8dd0f.description: The dau makes two slam attacks.

attributes.description: The dau makes two slam attacks.

54073965-a66a-586d-8ef2-2e05a9e8e7dc.name: Slam (Dau)
54073965-a66a-586d-8ef2-2e05a9e8e7dc.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage, and the dau regains hit points equal to the necrotic damage dealt. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest.

Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage, and the dau regains hit points equal to the necrotic damage dealt. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest.

add48631-c893-5b2b-9c4a-82631874e102.name: Tangible Illusion
add48631-c893-5b2b-9c4a-82631874e102.description: After casting an illusion spell of an object, the dau temporarily transforms that illusion into a physical, nonmagical object. The temporary object lasts 10 minutes, after which it reverts to being an illusion (or vanishes, if the duration of the original illusion expires). During that time, the illusion has all the physical properties of the object it represents, but not magical properties. The dau must touch the illusion to trigger this transformation, and the object can be no larger than 5 cubic feet.

477c789b-21d5-5be4-83c7-1d4b52f72070.name: Potent Poison
477c789b-21d5-5be4-83c7-1d4b52f72070.description: The death butterfly swarm's poison affects corporeal undead who are otherwise immune to poison.

attributes.description: The death butterfly swarm's poison affects corporeal undead who are otherwise immune to poison.

a91b2943-2bdf-5f68-9f4f-4bee3af177e1.name: Swarm (Death Butterfly Swarm)
a91b2943-2bdf-5f68-9f4f-4bee3af177e1.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny insect. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

attributes.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny insect. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

1af682f7-e3f7-5827-b0f3-dd8ff24c20aa.name: Weight of Wings
1af682f7-e3f7-5827-b0f3-dd8ff24c20aa.description: A creature in a space occupied by the death butterfly swarm has its speed reduced by half, and must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or become blinded. Both effects end when the creature doesn't share a space with the swarm at the end of the creature's turn. If a creature succeeds on the saving throw, it is immune to the swarm's blindness (but not the speed reduction) for 24 hours.

Both effects end when the creature doesn't share a space with the swarm at the end of the creature's turn. If a creature succeeds on the saving throw, it is immune to the swarm's blindness (but not the speed reduction) for 24 hours.

dfbe9825-4ae2-5680-b4f7-b3cbe479b435.name: Bites (Death Butterfly Swarm)
dfbe9825-4ae2-5680-b4f7-b3cbe479b435.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 0 ft., every target in the swarm's space. Hit: 22 (6d6 + 1) piercing damage, or 11 (3d6 + 1) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer. The target also takes 10 (3d6) poison damage and becomes poisoned for 1d4 rounds; a successful DC 13 Constitution saving throw reduces poison damage by half and prevents the poisoned condition.

2742707a-fcb7-5973-a14d-7a07b2b80a66.name: Multiattack (Death Butterfly Swarm)
2742707a-fcb7-5973-a14d-7a07b2b80a66.description: The swarm makes a Bite attack against every target in its spaces.

attributes.description: The swarm makes a Bite attack against every target in its spaces.

081d69a3-b0c2-563d-bd64-1e11e60ce360.name: Distress Spores
081d69a3-b0c2-563d-bd64-1e11e60ce360.description: When a deathcap myconid takes damage, all other myconids within 240 feet of it sense its pain.

attributes.description: When a deathcap myconid takes damage, all other myconids within 240 feet of it sense its pain.

2b141718-e552-5bd3-b021-8c1cabb72373.name: Sun Sickness
2b141718-e552-5bd3-b021-8c1cabb72373.description: While in sunlight, the myconid has disadvantage on ability checks, attack rolls, and saving throws. The myconid dies if it spends more than 1 hour in direct sunlight.

attributes.description: While in sunlight, the myconid has disadvantage on ability checks, attack rolls, and saving throws. The myconid dies if it spends more than 1 hour in direct sunlight.

15af6b33-01fe-5f84-8c28-810c5332fb4b.name: Deathcap Spores
15af6b33-01fe-5f84-8c28-810c5332fb4b.description: The myconid ejects spores at one creature it can see within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 3 rounds. While poisoned this way, the target also takes 10 (4d4) poison damage at the start of each of its turns. The target repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

9478c9ab-4abe-5194-8ca3-6b549f409aa7.name: Fist

b5d38a09-2323-5609-b670-03072cfba1a0.name: Multiattack (Deathcap Myconid)
b5d38a09-2323-5609-b670-03072cfba1a0.description: The myconid uses either its Deathcap Spores or its Slumber Spores, then makes a fist attack.

attributes.description: The myconid uses either its Deathcap Spores or its Slumber Spores, then makes a fist attack.

4ac85470-8a89-57ca-b6a0-496494dbce56.name: Slumber Spores
4ac85470-8a89-57ca-b6a0-496494dbce56.description: The myconid ejects spores at one creature it can see within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned and unconscious for 1 minute. A creature wakes up if it takes damage, or if another creature uses its action to shake it awake.

867652ba-9abd-5c13-84ab-d12d0789ca97.name: Flicker
867652ba-9abd-5c13-84ab-d12d0789ca97.description: The deathwisp flickers in and out of sight, and ranged weapon attacks against it are made with disadvantage.

attributes.description: The deathwisp flickers in and out of sight, and ranged weapon attacks against it are made with disadvantage.

8bee9df7-7fc6-546e-bb0e-819b9e27ce9c.name: Incorporeal Movement
8bee9df7-7fc6-546e-bb0e-819b9e27ce9c.description: The deathwisp can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside a solid object.

attributes.description: The deathwisp can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside a solid object.

0254d0f4-b354-5de3-a66d-9585adeb0806.name: Shadow Jump
0254d0f4-b354-5de3-a66d-9585adeb0806.description: A deathwisp can travel between shadows as if by means of dimension door. This magical transport must begin and end in an area with at least some shadow. A shadow fey can jump up to a total of 40 feet per day; this may be a single jump of 40 feet, four jumps of 10 feet each, etc. This ability must be used in 10-foot increments.

6bf9bfec-34f7-5a6a-88f4-b68b7f74c873.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
6bf9bfec-34f7-5a6a-88f4-b68b7f74c873.description: While in sunlight, the deathwisp has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

0ed8c4b9-e2b8-59d7-a571-f0cba92e1954.name: Unnatural Aura
0ed8c4b9-e2b8-59d7-a571-f0cba92e1954.description: Animals do not willingly approach within 30 feet of a deathwisp, unless a master makes a successful DC 15 Wisdom (Animal Handling) check.

attributes.description: Animals do not willingly approach within 30 feet of a deathwisp, unless a master makes a successful DC 15 Wisdom (Animal Handling) check.

0cd26c47-c3c9-530c-adbe-4944b7a37029.name: Create Deathwisp
0cd26c47-c3c9-530c-adbe-4944b7a37029.description: The deathwisp targets a humanoid within 10 feet of it that died violently less than 1 minute ago. The target's spirit rises as a wraith in the space of its corpse or in the nearest unoccupied space. This wraith is under the deathwisp's control. The deathwisp can keep no more than five wraiths under its control at one time.

d2c6dfd3-671a-505b-b095-d440bd53f220.name: Life Drain
d2c6dfd3-671a-505b-b095-d440bd53f220.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 36 (7d8 + 5) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, or its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.

cb5b2d16-638d-59f3-8e9d-51eb9c8dbb92.name: Breath Weapon (Deep Drake)
cb5b2d16-638d-59f3-8e9d-51eb9c8dbb92.description: A deep drake blasts forth a crackling 80-foot line of purple-black energy that wracks its victims with pain. This attack deals 35 (10d6) necrotic damage, or half damage with a successful DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. Targets that fail this saving throw must also succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or become stunned for 1d4 rounds.

7a802871-51d0-5a7e-8420-f2445e0e2f7d.name: Multiattack (Deep Drake)
7a802871-51d0-5a7e-8420-f2445e0e2f7d.description: The drake makes one bite attack, two claw attacks, and one stinger attack.

b5f7803e-bf1e-5f42-920e-94cc34414e96.name: Stinger (Deep Drake)
b5f7803e-bf1e-5f42-920e-94cc34414e96.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 4 rounds. While poisoned this way, the target must repeat the save at the start of its turn, ending the condition on a success. On a failure, it takes 10 (3d6) poison damage. When animate dead is cast on creatures killed by this poison, the caster requires no material components.

d0e3ec5d-a63e-5ed1-87d3-131903abbd2d.name: Amphibious (Deep One)
d0e3ec5d-a63e-5ed1-87d3-131903abbd2d.description: A deep one can breathe air or water with equal ease.

attributes.description: A deep one can breathe air or water with equal ease.

d75404fb-ad1e-5a2f-8870-be05009f306a.name: Frenzied Rage
d75404fb-ad1e-5a2f-8870-be05009f306a.description: On its next turn after a deep one takes 10 or more damage from a single attack, it has advantage on its claws attack and adds +2 to damage.

attributes.description: On its next turn after a deep one takes 10 or more damage from a single attack, it has advantage on its claws attack and adds +2 to damage.

49f8e3aa-e188-51a2-8b28-71a4dc9246d6.name: Lightless Depths
49f8e3aa-e188-51a2-8b28-71a4dc9246d6.description: A deep one is immune to the pressure effects of the deep ocean.

attributes.description: A deep one is immune to the pressure effects of the deep ocean.

1a117f30-3b56-5045-8d5b-68a7c92721ab.name: Ocean Change
1a117f30-3b56-5045-8d5b-68a7c92721ab.description: A deep one born to a human family resembles a human child, but transforms into an adult deep one between the ages of 16 and 30.

8f9af4de-cf14-5ff8-979b-b64fe8d5d063.name: Claws (Deep One)
8f9af4de-cf14-5ff8-979b-b64fe8d5d063.description: Melee Weapon Attack. +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) slashing damage.

6e891a6d-8cb5-5261-8fce-3c8ed73d5aea.name: Frenzied Rage (Deep One Archimandrite)
6e891a6d-8cb5-5261-8fce-3c8ed73d5aea.description: On its next turn after a deep one archimandrite takes 10 or more damage from a single attack, it has advantage on its attacks, it adds +4 to damage, and it can make one extra unholy trident attack.

586e3040-0f59-577a-952c-3e184744e235.description:
the deep one archimandrite's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: bless, revivify, sacred flame, shocking grasp, suggestion

3/day each: charm person, lightning bolt, sanctuary, shatter

1/day each: chain lightning, cone of cold, ice storm

1a89ca7d-8d70-5ff1-9443-f8ebfd6f54c6.description: On its next turn after a deep one hybrid priest takes 10 or more damage from a single attack, it has advantage on its melee attacks and adds +4 to spell and claws damage.

3/day each: inflict wounds, sanctuary, sleep

1/day each: ice storm, shatter

bf3a12b2-b801-5049-9e79-3b7a7d8cf97a.name: Voice of the Deeps
bf3a12b2-b801-5049-9e79-3b7a7d8cf97a.description: A deep one priest may sway an audience of listeners with its rolling, droning speech, fascinating them for 5 minutes and making them dismiss or forget what they've seen recently unless they make a successful DC 13 Wisdom saving throw at the end of that period. If the saving throw succeeds, they remember whatever events the deep one sought to erase.

84b75cb1-998e-5229-8f5e-67064920607f.name: Magic Resistance (Degenerate Titan)
84b75cb1-998e-5229-8f5e-67064920607f.description: The degenerate titan has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The degenerate titan has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

5117ccd1-299b-591c-8ccc-7edcf90e0ea6.name: Earthstrike
5117ccd1-299b-591c-8ccc-7edcf90e0ea6.description: The degenerate titan slams his fists onto the ground, creating a shockwave in a line 60 feet long and 10 feet wide. Each creature in the line takes 35 (10d6) force damage and is flung up 20 feet away from the titan and knocked prone; a successful DC 18 Dexterity saving throw halves the damage and prevents the creature from being flung or knocked prone. A creature that's flung against an unyielding object such as a wall or floor takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was thrown. If it collides with another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw or take the same damage (1d6 bludgeoning per 10 feet) and be knocked prone.

d7b51a15-56ce-57a7-b266-3ae60a3ad89d.name: Shout of the Void
d7b51a15-56ce-57a7-b266-3ae60a3ad89d.description: The degenerate titan utters a scream that rends reality in a 30-foot cone. Any ongoing spell or magical effect of 3rd level or lower in the area ends. For every spell or effect of 4th level or higher in the area, the degenerate titan makes a Constitution check against DC (10 + the level of the spell or effect). On a success, the spell or effect ends.

55368181-d9ae-51f6-8489-ffa83d4772d2.name: Enchanted Cage
55368181-d9ae-51f6-8489-ffa83d4772d2.description: The iron cage that holds the fetal savant provides cover for the creature. The cage (AC 19, 10 hp) is considered an equipped object when borne by a derro and cannot be attacked directly. In addition, the cage protects the occupant from up to 20 spell levels of spells 4th level or lower but provides no protection to those outside of the cage. Spells of level 5 or higher take full, normal effect against the cage and its occupant. Once the cage protects against 20 or more spell levels it is rendered non-magical. If exposed to direct sunlight for over one hour of cumulative time it is destroyed.

b33a867f-67c8-534a-84f4-73df23b6fa3a.name: Madness
b33a867f-67c8-534a-84f4-73df23b6fa3a.description: A derro fetal savant's particular madness grants it immunity to psychic effects. It cannot be restored to sanity by any means short of a wish spell or comparable magic. A derro fetal savant brought to sanity gains 4 points of Wisdom and loses 6 points of Charisma.

attributes.description: A derro fetal savant's particular madness grants it immunity to psychic effects. It cannot be restored to sanity by any means short of a wish spell or comparable magic. A derro fetal savant brought to sanity gains 4 points of Wisdom and loses 6 points of Charisma.

91da8dfa-b37e-5abc-b9a2-79a46fbcf25d.name: Vulnerability to Sunlight (Derro Fetal Savant)
91da8dfa-b37e-5abc-b9a2-79a46fbcf25d.description: A derro fetal savant takes 1 point of Constitution damage for every hour it is exposed to sunlight, and it dies if its Constitution score reaches 0. Lost Constitution points are recovered at the rate of 1/day spent underground or otherwise sheltered from the sun.

attributes.description: A derro fetal savant takes 1 point of Constitution damage for every hour it is exposed to sunlight, and it dies if its Constitution score reaches 0. Lost Constitution points are recovered at the rate of 1/day spent underground or otherwise sheltered from the sun.

c4efd627-7125-5469-baad-4b766daf99ed.name: Babble
c4efd627-7125-5469-baad-4b766daf99ed.description: The sight of potential host bodies so excites the fetal savant that it babbles and giggles madly and childishly, creating an insanity effect. All sane creatures that start their turns within 60 feet of the fetal savant must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw or be affected by confusion (as the spell) for 1d4 rounds. This is a psychic effect. Creatures that successfully save cannot be affected by the same fetal savant's babbling for 24 hours. This action cannot be taken when the fetal savant is using Soul Exchange.

attributes.description: The sight of potential host bodies so excites the fetal savant that it babbles and giggles madly and childishly, creating an insanity effect. All sane creatures that start their turns within 60 feet of the fetal savant must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw or be affected by confusion (as the spell) for 1d4 rounds. This is a psychic effect. Creatures that successfully save cannot be affected by the same fetal savant's babbling for 24 hours. This action cannot be taken when the fetal savant is using Soul Exchange.

2aa43e27-bf03-5446-8dd2-c9c366bb9c6a.name: Soul Exchange
2aa43e27-bf03-5446-8dd2-c9c366bb9c6a.description: As an action, the fetal savant can attempt to take control of a creature it can see within 90 feet, forcing an exchange of souls as a magic jar spell, using its own body as the container. The fetal savant can use this power at will, but it can exchange souls with only one other creature at a time. The victim resists the attack with a successful DC 13 Charisma saving throw. A creature that successfully saves is immune to the same fetal savant's soul exchange for 24 hours. If the saving throw fails, the fetal savant takes control of the target's body and ferociously attacks nearby opponents, eyes blazing with otherworldly light. As an action, the fetal savant can shift from its host body back to its own, if it is within range, returning the victim's soul to its own body. If the host body or fetal savant is brought to 0 hit points within 90 feet of each other, the two souls return to their original bodies and the creature at 0 hit points is dying; it must make death saving throws until it dies, stabilizes, or regains hit points, as usual. If the host body or fetal savant is slain while they are more than 90 feet apart, their souls cannot return to their bodies and they are both slain. While trapped in the fetal savant's withered body, the victim is effectively paralyzed and helpless.

c5c5c5b0-259f-5126-b446-800ff36c6192.name: Translucent

4701b89c-ffe5-5572-9c8b-25b0c35182fe.name: Bite (Dipsa)
4701b89c-ffe5-5572-9c8b-25b0c35182fe.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the dipsa's space. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the dipsa attaches to the target. A creature with a dipsa attached takes 3 (1d6) acid damage per round per dipsa, and it must make a successful DC 12 Constitution saving throw or have its hit point maximum reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. If a creature's hit point maximum is reduced to 0 by this effect, the creature dies. This reduction to a creature's hit point maximum lasts until it is affected by a lesser restoration spell or comparable magic.
