ec26e3d8-39bd-5f86-b67a-9368c6bdb41c.name: Terrifying Mask
ec26e3d8-39bd-5f86-b67a-9368c6bdb41c.description: Each non-undead creature within 60 feet of the dissimortuum that can see it must make a successful DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1d8 rounds. 847a5e9f-7806-53f4-a65c-69d29d144f11.name: Burrow
847a5e9f-7806-53f4-a65c-69d29d144f11.description: Dogmoles cannot burrow into solid rock, but they can move through softer material like soil or loose rubble, leaving a usable tunnel 5 feet in diameter.

b622b89e-3b56-5cdd-8db1-0185c7cd0926.name: Wormkiller Rage
b622b89e-3b56-5cdd-8db1-0185c7cd0926.description: Wild dogmole packs are famed for their battles against monsters in the dark caverns of the world. If the dogmole draws blood against vermin, a purple worm, or other underground invertebrates, it gains a +4 boost to its Strength and Constitution, but suffers a -2 penalty to its AC. The wormkiller rage lasts for 3 rounds. It cannot end the rage voluntarily while the creatures that sent it into a rage still lives.

79a9516e-3113-5882-a621-e8ae152d7637.description: Dogmole juggernauts cannot burrow into solid rock, but they can move through softer material like soil or loose rubble, leaving a usable tunnel 10 ft. in diameter.

c87c9da1-698e-550f-b6e9-e6324d2dfc1d.name: Ferocity (1/Day)
c87c9da1-698e-550f-b6e9-e6324d2dfc1d.description: When the dogmole juggernaut is reduced to 0 hit points, it doesn't die until the end of its next turn.

08502e07-ebbf-5c03-aa2f-62212b697cd7.name: Powerful Build
08502e07-ebbf-5c03-aa2f-62212b697cd7.description: A dogmole juggernaut is treated as one size larger if doing so is advantageous to it (such as during grapple checks, pushing attempts, and tripping attempts, but not for the purposes of squeezing or AC). It gains advantage against magical pushing attempts such as gust of wind or Repelling Blast.

436ed070-84b5-5671-8aa0-22d94783fe84.name: Wormkiller Rage (Dogmole Juggernaut)

417d1ef8-6014-5377-aa50-fb3f912abdd0.name: Keen Smell (Doppelrat)
417d1ef8-6014-5377-aa50-fb3f912abdd0.description: The doppelrat has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

37b46965-565d-5c2e-987f-9f0f55d6f052.name: Running Doppelrats
37b46965-565d-5c2e-987f-9f0f55d6f052.description: The hardest part of this monster is the sheer volume of attacks they generate. To model this, run them in groups of 4 for attack purposes and have those groups all use the same +5 to attack and do 1d4 damage. That way you need not roll 20 times for all of them, and you reduce the number of rolls required by a factor of 4.

To model this, run them in groups of 4 for attack purposes and have those groups all use the same +5 to attack and do 1d4 damage. That way you need not roll 20 times for all of them, and you reduce the number of rolls required by a factor of 4.

15a83f81-6e8f-52ee-8b78-f52fde5db04f.name: Arcane Doubling
15a83f81-6e8f-52ee-8b78-f52fde5db04f.description: A doppelrat under duress creates clones of itself at the beginning of its turn. Each round for 4 rounds, the number of live doppelrats quadruples but never exceeds 20. For example, when the doppelrat triggers arcane doubling, 1 rat becomes 4; at the start of the rat's next turn, those 4 become 16; and at the start of the rat's third turn, those 16 become 20, the maximum allowed. If one of the duplicates was destroyed between the original doppelrat's 1st and 2nd turns, then the surviving 3 would become 12, and so on. Each duplicate appears in the same space as any other rat, can either move or take an action the round it appears, and has 4 hit points and AC 13. Any surviving duplicates perish 1 minute (10 rounds) after the first ones were created. If the original doppelrat dies, its clones stop duplicating but the preexisting clones remain until their time expires. A creature can identify the original doppelrat from its duplicates as an action by making a successful DC 15 Intelligence (Nature) or Wisdom (Perception) check.

If the original doppelrat dies, its clones stop duplicating but the preexisting clones remain until their time expires. b57391aa-90f1-5fd5-ac3e-8a533e3b60cd.name: Bite (Doppelrat)
b57391aa-90f1-5fd5-ac3e-8a533e3b60cd.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.

6aee9ad8-e890-59a4-9b64-5b65d51a8acb.name: Doppeling Disease
6aee9ad8-e890-59a4-9b64-5b65d51a8acb.description: At the end of a dopplerat encounter, every creature bitten by a doppelrat or its duplicates must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or contract the degenerate cloning disease. During each long rest, the diseased creature grows and sloughs off a stillborn clone. The doppeling process leaves the diseased creature incapacitated for 1 hour, unable to move and barely able to speak (spellcasting is impossible in this state). When the incapacitation wears off, the creature makes a DC 12 Constitution saving throw; it recovers from the disease when it makes its second successful save. Humanoid clones created by the disease cannot be brought to life in any manner.

73ae7a19-b9f4-560d-bd00-c1e381e7b56a.name: Innate Spellcasting (Dorreq)
73ae7a19-b9f4-560d-bd00-c1e381e7b56a.description: The dorreq's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 10). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components: 3/day each: blink, dimension door, haste, shatter Wasteland Stride. This ability works like tree stride, but the dorreq can use it to sink into and appear out of any sandy or rocky ground, and the range is only 30 ft. Using this ability replaces the dorreq's usual movement.

73c636b6-9609-51ff-8321-5afb297ed052.name: Entanglement
73c636b6-9609-51ff-8321-5afb297ed052.description: Any creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of a dorreq must make a successful DC 14 Dexterity saving throw each round or be restrained by the dorreq's tentacles until the start of its next turn. On its turn, the dorreq can ignore or freely release a creature in the affected area.

7213024f-da54-5f82-9454-cb1ebad54a68.name: Multiattack (Dorreq)
7213024f-da54-5f82-9454-cb1ebad54a68.description: The dorreq makes two tentacle attacks and one bite attack. If both tentacle attacks hit, the target is grappled (escape DC 14).

46767e3f-61ab-5222-8c4d-2710d9658d06.name: Tentacle (Dorreq)
46767e3f-61ab-5222-8c4d-2710d9658d06.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If both tentacles hit the same target in a single turn, the target is grappled (escape DC 14) and pulled within reach of the bite attack, if it was farther than 5 feet away. The target must be size Large or smaller to be pulled this way. The dorreq can maintain a grapple on one Large, two Medium, or two Small creatures at one time.

60e3a713-a3da-5808-add9-aaee5b0cea59.name: Limited Amphibiousness
60e3a713-a3da-5808-add9-aaee5b0cea59.description: The dragon eel can breathe air and water, but it needs to be submerged at least once every six hours to avoid suffocation.

attributes.description: The dragon eel can breathe air and water, but it needs to be submerged at least once every six hours to avoid suffocation.

fbc00911-69ec-5855-ae8a-56ece1f749c4.name: Shocking Touch
fbc00911-69ec-5855-ae8a-56ece1f749c4.description: A dragon eel's body generates a potent charge of lightning. A creature that touches or makes a successful melee attack against a dragon eel takes 5 (1d10) lightning damage.

6f8d5d76-f179-59fc-90bd-b37545309391.name: Storm Glide
6f8d5d76-f179-59fc-90bd-b37545309391.description: During storms, the dragon eel can travel through the air as if under the effects of a fly spell, except using its swim speed.

793a6f9a-863b-5549-8767-a67e55ad6af3.name: Bite (Dragon Eel)
793a6f9a-863b-5549-8767-a67e55ad6af3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (4d8 + 8) piercing damage plus 5 (1d10) lightning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or become paralyzed for 1d4 rounds.

5609abec-e1db-5013-8354-c95a3a8cd109.name: Lightning Breath
5609abec-e1db-5013-8354-c95a3a8cd109.description: The dragon eel exhales lightning in a 60-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each target in that line takes 55 (10d10) lightning damage, or half damage with a successful DC 18 Dexterity saving throw.

830c76ca-aa19-59ea-bb55-ec82fca8c161.name: Multiattack (Dragon Eel)
830c76ca-aa19-59ea-bb55-ec82fca8c161.description: The dragon eel makes one bite attack and one tail slap attack.

fcfb6343-a495-5abf-9a27-704d5decca67.name: Tail Slap
fcfb6343-a495-5abf-9a27-704d5decca67.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (5d8 + 8) bludgeoning damage plus 5 (1d10) lightning damage and push the target up to 10 feet away.

b719531d-da31-5ffd-a064-1b93cee3ba59.name: Loyal to Dragon Master
b719531d-da31-5ffd-a064-1b93cee3ba59.description: A dragonleaf tree only follows commands from its designated master (or from any creatures to whom the master grants control). It has advantage on saving throws against any charm or compulsion spell or effect. Additionally, the tree has advantage on any saving throw to resist Bluff, Diplomacy, or Intimidate checks made to influence it to act against its masters.

c8ab70f9-f196-5c80-a5b7-24f2df51eb3b.name: Weaknesses
c8ab70f9-f196-5c80-a5b7-24f2df51eb3b.description: Dragonleaf trees with immunity to fire also have vulnerability to cold, and trees with immunity to cold have vulnerability to fire.

attributes.description: Dragonleaf trees with immunity to fire also have vulnerability to cold, and trees with immunity to cold have vulnerability to fire.

dc43ff16-6949-55e1-937b-bf4190625a93.name: Breath Weapon (Dragonleaf Tree)
dc43ff16-6949-55e1-937b-bf4190625a93.description: Dragonleaf tree can issue forth a breath weapon from its leaves appropriate to the dragon it honors. The creature's breath weapon deals 49 (14d6) damage, or half damage to targets that make a successful DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. A black, copper, or green tree breathes a 60-foot line of acid; a blue or bronze tree breathes a 60-foot line of lightning; a brass, gold, or red tree breathes a 30-foot cone of fire; and a silver or white tree breathes a 30-foot cone of cold.

e2a89ba9-0c5e-514b-a411-56964409acb1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 58 (10d10 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

7c143ee8-40cd-50e9-a1db-b0305ccd80ce.name: Dissolving Gaze
7c143ee8-40cd-50e9-a1db-b0305ccd80ce.description: When a creature that can see the drakon's eyes starts its turn within 30 feet of the drakon, the drakon can force it to make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw if the drakon isn't incapacitated and can see the creature. On a failed saving throw, the creature takes 3 (1d6) acid damage, its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the acid damage it takes (which ends after a long rest), and it's paralyzed until the start of its next turn. Unless surprised, a creature can avert its eyes at the start of its turn to avoid the saving throw. If the creature does so, it can't see the drakon until the start of its next turn, when it chooses again whether to avert its eyes. If the creature looks at the drakon before then, it must immediately make the saving throw.

attributes.description: When a creature that can see the drakon's eyes starts its turn within 30 feet of the drakon, the drakon can force it to make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw if the drakon isn't incapacitated and can see the creature. On a failed saving throw, the creature takes 3 (1d6) acid damage, its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the acid damage it takes (which ends after a long rest), and it's paralyzed until the start of its next turn. Unless surprised, a creature can avert its eyes at the start of its turn to avoid the saving throw. If the creature does so, it can't see the drakon until the start of its next turn, when it chooses again whether to avert its eyes. If the creature looks at the drakon before then, it must immediately make the saving throw.

84fb66e2-6d3f-55b6-8fe4-9cba78f63234.name: Acid Breath
84fb66e2-6d3f-55b6-8fe4-9cba78f63234.description: The drakon exhales acidic vapors in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area takes 28 (8d6) acid damage, or half damage with a successful DC 13 Constitution saving throw.

the dream eater's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 16). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

3/day: suggestion

895a0b4c-6803-5eb0-ab42-0c98f8caf263.description: The dream eater can use its turn to polymorph into a Small or Medium humanoid it has seen, or back into its true form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in all forms. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

a93ace4a-8b58-59b5-ab82-6be03b012ae7.name: Claw (Dream Eater)

e5374c97-6cf0-52fb-bda8-adcff266d5e0.name: Dream Eater's Caress
e5374c97-6cf0-52fb-bda8-adcff266d5e0.description: A creature that ends its turn grappled by a dream eater is restrained until the end of its next turn, it takes 5 (1d4 + 3) psychic damage, and the dream eater gains the same number of temporary hit points.

attributes.description: A creature that ends its turn grappled by a dream eater is restrained until the end of its next turn, it takes 5 (1d4 + 3) psychic damage, and the dream eater gains the same number of temporary hit points.

6b3a73ec-2ec6-5edb-bd68-8daef2725e87.name: Lotus Scent
6b3a73ec-2ec6-5edb-bd68-8daef2725e87.description: The dream eater secretes an oily chemical that most creatures find intoxicating. All living creatures within 30 feet must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw against poison or be poisoned for 2d4 rounds. While poisoned this way, the creature is stunned. Creatures that successfully save are immune to that dream eater's lotus scent for 24 hours.

568f3d94-ba3b-58af-822b-cbcddd8c7f3d.name: Multiattack (Dream Eater)

cd8872c2-bba8-5a74-ac17-d3fb0978deaa.name: Waking Dreams
cd8872c2-bba8-5a74-ac17-d3fb0978deaa.description: Every creature within 20 feet of the dream eater must make a DC 16 Charisma saving throw. Those that fail enter waking dreams and are confused (as the spell) for 6 rounds. On turns when the creature can act normally (rolls 9 or 10 for the confusion effect), it can repeat the saving throw at the end of its turn, and the effect ends early on a successful save.

190f2fbe-8a4d-58e5-95c8-6697b2aadcc8.name: Grasping Hair
190f2fbe-8a4d-58e5-95c8-6697b2aadcc8.description: The drowned maiden's hair attacks as though it were three separate limbs, each of which can be attacked (AC 19; 15 hit points; immunity to necrotic, poison, and psychic damage; resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks not made with silvered weapons). A lock of hair can be broken if a creature takes an action and succeeds on a DC 15 Strength check against it.

at will: disguise self, silence

7a5aad56-e5e0-551c-9dba-8980ca43dd08.name: Kiss
7a5aad56-e5e0-551c-9dba-8980ca43dd08.description: The drowned maiden can kiss one target that is grappled and adjacent to her. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or take 1d6 Strength damage.

21c068d0-9ec5-5407-883d-270d6ad41ad3.name: Multiattack (Drowned Maiden)
21c068d0-9ec5-5407-883d-270d6ad41ad3.description: The drowned maiden makes two claw attacks and one hair attack, each of which it can replace with one kiss attack.

attributes.description: The drowned maiden makes two claw attacks and one hair attack, each of which it can replace with one kiss attack.

e6cc389b-2eb6-50e2-8bc6-a32299f1cdd3.name: Reel (Drowned Maiden)
e6cc389b-2eb6-50e2-8bc6-a32299f1cdd3.description: The drowned maiden pulls a grappled creature of Large size or smaller up to 15 feet straight toward herself.

attributes.description: The drowned maiden pulls a grappled creature of Large size or smaller up to 15 feet straight toward herself.

557ad873-7e7a-5476-a122-9e84e26b916a.name: Baleful Glare
557ad873-7e7a-5476-a122-9e84e26b916a.description: When a creature that can see the eyes of the dullahan's severed head starts its turn within 30 feet of the dullahan, the dullahan can force it to make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw if the dullahan isn't incapacitated and can see the creature. On a failed save, the creature is frightened until the start of its next turn. While frightened in this way the creature must move away from the dullahan, and can only use its action to Dash. If the creature is affected by the dullahan's Deathly Doom trait, it is restrained while frightened instead. Unless surprised, a creature can avert its eyes to avoid the saving throw at the start of its turn. If the creature does so, it can't see the dullahan until the start of its next turn, when it can avert its eyes again. If the creature looks at the dullahan in the meantime, it must immediately make the save.

attributes.description: When a creature that can see the eyes of the dullahan's severed head starts its turn within 30 feet of the dullahan, the dullahan can force it to make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw if the dullahan isn't incapacitated and can see the creature. If the creature does so, it can't see the dullahan until the start of its next turn, when it can avert its eyes again. If the creature looks at the dullahan in the meantime, it must immediately make the save.

d1a2dca9-842e-5eb1-a32b-3e22e7cef449.name: Deathly Doom (1/Day)
d1a2dca9-842e-5eb1-a32b-3e22e7cef449.description: As a bonus action, the dullahan magically dooms a creature. The dullahan knows the direction to the doomed creature as long as it is on the same plane.

attributes.description: As a bonus action, the dullahan magically dooms a creature. The dullahan knows the direction to the doomed creature as long as it is on the same plane.

2d1029f4-c0e7-5d38-aaba-1dbb91206b9f.name: Innate Spellcasting (Dullahan)
2d1029f4-c0e7-5d38-aaba-1dbb91206b9f.description:
the dullahan's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). The dullahan can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material or somatic components:

at will: bane, chill touch, hex, knock

3/day each: false life, see invisibility

1/day: blight

853a95fc-1ebf-5f20-bf95-a4125fa86f27.name: Relentless Advance
853a95fc-1ebf-5f20-bf95-a4125fa86f27.description: The dullahan is unaffected by difficult terrain, and can ride over water and other liquid surfaces.

42dd6ce0-52bc-5323-b871-b3e6cabbc12f.name: Interposing Glare
42dd6ce0-52bc-5323-b871-b3e6cabbc12f.description: When the dullahan is hit by a melee attack it can move its severed head in front of the attacker's face. The attacker is affected by the dullahan's Baleful Glare immediately. If the creature is averting its eyes this turn, it must still make the save, but does so with advantage.

96a93c55-427c-5d1b-b5d7-5d54c589a58b.name: Multiattack (Dullahan)
96a93c55-427c-5d1b-b5d7-5d54c589a58b.description: The dullahan makes two attacks with its spine whip.

attributes.description: The dullahan makes two attacks with its spine whip.

4d5a890e-fa0b-57a7-9844-c48a91617fb5.name: Seal the Doom
4d5a890e-fa0b-57a7-9844-c48a91617fb5.description: The dullahan points at a creature marked by Deathly Doom within 40 feet than it can see. The creature must succeed at a DC 15 Constitution saving throw against this magic or immediately drop to 0 hit points. A creature that successfully saves is immune to this effect for 24 hours.

9ffcb4d7-084b-5636-9862-fa564eb74c91.name: Spine Whip
9ffcb4d7-084b-5636-9862-fa564eb74c91.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) slashing damage plus 10 (3d10) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature it must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be wracked with pain and fall prone.

29542e5d-9800-5d19-a858-996358df83fd.name: Adhesive (Object or Terrain Form Only)
29542e5d-9800-5d19-a858-996358df83fd.description: The dune mimic adheres to anything that touches it. A creature adhered to the dune mimic is also grappled by it (escape DC 15). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have disadvantage. The dune mimic can harden its outer surface, so only the creatures it chooses are affected by this trait.

7d21ad96-022a-5996-9233-d914bffa493b.name: False Appearance (Object or Terrain Form Only)
7d21ad96-022a-5996-9233-d914bffa493b.description: While the dune mimic remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary object or terrain feature.

attributes.description: While the dune mimic remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary object or terrain feature.

115f63bb-ddd7-56b1-84ab-e1006220ba0f.name: Grappler
115f63bb-ddd7-56b1-84ab-e1006220ba0f.description: The dune mimic has advantage on attack rolls against a creature grappled by it.

attributes.description: The dune mimic has advantage on attack rolls against a creature grappled by it.

770d0a37-57a9-5d64-b4dd-b90b4a76582a.name: Shapechanger (Dune Mimic)
770d0a37-57a9-5d64-b4dd-b90b4a76582a.description: The dune mimic can use its action to polymorph into a Huge object or terrain feature (maximum area 25 x 25 feet) or back into its true, amorphous form. Since its coating of dust, sand, and gravel can't be hidden, it usually disguises itself as a terrain feature or eroded ruin. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

Since its coating of dust, sand, and gravel can't be hidden, it usually disguises itself as a terrain feature or eroded ruin. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

b76bc6e3-5c93-555e-a870-222822ea6a01.name: Engulf
b76bc6e3-5c93-555e-a870-222822ea6a01.description: The dune mimic engulfs all creatures it has grappled. An engulfed creature can't breathe, is restrained, is no longer grappled, has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the dune mimic, and takes 18 (4d8) acid damage at the start of each of the dune mimic's turns. When the dune mimic moves, the engulfed creature moves with it. An engulfed creature can try to escape by taking an action to make a DC 15 Strength check. On a success, the creature escapes and enters a space of its choice within 5 feet of the dune mimic.

8a7f41c3-ff97-589d-9561-1cbe6a5215b1.name: Multiattack (Dune Mimic)
8a7f41c3-ff97-589d-9561-1cbe6a5215b1.description: The dune mimic makes four pseudopod attacks.

attributes.description: The dune mimic makes four pseudopod attacks.

e388f45f-04e3-5d95-8116-d91a9c29aff1.name: Pseudopod
e388f45f-04e3-5d95-8116-d91a9c29aff1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the dune mimic is in object or terrain form, the target is subjected to the mimic's Adhesive trait.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the dune mimic is in object or terrain form, the target is subjected to the mimic's Adhesive trait.

885070d5-a180-5b0b-8849-d52b74201488.name: Innate Spellcasting (Duskthorn Dryad)
885070d5-a180-5b0b-8849-d52b74201488.description:
the dryad's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17). She can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: dancing lights, druidcraft

3/day each: charm person, entangle, invisibility, magic missile

1/day each: barkskin, counterspell, dispel magic, fog cloud, shillelagh, suggestion, wall of thorns

55beb1f9-8a09-5f73-96b8-7eddf1bac709.name: Magic Resistance (Duskthorn Dryad)
55beb1f9-8a09-5f73-96b8-7eddf1bac709.description: The dryad has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The dryad has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

949ff4be-46c4-5bd3-9b92-62a7b770b191.name: Speak with Beasts and Plants
949ff4be-46c4-5bd3-9b92-62a7b770b191.description: The dryad can communicate with beasts and plants as if they shared a language.

attributes.description: The dryad can communicate with beasts and plants as if they shared a language.

823a5149-cc80-5a19-b064-5650707433bc.name: Tree Dependent
823a5149-cc80-5a19-b064-5650707433bc.description: The dryad is mystically bonded to her duskthorn vines and must remain within 300 yards of them or become poisoned. If she remains out of range of her vines for 24 hours, she suffers 1d6 Constitution damage, and another 1d6 points of Constitution damage every day that follows - eventually, this separation kills the dryad. A dryad can bond with new vines by performing a 24-hour ritual.

If she remains out of range of her vines for 24 hours, she suffers 1d6 Constitution damage, and another 1d6 points of Constitution damage every day that follows - eventually, this separation kills the dryad. A dryad can bond with new vines by performing a 24-hour ritual.

74a37169-03cb-508d-928a-fe51a0ea3aa2.name: Tree Stride
74a37169-03cb-508d-928a-fe51a0ea3aa2.description: Once on her turn, the dryad can use 10 feet of her movement to step magically into one dead tree within her reach and emerge from a second dead tree within 60 feet of the first tree, appearing in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the second tree. Both trees must be Large or bigger.

Both trees must be Large or bigger.

261aba83-1e51-5982-b85e-9097dffcf6b3.name: Dagger (Duskthorn Dryad)
261aba83-1e51-5982-b85e-9097dffcf6b3.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d4 + 5) piercing damage.

dfbf4342-a22d-578b-8320-b0a478a975ce.name: Longbow (Duskthorn Dryad)
dfbf4342-a22d-578b-8320-b0a478a975ce.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) piercing damage.

057c6a41-eb4e-5238-8de9-085886b59215.name: Twisted
057c6a41-eb4e-5238-8de9-085886b59215.description: When the dust goblin attacks a creature from hiding, its target must make a successful DC 10 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: When the dust goblin attacks a creature from hiding, its target must make a successful DC 10 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn.

1fb8bed8-2086-5ab3-86b8-3fc16b667343.name: Dwarven Resistance
1fb8bed8-2086-5ab3-86b8-3fc16b667343.description: The dwarven ringmage has advantage on saving throws against poison.

attributes.description: The dwarven ringmage has advantage on saving throws against poison.

844a4254-323b-5cfc-8482-21780b5eaeae.name: Ring Magic
844a4254-323b-5cfc-8482-21780b5eaeae.description: The dwarven ringmage can imbue a nonmagical ring with a spell that has a range of self or touch. Doing so expends components as if the dwarven ringmage had cast the spell normally and uses a spell slot one level higher than the spell normally requires. When the wearer of the ring activates the ring as an action, the spell is cast as if the dwarven ringmage had cast the spell. The dwarven ringmage does not regain the spell slot until the ring is discharged or the dwarven ringmage chooses to dismiss the spell.

Doing so expends components as if the dwarven ringmage had cast the spell normally and uses a spell slot one level higher than the spell normally requires. When the wearer of the ring activates the ring as an action, the spell is cast as if the dwarven ringmage had cast the spell. The dwarven ringmage does not regain the spell slot until the ring is discharged or the dwarven ringmage chooses to dismiss the spell.

422a564a-1d13-58ae-bc20-20bf64e31972.name: Ring-Staff Focus
422a564a-1d13-58ae-bc20-20bf64e31972.description: The dwarven ringmage can use his ring-staff as a focus for spells that require rings as a focus or component, or for his Ring Magic ability. If used as a focus for Ring Magic, the spell does not require a spell slot one level higher than the spell normally requires. Once per day, the dwarven ringmage can imbue a spell of 4th level or lower into his ring-staff by expending a spell slot equal to the spell being imbued.

attributes.description: The dwarven ringmage can use his ring-staff as a focus for spells that require rings as a focus or component, or for his Ring Magic ability. If used as a focus for Ring Magic, the spell does not require a spell slot one level higher than the spell normally requires. Once per day, the dwarven ringmage can imbue a spell of 4th level or lower into his ring-staff by expending a spell slot equal to the spell being imbued.

2390c4be-d847-5236-8f3b-c77462d2572c.name: Spellcasting (Dwarven Ringmage)
2390c4be-d847-5236-8f3b-c77462d2572c.description:
the mage is a 9th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). The mage has the following wizard spells prepared:

- **Cantrips (at will)**: fire bolt, mage hand, shocking grasp, true strike
- **1st Level** (4 slots): expeditious retreat, magic missile, shield, thunderwave
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): misty step, web
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): counterspell, fireball, fly
- **4th Level** (3 slots): greater invisibility, ice storm
- **5th Level** (1 slot): cone of cold

- **3rd Level** (3 slots): counterspell, fireball, fly
- **4th Level** (3 slots): greater invisibility, ice storm

29cf3c38-6c90-542b-b189-32b9a6cbb174.name: Multiattack (Dwarven Ringmage)
29cf3c38-6c90-542b-b189-32b9a6cbb174.description: The dwarven ringmage makes two melee attacks.

attributes.description: The dwarven ringmage makes two melee attacks.

c57413a6-fb62-5475-a6bb-e5e99cf6e8f2.name: Ring-Staff
c57413a6-fb62-5475-a6bb-e5e99cf6e8f2.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage.

524b3a0e-ee6d-5e59-a233-7608bc036ac1.name: Fire Breath (Eala)
524b3a0e-ee6d-5e59-a233-7608bc036ac1.description: The eala breathes fire in a 20-foot cone. Every creature in the area must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one. The eala's fire breath ignites flammable objects and melts soft metals in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

The eala's fire breath ignites flammable objects and melts soft metals in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

dd7abe30-840b-5493-9845-79063d198108.name: Multiattack (Eala)
dd7abe30-840b-5493-9845-79063d198108.description: The eala makes two attacks with its wing blades.

attributes.description: The eala makes two attacks with its wing blades.

e5314c68-139c-5161-9cbb-fc0b1df973e8.name: Swan Song
e5314c68-139c-5161-9cbb-fc0b1df973e8.description: When the eala is reduced to 0 hit points, it can use its last breath sing a plaintive and beautiful melody. Creatures within 20 feet that can hear the eala must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw or be incapacitated for 1 round. A creature incapacitated in this way has its speed reduced to 0.

Creatures within 20 feet that can hear the eala must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw or be incapacitated for 1 round. A creature incapacitated in this way has its speed reduced to 0.

f04944cf-6c35-5950-86a8-047f3a1b1b26.name: Innate Spellcasting (Eater Of Dust (Yakat-Shi))
f04944cf-6c35-5950-86a8-047f3a1b1b26.description:
the eater of dust's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

3/day each: freedom of movement, inflict wounds, true strike

1/day each: cure wounds (as - **3rd Level**), magic weapon (as 6th level), misty step

the eater of dust's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

8a3e0f4b-262d-52e4-9fd9-78d6bcab53db.name: Regeneration (Eater Of Dust (Yakat-Shi))
8a3e0f4b-262d-52e4-9fd9-78d6bcab53db.description: The eater of dust regains 5 hit points at the start of its turn. If it takes fire damage, this trait does not function at the start of its next turn. The eater of dust dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and does not regenerate.

attributes.description: The eater of dust regains 5 hit points at the start of its turn. If it takes fire damage, this trait does not function at the start of its next turn. The eater of dust dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and does not regenerate.

9a75293f-fee6-5b21-ac23-e4c19465f235.name: Unending Hunger
9a75293f-fee6-5b21-ac23-e4c19465f235.description: An eater of dust can devour any substance with its mawblade, regardless of composition, and never get full. It can even gain nourishment from eating dust or soil (hence the name given to the race by various fiends). If an eater of dust's mawblade is ever stolen, lost, or destroyed, it slowly starves to death.

It can even gain nourishment from eating dust or soil (hence the name given to the race by various fiends). If an eater of dust's mawblade is ever stolen, lost, or destroyed, it slowly starves to death.

75fea5a2-6f2b-5fcf-bc3e-804d8d822c9b.name: Weapon Bond
75fea5a2-6f2b-5fcf-bc3e-804d8d822c9b.description: A mawblade is part of the eater of dust. It can strike any creature as if it were magically enchanted and made of silver, iron, or other materials required to overcome immunities or resistances. An eater of dust always knows the location of its mawblade as if using the locate creature spell.

attributes.description: A mawblade is part of the eater of dust. It can strike any creature as if it were magically enchanted and made of silver, iron, or other materials required to overcome immunities or resistances. An eater of dust always knows the location of its mawblade as if using the locate creature spell.

40e0c39e-4943-546e-8fda-c5260b66bb18.name: Mawblade
40e0c39e-4943-546e-8fda-c5260b66bb18.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) piercing damage, and the target must make a successful DC 17 Constitution saving throw or gain one level of exhaustion.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) piercing damage, and the target must make a successful DC 17 Constitution saving throw or gain one level of exhaustion.

bcad6d25-2b10-5a16-a0ab-8f54b39c28d5.name: Multiattack (Eater Of Dust (Yakat-Shi))
bcad6d25-2b10-5a16-a0ab-8f54b39c28d5.description: The eater of dust makes two mawblade attacks, or makes one mawblade attack and casts inflict wounds.

attributes.description: The eater of dust makes two mawblade attacks, or makes one mawblade attack and casts inflict wounds.

bf3e1848-46e2-5460-8cc5-a31324714300.name: Incorporeal Movement (Edimmu)
bf3e1848-46e2-5460-8cc5-a31324714300.description: The edimmu can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attributes.description: The edimmu can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

fdfae355-86d8-542a-9fb5-7ac82ef9dbd1.name: Rejuvenation
fdfae355-86d8-542a-9fb5-7ac82ef9dbd1.description: If destroyed, an edimmu rises again in 2d4 days. Permanently destroying one requires properly burying its mortal remains in consecrated or hallowed ground. Edimmus rarely venture more than a mile from the place of their death.

attributes.description: If destroyed, an edimmu rises again in 2d4 days. Permanently destroying one requires properly burying its mortal remains in consecrated or hallowed ground. Edimmus rarely venture more than a mile from the place of their death.

eb150388-3673-549c-82e5-95a1acf12cb7.name: Water Siphon
eb150388-3673-549c-82e5-95a1acf12cb7.description: Melee Spell Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 21 (6d6) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken and it is stunned for 1 minute and gains one level of exhaustion. A stunned creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the stun on itself on a success. The hit point reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest and drinks abundant water or until it is affected by greater restoration or comparable magic. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.

22ed3847-ac3b-5496-ba4d-7ca7e1afd18e.name: Amphibious (Eel Hound)
22ed3847-ac3b-5496-ba4d-7ca7e1afd18e.description: The eel hound can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The eel hound can breathe air and water.

632ff17b-f66c-51a9-bf11-63a214f1d691.name: Pack Tactics (Eel Hound)
632ff17b-f66c-51a9-bf11-63a214f1d691.description: The eel hound has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hound's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

attributes.description: The eel hound has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hound's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

7c8c9d10-360a-52bf-ab6f-d664cb9d10f3.name: Slick Spittle
7c8c9d10-360a-52bf-ab6f-d664cb9d10f3.description: By spending 2 rounds dribbling spittle on an area, an eel hound can cover a 5-foot square with its slippery saliva. This area is treated as if under the effects of a grease spell, but it lasts for 1 hour.

a27fd6f1-ce4c-5256-824f-a15e73aaae2a.name: Slithering Bite
a27fd6f1-ce4c-5256-824f-a15e73aaae2a.description: A creature an eel hound attacks can't make opportunity attacks against it until the start of the creature's next turn.

attributes.description: A creature an eel hound attacks can't make opportunity attacks against it until the start of the creature's next turn.

c305406b-bfdd-5b79-81bb-da51599cdb1a.name: Bite (Eel Hound)
c305406b-bfdd-5b79-81bb-da51599cdb1a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14).

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14).
death ward, spirit guardians

ed0e8402-5f88-5ecf-99d4-45b344cafb92.name: Asgardian Battleaxes
ed0e8402-5f88-5ecf-99d4-45b344cafb92.description: Made in Valhalla and kept keen with runic magic, Asgardian axes have a +2 enchantment and add a second die of weapon damage. Their magic must be renewed each week by a valkyrie or Odin's own hand.

attributes.description: Made in Valhalla and kept keen with runic magic, Asgardian axes have a +2 enchantment and add a second die of weapon damage. Their magic must be renewed each week by a valkyrie or Odin's own hand.
bless, spare the dying

f08721a4-4ced-50b6-bf74-5f0a37da7f84.name: Battle Frenzy
f08721a4-4ced-50b6-bf74-5f0a37da7f84.description: Once reduced to 30 hp or less, einherjar make all attacks with advantage.

attributes.description: Once reduced to 30 hp or less, einherjar make all attacks with advantage.

76ab42d4-8590-590b-9912-a33bc4152fd8.name: Battle Loving
76ab42d4-8590-590b-9912-a33bc4152fd8.description: Einherjars relish combat and never turn down a challenge to single combat or shirk a fight, even if the odds are hopeless. After all, Valhalla awaits them.

attributes.description: Einherjars relish combat and never turn down a challenge to single combat or shirk a fight, even if the odds are hopeless. After all, Valhalla awaits them.

4945bde4-4515-5bed-bcbc-fdbfdb8d8b93.name: Fearsome Gaze
4945bde4-4515-5bed-bcbc-fdbfdb8d8b93.description: The stare of an einherjar is especially piercing and intimidating. They make Intimidation checks with advantage.

attributes.description: The stare of an einherjar is especially piercing and intimidating. They make Intimidation checks with advantage.

c12d39d7-e749-560d-8867-22f5525003c7.name: Innate Spellcasting (Einherjar)
c12d39d7-e749-560d-8867-22f5525003c7.description: The einherjar's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 13). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

4b6d206c-7780-5180-ae19-e3f34b5cd360.name: Asgardian Battleaxe
4b6d206c-7780-5180-ae19-e3f34b5cd360.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) slashing damage when used one handed or 17 (2d10 + 6) when used two-handed.

2e531ec8-4f62-55d8-afcd-a3947584b0dc.name: Handaxe
2e531ec8-4f62-55d8-afcd-a3947584b0dc.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) slashing damage.

f624ec8f-f362-50c2-beb7-745a04fa819e.name: Multiattack (Einherjar)
f624ec8f-f362-50c2-beb7-745a04fa819e.description: An einherjar makes three attacks with its Asgardian battleaxe or one with its handaxe.

attributes.description: An einherjar makes three attacks with its Asgardian battleaxe or one with its handaxe.

62115774-b7f6-5bc4-abd1-f81bca556769.name: Shadow Blend
62115774-b7f6-5bc4-abd1-f81bca556769.description: In areas of dim light or darkness, an elder shadow drake is treated as invisible. Artificial illumination, such as a lantern or a light or continual flame spell, does not negate this ability; nothing less than true sunlight or a daylight spell does. The drake cannot use its Speed Surge or its Stygian Breath while invisible. An elder shadow drake can suspend or resume this ability at will, so long as the drake is in dim light or darkness.

Artificial illumination, such as a lantern or a light or continual flame spell, does not negate this ability; nothing less than true sunlight or a daylight spell does. The drake cannot use its Speed Surge or its Stygian Breath while invisible. An elder shadow drake can suspend or resume this ability at will, so long as the drake is in dim light or darkness.

42b756c5-5a2a-589b-80f8-fe318ae8b97f.name: Shadow Jump (3/Day)
42b756c5-5a2a-589b-80f8-fe318ae8b97f.description: An elder shadow drake can travel between shadows as if by means of a dimension door spell. This magical transport must begin and end in an area of dim light or darkness, and the distance must be no more than 60 feet.

attributes.description: An elder shadow drake can travel between shadows as if by means of a dimension door spell. This magical transport must begin and end in an area of dim light or darkness, and the distance must be no more than 60 feet.

802a6f0a-cc7d-5011-8a81-10b16af2ef2d.name: Speed Surge (3/Day)
802a6f0a-cc7d-5011-8a81-10b16af2ef2d.description: The elder shadow drake takes one additional move action on its turn. It can use only one speed surge per round.

attributes.description: The elder shadow drake takes one additional move action on its turn. It can use only one speed surge per round.

381fbc3f-5de2-57cd-8875-fa70791ec4dc.name: Bite (Elder Shadow Drake)
381fbc3f-5de2-57cd-8875-fa70791ec4dc.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage.

7895c139-e5a6-5cdf-b454-240d9809039d.name: Multiattack (Elder Shadow Drake)
7895c139-e5a6-5cdf-b454-240d9809039d.description: The drake makes one bite attack and one tail slap attack.

attributes.description: The drake makes one bite attack and one tail slap attack.

45e540e0-510a-5317-9376-ed301ab06774.name: Stygian Breath
45e540e0-510a-5317-9376-ed301ab06774.description: The elder shadow drake exhales a ball of black liquid that travels up to 60 feet before exploding into a cloud of frigid black mist with a 20-foot radius. Each creature in that sphere takes 42 (12d6) cold damage, or half damage with a successful DC 15 Constitution saving throw. Within the area of effect, the mist snuffs out nonmagical light sources and dispels magical light of 1st level or lower.

004348d1-0df7-5e5b-a7ae-1b6115af0d48.name: Tail Slap (Elder Shadow Drake)
004348d1-0df7-5e5b-a7ae-1b6115af0d48.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage.

a3274d5b-dc00-5b94-a1c9-5afe05b47b1b.name: Innate Spellcasting (Eleinomae)
a3274d5b-dc00-5b94-a1c9-5afe05b47b1b.description:
the eleinomae's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: dancing lights

3/day each: charm person, suggestion

2/day each: hallucinatory terrain, major image

4f14fa27-71d2-5467-ad32-dcc7873d5985.name: Reed Walk
4f14fa27-71d2-5467-ad32-dcc7873d5985.description: The eleinomae can move across undergrowth or rivers without making an ability check. Additionally, difficult terrain of this kind doesn't cost it extra moment.

attributes.description: The eleinomae can move across undergrowth or rivers without making an ability check. Additionally, difficult terrain of this kind doesn't cost it extra moment.

876baeb0-bf96-55a6-a009-34406e21927d.name: Unearthly Grace
876baeb0-bf96-55a6-a009-34406e21927d.description: The eleinomae's Charisma modifier is added to its armor class (included above).

attributes.description: The eleinomae's Charisma modifier is added to its armor class (included above).

25bd3a92-ae27-5e1b-8baf-f0d626e1196d.name: Dagger (Eleinomae)
25bd3a92-ae27-5e1b-8baf-f0d626e1196d.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.

1ed00963-7c33-5344-a5fd-9b4dbf5209a4.name: Multiattack (Eleinomae)
1ed00963-7c33-5344-a5fd-9b4dbf5209a4.description: The eleinomae makes three dagger attacks and one reed flower net attack.

attributes.description: The eleinomae makes three dagger attacks and one reed flower net attack.

95bced33-f601-5deb-ad90-7bbe15fd304e.name: Reed Flower Net
95bced33-f601-5deb-ad90-7bbe15fd304e.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 5/15 ft., one Large or smaller creature. Hit: The target has disadvantage on Wisdom saving throws for 1 minute, and is restrained. A creature can free itself or another creature within reach from restraint by using an action to make a successful DC 15 Strength check or by doing 5 slashing damage to the net (AC 10).

A creature can free itself or another creature within reach from restraint by using an action to make a successful DC 15 Strength check or by doing 5 slashing damage to the net (AC 10).

c15eb5d2-9b28-557e-b9cc-0cb190ac1acc.name: Immortal
c15eb5d2-9b28-557e-b9cc-0cb190ac1acc.description: The elemental locus does not age and does not die when it drops to 0 hit points. If the elemental locus drops to 0 hit points, it falls into a quiescent state for 25 weeks before returning to activity with full hit points. Its spawned elementals continue fighting whatever enemies attacked the elemental locus; if no enemies are present, they defend the locus's area.

If the elemental locus drops to 0 hit points, it falls into a quiescent state for 25 weeks before returning to activity with full hit points. Its spawned elementals continue fighting whatever enemies attacked the elemental locus; if no enemies are present, they defend the locus's area.

a4615192-1448-5457-9efb-afe5f5d32518.name: Magic Resistance (Elemental Locus)
a4615192-1448-5457-9efb-afe5f5d32518.description: The elemental locus has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The elemental locus has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

f430c946-60c9-5b61-a557-a7733dd71f93.name: Massive
f430c946-60c9-5b61-a557-a7733dd71f93.description: The elemental locus is larger than most Gargantuan creatures, occupying a space of 60 by 60 feet. Its movement is not affected by difficult terrain or by Huge or smaller creatures. Other creatures can enter and move through the elemental locus's space, but they must make a successful DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check after each 10 feet of movement. Failure indicates they fall prone and can move no farther that turn.

0ba90cd5-0ea5-5952-9f21-9005a2408fc5.name: Siege Monster (Elemental Locus)
0ba90cd5-0ea5-5952-9f21-9005a2408fc5.description: The elemental locus deals double damage to objects and structures.

attributes.description: The elemental locus deals double damage to objects and structures.

897cc595-b101-5f6a-afe4-eabdcb403928.name: Spawn Elementals
897cc595-b101-5f6a-afe4-eabdcb403928.description: As a bonus action, the elemental locus loses 82 hit points and spawns an air, earth, fire, or water elemental to serve it. Spawned elementals answer to their creator's will and are not fully independent. The types of elementals the locus can spawn depend on the terrain it embodies; for example, an elemental locus of the desert can spawn earth, fire, and air elementals, but not water.

5886a76e-3ae6-50b5-936d-624361db6d72.name: Multiattack (Elemental Locus)
5886a76e-3ae6-50b5-936d-624361db6d72.description: The elemental locus makes two slam attacks.

ea776b18-85c4-5e17-a4fb-ca0dcc298c5f.name: Slam (Elemental Locus)

773cf04d-75cb-5767-9aa6-1cd22f20c874.name: Bound (Emerald Eye)
773cf04d-75cb-5767-9aa6-1cd22f20c874.description: An emerald eye cannot move more than 25 feet away from the creature that it is psychically linked to. It begins existence bound to its creator, but a free emerald eye can bind itself to another creature as in the Bind action.

attributes.description: An emerald eye cannot move more than 25 feet away from the creature that it is psychically linked to. It begins existence bound to its creator, but a free emerald eye can bind itself to another creature as in the Bind action.

68194217-bdbc-5004-9d6c-9b882d171f35.name: Immutable Form (Emerald Eye)
68194217-bdbc-5004-9d6c-9b882d171f35.description: The emerald eye is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The emerald eye is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

5351db2d-fd0b-5920-a19c-6ee9aca4d9ba.name: Attraction
5351db2d-fd0b-5920-a19c-6ee9aca4d9ba.description: An emerald eye can compel one creature to move toward a particular person or object. If the creature fails a DC 13 Charisma saving throw, it feels a powerful compulsion to move toward whatever the emerald eye chooses. The target creature must be within 25 feet of the emerald eye when attraction is triggered, but the creature is then free to move beyond this range while remaining under the effect. Nothing seems out of the ordinary to the creature, but it does not knowingly put itself or its allies in harm's way to reach the object. The creature may attempt another DC 13 Charisma saving throw at the start of each of its turns; a success ends the effect.

8e31928d-e370-5b58-a75d-b6324e796103.description: The emerald eye can bind itself psychically to a creature with an Intelligence of 6 or greater. The attempt fails if the target succeeds on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw. The attempt is unnoticed by the target, regardless of the result.

the Emerald Order cult leader's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 16). He can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

2/day each: detect thoughts, dimension door, haste, slow

2dce6483-a6ca-5e40-a8e6-21b8e22d9e35.description: The Emerald Order cult leader can always act in a surprise round, but if he fails to notice a foe, he is still considered surprised until he takes an action. He receives a +3 bonus on initiative checks.

02c63820-ab9f-550a-833c-b48db5965597.name: Spellcasting (Emerald Order Cult Leader)
02c63820-ab9f-550a-833c-b48db5965597.description:
the Emerald Order cult leader is a 10th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 16, +8 to hit with spell attacks). The cult leader has the following cleric spells prepared:

- **Cantrips (at will)**: guidance, light, sacred flame, spare the dying, thaumaturgy
- **1st Level** (4 slots): cure wounds, identify, guiding bolt
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): lesser restoration, silence, spiritual weapon
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): dispel magic, mass healing word, spirit guardians
- **4th Level** (3 slots): banishment, death ward, guardian of faith
- **5th Level** (2 slots): flame strike

39768b36-d924-5ec1-bdbe-1a8ca2fcb0bf.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: Large or smaller creatures are restrained. To escape, the restrained creature or an adjacent ally must use an action to make a successful DC 14 Strength check. The shadow snare has 15 hit points and AC 12.

cde8339e-bc70-5c2c-a835-7dbb40812d6a.name: Drift Backward
cde8339e-bc70-5c2c-a835-7dbb40812d6a.description: A future self of the eonic drifter materializes in an unoccupied space within 30 feet of the drifter. The future self has the eonic drifter's stats and its full hit points, and it takes its turn immediately after its present self. Killing the original eonic drifter makes its future self disappear. If the present self sees its future self die, the eonic drifter must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. There is no effect if the save succeeds. If the saving throw fails, roll 1d6 to determine the effect on the eonic drifter: 1 = frightened, 2 = incapacitated, 3 = paralyzed, 4 = unconscious, 5 or 6 = has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks. These effects last 1d4 rounds.

attributes.description: A future self of the eonic drifter materializes in an unoccupied space within 30 feet of the drifter. The future self has the eonic drifter's stats and its full hit points, and it takes its turn immediately after its present self. Killing the original eonic drifter makes its future self disappear. If the present self sees its future self die, the eonic drifter must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. There is no effect if the save succeeds. If the saving throw fails, roll 1d6 to determine the effect on the eonic drifter: 1 = frightened, 2 = incapacitated, 3 = paralyzed, 4 = unconscious, 5 or 6 = has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks. These effects last 1d4 rounds.

b80c1202-e594-5342-94d4-fab3ddb13d4e.name: Drift Forward
b80c1202-e594-5342-94d4-fab3ddb13d4e.description: The future self makes a time warping staff attack against a target. If the attack hits, instead of causing bludgeoning damage, both the target and the attacker jump forward through time, effectively ceasing to exist in the present time. They reappear in the same locations 1d4 rounds later, at the end of the present self's turn. Creatures occupying those locations at that moment are pushed 5 feet in a direction of their own choosing. The target of the drift (but not the future self) must then make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw, with effects identical to those for the eonic drifter witnessing the death of its future self (see Drift Backward). The future self doesn't reappear after using this ability the second time; only the target of the drift reappears from the second use. This does not trigger a saving throw for the present self.

1/day each: commune with nature, freedom of movement, nondetection, tree stride

2a9e25e3-3ff0-59f4-9140-997eb8b04f03.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or 10 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) slashing damage and the target must make a successful DC 13 Strength saving throw or either be disarmed or fall prone; the attacking far darrig chooses which effect occurs.

9fb50f2b-1c96-5cd4-b5b7-4b1f8459b74c.description: the fate eater's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:1/day each: blink, hallucinatory terrain

c0303a46-1661-500d-bd08-cbf5aadf185c.name: Visionary Flesh
c0303a46-1661-500d-bd08-cbf5aadf185c.description: Eating the flesh of a fate eater requires a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. If successful, the eater gains a divination spell. If failed, the victim vomits blood and fails the next saving throw made in combat.

9491e38a-f772-58b9-894e-41dce6584ef1.name: Bite (Fate Eater)
9491e38a-f772-58b9-894e-41dce6584ef1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (5d8 + 4) slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (5d8 + 4) slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) necrotic damage.

216250a7-bde5-5148-8477-78e77952c0f9.name: Spectral Bite
216250a7-bde5-5148-8477-78e77952c0f9.description: when a fate eater scores a critical hit against a target, it damages not only the creature but also the threads of its fate, changing the character's past or future. The target must roll 1d6 on the chart below for each critical hit that isn't negated by a successful DC 15 Charisma saving throw:1- Seeing the Alternates: Suffers the effects of the confusion spell for 1d4 rounds2- Untied from the Loom: Character's speed is randomized for four rounds. Roll 3d20 at the start of each of the character's turns to determine his or her speed in feet that turn3- Shifting Memories: Permanently loses 2 from a random skill and gains 2 in a random untrained skill4- Not So Fast: Loses the use of one class ability, chosen at random5- Lost Potential: Loses 1 point from one randomly chosen ability score6- Took the Lesser Path: The character's current hit point total becomes his or her hit point maximum effects 3-6 are permanent until the character makes a successful Charisma saving throw. The saving throw is repeated after every long rest, but the DC increases by 1 after every long rest, as the character becomes more entrenched in this new destiny. Otherwise, these new fates can be undone by nothing short of a wish spell or comparable magic.

Roll 3d20 at the start of each of the character's turns to determine his or her speed in feet that turn3- Shifting Memories: Permanently loses 2 from a random skill and gains 2 in a random untrained skill4- Not So Fast: Loses the use of one class ability, chosen at random5- Lost Potential: Loses 1 point from one randomly chosen ability score6- Took the Lesser Path: The character's current hit point total becomes his or her hit point maximum effects 3-6 are permanent until the character makes a successful Charisma saving throw. The saving throw is repeated after every long rest, but the DC increases by 1 after every long rest, as the character becomes more entrenched in this new destiny. Otherwise, these new fates can be undone by nothing short of a wish spell or comparable magic.

399a4912-d449-50a4-b3d2-8ac17e92ef10.name: Distortion Gaze
399a4912-d449-50a4-b3d2-8ac17e92ef10.description: Those who meet the gaze of the fear smith experience the world seeming to twist at unnatural angles beneath their feet. When a creature that can see the fear smith's eye starts its turn within 30 feet of the fear smith, the creature must make a successful DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or become disoriented. While disoriented, the creature falls prone each time it tries to move or take the Dash or Disengage action. To recover from disorientation, a creature must start its turn outside the fear smith's gaze and make a successful DC 16 Wisdom saving throw. To use this ability, the fear smith can't be incapacitated and must see the affected creature. A creature that isn't surprised can avert its eyes at the start of its turn to avoid the effect. In that case, no saving throw is necessary but the creature treats the fear smith as invisible until the start of the creature's next turn. If during its turn the creature chooses to look at the fear smith, it must immediately make the saving throw.

53f2e4df-6ff4-5458-9cba-59fa078aac72.name: Heartstopping Stare
53f2e4df-6ff4-5458-9cba-59fa078aac72.description: The fear smith terrifies a creature within 30 feet with a look. The target must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be stunned for 1 round and take 13 (3d8) psychic damage and heal the fear smith by an equal amount.

69acf442-0c09-5b41-bbb7-c6ad08b9dfdf.name: Expelled Spirit
69acf442-0c09-5b41-bbb7-c6ad08b9dfdf.description: While the fellforged body was made to bind spirits, the wraith within is vulnerable to turning attempts. Any successful turn attempt exorcises the wraith from its clockwork frame. The expelled wraith retains its current hp total and fights normally. The construct dies without an animating spirit.

a03f0eaa-9ee5-54e5-bdb7-483202e4b13e.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Fellforged)
a03f0eaa-9ee5-54e5-bdb7-483202e4b13e.description: While in sunlight, the fellforged has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

fb6365eb-32f7-5c19-8929-664761e219fa.name: Unnatural Aura (Fellforged)
fb6365eb-32f7-5c19-8929-664761e219fa.description: All animals, whether wild or domesticated, can sense the unnatural presence of fellforged at a distance of 30 feet. They do not willingly approach nearer than that and panic if forced to do so, and they remain panicked as long as they are within that range.

64a83127-3908-5515-b367-d344acca48f6.name: Necrotic Slam
64a83127-3908-5515-b367-d344acca48f6.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d8 + 2) bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the total damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.

This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.

41d94156-ad7b-58bf-b1ea-41f33ddf7af3.name: Violent Escapement
41d94156-ad7b-58bf-b1ea-41f33ddf7af3.description: With little regard for the clockwork bodies they inhabit, fellforged wraiths can stress and strain their mechanisms in such a violent manner that flywheels become unbalanced, gears shatter, and springs snap. As a bonus action, this violent burst of gears and pulleys deals 7 (2d6) piercing damage to all foes within 5 feet who fail a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw. Each use of this ability imposes a cumulative reduction in movement of 5 feet upon the fellforged. If its speed is reduced to 0 feet, the fellforged becomes paralyzed.

41dc8c6a-f637-5220-b5a7-d734e268af87.description: A fext is infused with a portion of their patron's power. They have an Armor Class equal to 10 + their Charisma modifier + their Dexterity modifier.

834d6558-d6ba-5aa3-bc1c-bfc41b624ba4.name: Contractibility and Conductivity
834d6558-d6ba-5aa3-bc1c-bfc41b624ba4.description:
certain spells and effects function differently against feyward trees:

a magical attack that deals cold damage slows a feyward tree (as the slow spell) for 3 rounds.

a magical attack that deals lightning damage breaks any slow effect on the feyward tree and heals 1 hit point for each 3 damage the attack would otherwise deal. If the amount of healing would cause the tree to exceed its full normal hp, it gains any excess as temporary hp. The tree gets no saving throw against lightning effects.

If the amount of healing would cause the tree to exceed its full normal hp, it gains any excess as temporary hp. The tree gets no saving throw against lightning effects.

2c4040a5-44a9-59c4-adfd-c682ae30c8e5.description: Creatures within 15 feet of a feyward tree provoke opportunity attacks even if they take the Disengage action before leaving its reach.

cb07481f-9140-5c4a-b2e5-f4fe35b4abc5.name: Flaying Leaves
cb07481f-9140-5c4a-b2e5-f4fe35b4abc5.description: The tree can launch a barrage of razor-sharp cold iron leaves from its branches in a 20-foot-radius burst. All creatures caught within this area must make a successful DC 16 Dexterity saving throw or take 21 (6d6) slashing damage, or half as much damage on a successful one.

6af0f982-7349-5fd9-9ed1-9dd7b068912b.name: Ever Touching
6af0f982-7349-5fd9-9ed1-9dd7b068912b.description: Fidele angels maintain awareness of their mate's disposition and health. Damage taken by one is split evenly between both, with the original target of the attack taking the extra point when damage doesn't divide evenly. Any other baneful effect, such as ability damage, affects both equally.

d8c11817-41cc-597f-9688-c2c659098edb.description:
the angel's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: guidance, light, purify food and drink, spare the dying

3/day: cure wounds, scorching ray (5 rays)

1/day: bless, daylight, detect evil and good, enhance ability, hallow, protection from evil and good

86f4623b-c4d7-5f3a-a7ea-1b395c401a44.name: Shapechange
86f4623b-c4d7-5f3a-a7ea-1b395c401a44.description: The angel can change between winged celestial form, its original mortal form, and that of a Medium-sized eagle. Its statistics are the same in each form, with the exception of its attacks in eagle form.

99e3be05-b4e0-5249-ae15-97ff1d830fdf.description: If separated from its mate, each fidele angel can use both plane shift and teleport 1/day to reunite.

cb6f0f60-d5af-5853-a7de-ba7aa6603737.name: Unshakeable Fidelity
cb6f0f60-d5af-5853-a7de-ba7aa6603737.description: Fidele angels are never voluntarily without their partners. No magical effect or power can cause a fidele angel to act against its mate, and no charm or domination effect can cause them to leave their side or to change their feelings of love and loyalty toward each other.

100e4601-49aa-5f49-b894-43660916ffc1.name: Fire Form
100e4601-49aa-5f49-b894-43660916ffc1.description: A creature that touches the swarm or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) fire damage. In addition, the first time the swarm enters a creature's space on a turn, that creature takes 5 (1d10) fire damage and catches fire; until someone uses an action to douse the fire, the creature takes 5 (1d10) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

In addition, the first time the swarm enters a creature's space on a turn, that creature takes 5 (1d10) fire damage and catches fire; until someone uses an action to douse the fire, the creature takes 5 (1d10) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

88f71bb0-f638-5fea-84c5-ef20a1362743.name: Illumination
88f71bb0-f638-5fea-84c5-ef20a1362743.description: The swarm sheds bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light to an additional 30 feet.

4a172215-4077-57df-9a2f-73cbf32375bb.name: Swarm (Fire Dancer Swarm)
4a172215-4077-57df-9a2f-73cbf32375bb.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

276f1979-d51b-52f7-82d3-685ee64b9455.name: Water Susceptibility
276f1979-d51b-52f7-82d3-685ee64b9455.description: For every 5 feet the swarm moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, it takes 1 cold damage.

701497d7-a185-5ea2-b6ad-47cbdde3ef13.name: Swarm (Fire Dancer Swarm)
701497d7-a185-5ea2-b6ad-47cbdde3ef13.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm's space. Hit: 21 (6d6) fire damage, or 10 (3d6) fire damage if the swarm has half or fewer hit points.

1920e670-6df8-5572-9505-875d98d066fd.name: Innate Spellcasting (Firebird)
1920e670-6df8-5572-9505-875d98d066fd.description:
the firebird's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: guidance, purify food and drink, speak with animals

3/day each: charm person, cure wounds (2d8 + 5), daylight, faerie fire, heat metal, hypnotic pattern, tongues

1/day each: geas, heal, reincarnate

7f47d797-89cc-5b20-895a-97ceadef077d.name: Light of the World
7f47d797-89cc-5b20-895a-97ceadef077d.description: The firebird's feathers glow with a warm light. The creature sheds light as dim as a candle or as bright as a lantern. It always sheds light, and any feathers plucked from the creature continue to shed light as a torch.

attributes.description: The firebird's feathers glow with a warm light. The creature sheds light as dim as a candle or as bright as a lantern. It always sheds light, and any feathers plucked from the creature continue to shed light as a torch.

a680df3a-b9af-593a-b8ed-e9f24cfffb34.name: Warming Presence
a680df3a-b9af-593a-b8ed-e9f24cfffb34.description: The firebird and any creatures within a 5-foot radius are immune to the effects of natural, environmental cold. Invited into a home or building, a firebird can expand this warming presence to its inhabitants no matter how close they are to the creature.

e3ebdbac-ce79-51f8-b681-7e3204582453.name: Bite (Firebird)
e3ebdbac-ce79-51f8-b681-7e3204582453.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage.

2904f703-3eee-5a5f-8a9b-31970bcbe243.name: Blinding Ray
2904f703-3eee-5a5f-8a9b-31970bcbe243.description: The firebird can fire a burning ray of light from its tail feathers in a line 5 feet wide and up to 50 feet long. Targets in the line must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 24 (7d6) fire damage and become blinded for 1d4 rounds. A successful saving throw negates the blindness and reduces the damage by half.

a94b4362-7ef1-5b78-85ce-c39a8d96cfd4.name: Claw (Firebird)

009fef77-54d3-5125-94ed-0f9b584fae98.name: Multiattack (Firebird)
009fef77-54d3-5125-94ed-0f9b584fae98.description: The firebird makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

c1775bd4-4cd8-5347-8edf-eb9b610da797.name: Hide By Firelight
c1775bd4-4cd8-5347-8edf-eb9b610da797.description: In an area lit only by nonmagical flame, a Firegeist gains a +2 bonus on Stealth checks. This becomes +4 when hiding within the fire.

attributes.description: In an area lit only by nonmagical flame, a Firegeist gains a +2 bonus on Stealth checks. This becomes +4 when hiding within the fire.

cb57f029-bba2-55a0-a694-d508f69cee23.name: Illumination (Firegeist)
cb57f029-bba2-55a0-a694-d508f69cee23.description: The firegeist sheds dim light in a 30-foot radius.

attributes.description: The firegeist sheds dim light in a 30-foot radius.

820d2619-dfa9-555c-ad27-023a2c3e30da.name: Magical Light Sensitivity
820d2619-dfa9-555c-ad27-023a2c3e30da.description: While in magical light, the firegeist has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

attributes.description: While in magical light, the firegeist has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

c4218654-014d-506e-ba82-3948a98e9fa4.name: Water Susceptibility (Firegeist)
c4218654-014d-506e-ba82-3948a98e9fa4.description: For every 5 feet the firegeist moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, it takes 3 cold damage.

c9779f0f-0c8d-5b3c-83bd-54515f9d5f7b.name: Combustion Touch
c9779f0f-0c8d-5b3c-83bd-54515f9d5f7b.description: The firegeist may ignite a target when making a slam attack. The target must immediately succeed at a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or catch fire, taking an additional 5 (1d10) fire damage at the beginning of its next turn. Until someone takes an action to douse the fire, the creature takes 5 (1d10) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

2187e031-3903-59ae-b860-4a8fc9454a86.name: Multiattack (Firegeist)
2187e031-3903-59ae-b860-4a8fc9454a86.description: The firegeist makes two slam attacks.

5ca807ac-73ab-5cc7-b49e-24285c8ea328.name: Slam (Firegeist)
5ca807ac-73ab-5cc7-b49e-24285c8ea328.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

e8abdb85-0643-57f0-9cbf-59279ea5f8af.name: Massive (Flab Giant)
e8abdb85-0643-57f0-9cbf-59279ea5f8af.description: A flab giant can't dash. Attacks that push, trip, or grapple are made with disadvantage against a flab giant.

attributes.description: A flab giant can't dash. Attacks that push, trip, or grapple are made with disadvantage against a flab giant.

2e15050e-2e5c-5047-a70a-f060b457d249.name: Multiattack (Flab Giant)
2e15050e-2e5c-5047-a70a-f060b457d249.description: The giant makes two slam attacks. If both hit, the target is grappled (escape DC 15), and the flab giant uses its squatting pin against the target as a bonus action.

2ecd7978-d727-5963-9cb6-395c552e267c.name: Slam (Flab Giant)
2ecd7978-d727-5963-9cb6-395c552e267c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

162e2d08-6ac2-5b54-91fd-1ade91667751.name: Squatting Pin
162e2d08-6ac2-5b54-91fd-1ade91667751.description: The flab giant squats atop the target, pinning it to the ground, where it is grappled and restrained (escape DC 17). The flab giant is free to attack another target, but the restrained creatures are released if it moves from its current space. As long as the giant does not move from the spot, it can maintain the squatting pin on up to two Medium-sized or smaller creatures. A creature suffers 9 (1d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage every time it starts its turn restrained by a squatting pin.

4b8b23cb-f275-58fb-b952-8d8edc688e35.name: Bite (Flame Dragon Wyrmling)
4b8b23cb-f275-58fb-b952-8d8edc688e35.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d10 + 1) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.

eb239eed-7ca7-54f9-a799-f507e404e3e8.name: Fire Breath (Flame Dragon Wyrmling)
eb239eed-7ca7-54f9-a799-f507e404e3e8.description: The dragon exhales fire in a 10-foot cone. Each creature in that area takes 24 (7d6) fire damage, or half damage with a successful DC 12 Dexterity saving throw.

attributes.description: The dragon exhales fire in a 10-foot cone. Each creature in that area takes 24 (7d6) fire damage, or half damage with a successful DC 12 Dexterity saving throw.

4571810e-b702-5730-922c-d5ba4820630f.name: Creeping Death
4571810e-b702-5730-922c-d5ba4820630f.description: A creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the flutterflesh must make a successful DC 15 Constitution saving throw or take 14 (4d6) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: A creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the flutterflesh must make a successful DC 15 Constitution saving throw or take 14 (4d6) necrotic damage.
The flutterflesh's attacks are magical.

e13d6bf6-630d-5f3b-b4c3-eb74c24584bb.name: Regeneration (Flutterflesh)
e13d6bf6-630d-5f3b-b4c3-eb74c24584bb.description: The flutterflesh regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn. If the flutterflesh takes radiant or fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn. The flutterflesh dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.

be06feb6-623a-5265-aec7-62d683f9e8c8.name: Turn Resistance
be06feb6-623a-5265-aec7-62d683f9e8c8.description: The flutterflesh has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

attributes.description: The flutterflesh has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

b6496e71-a9f4-5679-a039-a34ece88f444.name: Bone Spur
b6496e71-a9f4-5679-a039-a34ece88f444.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d12 + 4) slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) necrotic damage. If both attacks hit a single creature in the same turn, it is grappled (escape DC 10). As a bonus action, the flutterflesh can choose whether this attack does bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage.

5b5b8a64-4845-5293-a6cf-e8bba43baa6b.name: Multiattack (Flutterflesh)
5b5b8a64-4845-5293-a6cf-e8bba43baa6b.description: The flutterflesh makes two bone spur attacks or two tormenting gaze attacks.

86fc8eb0-316e-5546-9a8d-f40510f3e2e3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage. On a critical hit, the target takes an additional 27 (5d10) slashing damage and must make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the flutterflesh lops off and absorbs one of the target's limbs (chosen randomly) and heals hit points equal to the additional slashing damage it inflicted.

e6541431-a0be-5e68-894a-a419427c8eaa.name: Tormenting Gaze
e6541431-a0be-5e68-894a-a419427c8eaa.description: A target creature within 120 feet and able to see the flutterflesh takes 18 (4d8) psychic damage and is paralyzed for 1d4 rounds, or takes half damage and isn't paralyzed with a successful DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. Tormenting gaze can't be used against the same target twice in a single turn.

f78491fe-c81b-5810-aa19-c233d4f73075.description:
the folk of Leng's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 16). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: comprehend languages, minor illusion

3/day each: disguise self, suggestion

1/day each: dream, etherealness

63c3e1c1-b2db-5be0-9f12-cdf1735a08bd.description: The folk of Leng regains 5 hit points at the start of its turn. The folk of Leng dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and does not regenerate. Even if slain, their bodies reform in a crypt of Leng and go on about their business.

aa6c7bcf-88b4-5fd2-82c2-ae873414ad55.description: The folk of Leng can see through doors and around corners as a bonus action. As a result, they are very rarely surprised.

In addition, armor has no effect against the attack roll of an etheric harpoon; only the Dexterity modifier factored into the target's AC is considered.

04020c35-f513-5389-a2bc-37520fea6afc.description: The frostveil's frozen acidic mist breaks down flesh and organic materials into useable nutrients. Creatures who strike the frostveil with a non-reach melee weapon or an unarmed strike take 4 (1d8) acid damage.

251b4f24-bbf6-50cc-a2f8-29c5af33a295.name: Windborne
251b4f24-bbf6-50cc-a2f8-29c5af33a295.description: While in blowing wind, the frostveil can fly with a speed of 30 feet. In a strong wind this speed increases to 60 feet.

attributes.description: While in blowing wind, the frostveil can fly with a speed of 30 feet. In a strong wind this speed increases to 60 feet.

4e39954e-5686-5ce4-883e-8f6cb4e625f3.name: Engulf (Frostveil)
4e39954e-5686-5ce4-883e-8f6cb4e625f3.description: When a frostveil wraps itself around a Medium or smaller creature, the target takes 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 13 (3d8) acid damage and is grappled (escape DC 15). The target takes another 9 (2d8) bludgeoning damage plus 13 (3d8) acid damage at the end of each of its turns when it's still grappled by the frostveil. A frostveil can't attack while it has a creature engulfed. Damage from attacks against the frostveil is split evenly between the frostveil and the engulfed creature; the only exceptions are slashing and psychic damage, which affect only the frostveil.
