A creature in the area of the whirlwind when it's created, or who enters the area for the first time on a turn, must make a DC 15 Strength saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is restrained and takes 18 (4d8) bludgeoning damage from the buffeting wind. A restrained creature can escape from the whirlwind by using its action to repeat the saving throw; on a success, it moves 5 feet outside the area of the whirlwind. The whirlwind lasts until Koschei uses this action again or dies.

- Tortured spirits appear and attack up to three creatures Koschei can see within the lair. One attack is made against each targeted creature; each attack has +8 to hit and does 10 (3d6) necrotic damage.

Until initiative count 20 on the following round, any creature other than a fiend who targets Koschei with a spell must make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the creature still casts the spell, but it must target a creature other than Koschei.

428ccb65-7148-56b6-91c8-e002551d59a8.name: Legendary Resistance (3/day) (Koschei)
428ccb65-7148-56b6-91c8-e002551d59a8.description: If Koschei fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

c698d623-4753-50b2-80a9-3134ef1868e1.description: Koschei's weapon attacks are magical and do an extra 14 (4d6) necrotic damage (included below).

5d65df66-47ac-55a0-bf47-61c6b6634c32.name: Regional Effects (Koschei)
5d65df66-47ac-55a0-bf47-61c6b6634c32.description:
the region containing Koschei's lair is warped by Koschei's magic, which creates one or more of the following effects:

- Rabbits, ducks, and other game animals become hostile toward intruders within 5 miles of the lair. They behave aggressively, but only attack if cornered. Foraging for food by hunting is difficult and only yields half the normal amount of food.

- Wind and snowstorms are common within 5 miles of the lair.

- Koschei is aware of any spell cast within 5 miles of his lair. He knows the source of the magic (innate, the caster's class, or a magic item) and knows the direction to the caster.

if Koschei dies, conditions in the area surrounding his lair return to normal over the course of 1d10 days.

828dae16-5df7-56e0-87af-7afb89603aae.description: Melee Spell Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (4d6 + 6) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 19 Constitution saving throw or its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken from this attack, and Koschei regains an equal number of hit points. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.

92fc6d53-2dfc-5a10-be1a-9c17a141470c.description: Koschei teleports to an unoccupied space he can see within 40 feet.

f97cfcb3-11bf-5e5a-b763-a191dd12a2cb.name: Folk Cure
f97cfcb3-11bf-5e5a-b763-a191dd12a2cb.description: A kot bayun's tales have the effect of a lesser restoration spell at will, and once per week it can have the effect of greater restoration. The kot bayun designates one listener to benefit from its ability, and that listener must spend one uninterrupted hour listening to the cat's tales. Kot bayuns are reluctant to share this benefit and must be bargained with or under the effect of domination to grant the boon.

f76bad62-41cc-5745-98ad-5b6bbcbfe0ee.name: Slumbering Song
f76bad62-41cc-5745-98ad-5b6bbcbfe0ee.description: The kot bayun puts creatures to sleep with its haunting melody. While a kot bayun sings, it can target one hearing creature within a 100-foot radius. This target must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw or fall asleep. The target repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. Each round the kot bayun maintains its song, it can select a new target. A creature that successfully saves is immune to the effect of that kot bayun's song for 24 hours. The slumbering song even affects elves, but they have advantage on the Charisma saving throw.

6e209926-f7a8-504f-9031-6c4fe0a4957b.description: While underwater, the krake spawn can take the withdraw action to jet backward at a speed of 140 feet. It must move in a straight line while using this ability.

a28d97cb-f657-5630-9f88-a7dfe7bc2b91.description: The constricted creature takes 26 (3d12 + 7) bludgeoning damage and is grappled (escape DC 17) and restrained.

82e657f6-0dbe-5276-94e4-c52bb46c37fd.description: The krake spawn emits black, venomous ink in a 30-foot cloud as a bonus action while underwater. The cloud affects vision as the darkness spell, and any creature that starts its turn inside the cloud takes 10 (3d6) poison damage, or half damage with a successful DC 18 Constitution saving throw. The krake spawn's darkvision is not impaired by this cloud. The cloud persists for 1 minute, then disperses.

e6b9f3c6-0bc7-5b03-b69e-30ef4e133171.name: Regeneration (Lake Troll)
e6b9f3c6-0bc7-5b03-b69e-30ef4e133171.description: The lake troll regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn. If the lake troll takes cold or fire damage, it regains only 5 hit points at the start of its next turn; if it takes both cold and fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the lake troll's next turn. The lake troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.

attributes.description: The lake troll makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

ae6fcd89-982b-5e0f-958e-c4b483697e1f.name: Innate Spellcasting (Lantern Dragonette)
ae6fcd89-982b-5e0f-958e-c4b483697e1f.description:
the lantern dragonette's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

1/day each: burning hands, color spray, scorching ray

attributes.description:
the lantern dragonette's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

1/day each: burning hands, color spray, scorching ray

8c78b21e-52b3-5b5d-8c6d-8b3c3fa52c0c.name: Lantern Belly (1/Day)
8c78b21e-52b3-5b5d-8c6d-8b3c3fa52c0c.description: If the dragonette has eaten 8 ounces of candle wax in the last 24 hours, it can emit a continual flame for 3d20 minutes. The continual flame can be dispelled, but the dragonette can resume it with a bonus action except in areas of magical darkness, if the time limit hasn't expired.

attributes.description: If the dragonette has eaten 8 ounces of candle wax in the last 24 hours, it can emit a continual flame for 3d20 minutes. The continual flame can be dispelled, but the dragonette can resume it with a bonus action except in areas of magical darkness, if the time limit hasn't expired.

4139af63-1b70-559d-ab10-5c1463f2d578.name: Vulnerable to Magical Darkness
4139af63-1b70-559d-ab10-5c1463f2d578.description: A lantern dragonette in an area of magical darkness loses its lantern belly ability and its ability to fly. It also suffers 1d6 radiant damage for every minute of exposure.

attributes.description: A lantern dragonette in an area of magical darkness loses its lantern belly ability and its ability to fly. It also suffers 1d6 radiant damage for every minute of exposure.

15385dd5-9e40-54e9-8611-905ba73dd882.name: Bite (Lantern Dragonette)
15385dd5-9e40-54e9-8611-905ba73dd882.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) piercing damage.

d8856bd2-f7d8-52cb-9cf6-77078a6492c3.name: Silent Glide
d8856bd2-f7d8-52cb-9cf6-77078a6492c3.description: The lemurfolk can glide for 1 minute, making almost no sound. It gains a fly speed of 40 feet, and it must move at least 20 feet on its turn to keep flying. A gliding lemurfolk has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

attributes.description: The lemurfolk can glide for 1 minute, making almost no sound. It gains a fly speed of 40 feet, and it must move at least 20 feet on its turn to keep flying. A gliding lemurfolk has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

28a5de7a-7de2-5319-83b3-e6c54bbc92d0.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn) (Lemurfolk)
28a5de7a-7de2-5319-83b3-e6c54bbc92d0.description: The lemurfolk deals an extra 3 (1d6) damage when it hits with a weapon attack and it has advantage, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of the lemurfolk that isn't incapacitated and the lemurfolk doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

attributes.description: The lemurfolk deals an extra 3 (1d6) damage when it hits with a weapon attack and it has advantage, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of the lemurfolk that isn't incapacitated and the lemurfolk doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

afb91fa8-1b33-5c2b-bef9-2c6591a953d2.name: Blowgun
afb91fa8-1b33-5c2b-bef9-2c6591a953d2.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 25/100 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned and unconscious for 1d4 hours. Another creature can use an action to shake the target awake and end its unconsciousness but not the poisoning.

b101d0e8-b12c-5fc8-b724-4e1cb546ab66.name: Kukri Dagger
b101d0e8-b12c-5fc8-b724-4e1cb546ab66.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., 20/60 range, one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., 20/60 range, one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

77f31951-f265-5bde-9bae-33fde0cb429c.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn) (Lemurfolk Greyfur)
77f31951-f265-5bde-9bae-33fde0cb429c.description: The greyfur deals an extra 7 (2d6) damage when it hits with a weapon attack and it has advantage, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of the greyfur that isn't incapacitated and the greyfur doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

attributes.description: The greyfur deals an extra 7 (2d6) damage when it hits with a weapon attack and it has advantage, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of the greyfur that isn't incapacitated and the greyfur doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

eee51251-e43b-525e-bd7d-65effdfd39d9.name: Spellcasting (Lemurfolk Greyfur)
eee51251-e43b-525e-bd7d-65effdfd39d9.description:
the greyfur is a 5th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). The greyfur has the following wizard spells prepared:

- **Cantrips (at will)**: light, mage hand, minor illusion, poison spray, resistance
- **1st Level** (4 slots): mage armor, sleep
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): detect thoughts, misty step
- **3rd Level** (2 slots): lightning bolt

1fcd7eef-b594-5cf0-bdb8-d9565b2a9342.name: Camouflage (Leshy)
1fcd7eef-b594-5cf0-bdb8-d9565b2a9342.description: A leshy has advantage on Stealth checks if it is at least lightly obscured by foliage.

attributes.description: A leshy has advantage on Stealth checks if it is at least lightly obscured by foliage.

13ad7cde-d3c0-5e2e-a797-57c82d58482b.name: Innate Spellcasting (Leshy)
13ad7cde-d3c0-5e2e-a797-57c82d58482b.description:
the leshy's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: animal friendship, pass without trace, speak with animals

1/day each: entangle, plant growth, shillelagh, speak with plants, hideous laughter

attributes.description:
the leshy's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: animal friendship, pass without trace, speak with animals

1/day each: entangle, plant growth, shillelagh, speak with plants, hideous laughter

e97674c9-92af-5466-9107-433030b75862.name: Mimicry
e97674c9-92af-5466-9107-433030b75862.description: A leshy can mimic the calls and voices of any creature it has heard. To use this ability, the leshy makes a Charisma (Deception) check. Listeners who succeed on an opposed Wisdom (Insight) or Intelligence (Nature)-DM's choice-realize that something is mimicking the sound. The leshy has advantage on the check if it's mimicking a general type of creature (a crow's call, a bear's roar) and not a specific individual's voice.

attributes.description: A leshy can mimic the calls and voices of any creature it has heard. To use this ability, the leshy makes a Charisma (Deception) check. Listeners who succeed on an opposed Wisdom (Insight) or Intelligence (Nature)-DM's choice-realize that something is mimicking the sound. The leshy has advantage on the check if it's mimicking a general type of creature (a crow's call, a bear's roar) and not a specific individual's voice.

35224989-801e-594e-8900-6063e4606fbb.name: Change Size
35224989-801e-594e-8900-6063e4606fbb.description: The leshy appears to change its size, becoming as tall as a massive oak (Gargantuan) or as short as a blade of grass (Tiny). The change is entirely illusory, so the leshy's statistics do not change.

attributes.description: The leshy appears to change its size, becoming as tall as a massive oak (Gargantuan) or as short as a blade of grass (Tiny). The change is entirely illusory, so the leshy's statistics do not change.

2b004df5-becc-5a93-9366-4b763b413c73.name: Multiattack (Leshy)
2b004df5-becc-5a93-9366-4b763b413c73.description: The leshy makes two club attacks.

attributes.description: The leshy makes two club attacks.

b440db56-f156-5d61-aea8-3386f9b6f496.name: Extra-Dimensional Book Repository
b440db56-f156-5d61-aea8-3386f9b6f496.description: A small door on the chest of the library automaton opens into an extra-dimensional bookcase. This bookcase functions exactly as a bag of holding except that it can store only written materials such as books, scrolls, tomes, parchment, folders, notebooks, spellbooks, and the like.

attributes.description: A small door on the chest of the library automaton opens into an extra-dimensional bookcase. This bookcase functions exactly as a bag of holding except that it can store only written materials such as books, scrolls, tomes, parchment, folders, notebooks, spellbooks, and the like.

7b5b74f3-d732-53a3-97c3-aaf615a76585.name: Bibliotelekinesis
7b5b74f3-d732-53a3-97c3-aaf615a76585.description: This ability functions as the cantrip mage hand but can be used only on books, scrolls, maps, and other printed or written materials.

attributes.description: This ability functions as the cantrip mage hand but can be used only on books, scrolls, maps, and other printed or written materials.

8f489689-ae39-5dfe-9b77-3dabd9f80f02.name: Gaze of Confusion
8f489689-ae39-5dfe-9b77-3dabd9f80f02.description: The library automaton chooses one creature it can see within 40 feet. The target must succeed on a DC 12 Intelligence saving throw or take 9 (3d4 + 2) psychic damage and have disadvantage on Intelligence-based checks, saving throws, and attacks until the end of its next turn. If the saving throw succeeds, then the target takes half damage and suffers no other effect.

If the saving throw succeeds, then the target takes half damage and suffers no other effect.

c44b0997-5abe-525a-823c-c87d2e6073ab.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
c44b0997-5abe-525a-823c-c87d2e6073ab.description: The lich hound has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

attributes.description: The lich hound has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

3d1972ab-3065-50a5-8360-3d2bd4c85c93.name: Bite (Lich Hound)
3d1972ab-3065-50a5-8360-3d2bd4c85c93.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d12 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d12 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

ee6a536f-74fc-5adb-b2cc-25285471a715.name: Ethereal Jaunt
ee6a536f-74fc-5adb-b2cc-25285471a715.description: As a bonus action, the lich hound can magically shift from the Material Plane to the Ethereal Plane, or vice versa.

attributes.description: As a bonus action, the lich hound can magically shift from the Material Plane to the Ethereal Plane, or vice versa.

b0bb4bb3-324c-5f15-98e3-9d918d187956.name: Gut Rip
b0bb4bb3-324c-5f15-98e3-9d918d187956.description: As a bonus action, the lich hound tears into any adjacent prone creature, inflicting 19 (3d12) slashing damage. The target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be incapacitated for 1d4 rounds. An incapacitated creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns; a successful save ends the condition early.

attributes.description: As a bonus action, the lich hound tears into any adjacent prone creature, inflicting 19 (3d12) slashing damage. The target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be incapacitated for 1d4 rounds. An incapacitated creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns; a successful save ends the condition early.

c2c620ac-4253-53a3-8a6b-e83d260253e1.name: Howl
c2c620ac-4253-53a3-8a6b-e83d260253e1.description: The eerie howl of lich hounds as they close in on their prey plays havoc on the morale of living creatures that hear it. Howling requires and action, and creatures that hear the howl of a lich hound within 100 feet must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 5 rounds. Creatures that successfully save against this effect cannot be affected by a lich hound's howl for 24 hours.

Creatures that successfully save against this effect cannot be affected by a lich hound's howl for 24 hours.

c938e9e9-5e1e-553b-88e1-de320309641a.name: Innate Spellcasting (Likho)
c938e9e9-5e1e-553b-88e1-de320309641a.description:
the likho's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 16). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: message

3/day each: crown of madness, mirror image, ray of enfeeblement

1/day: bestow curse

the likho's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 16). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

70fc08e9-1952-5d54-97aa-d99b2078973c.name: Magic Resistance (Likho)
70fc08e9-1952-5d54-97aa-d99b2078973c.description: The likho has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The likho has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

1608c454-7806-510a-8e33-66d5fa916a12.name: Pounce
1608c454-7806-510a-8e33-66d5fa916a12.description: If the likho moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the likho can use a bonus action to make two additional claw attacks against it.

d38ff5c8-91ff-59f3-89e6-16587cc5e1f4.name: Claw (Likho)
d38ff5c8-91ff-59f3-89e6-16587cc5e1f4.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage.

9b69579c-ec41-54dd-9403-836b735ae23c.name: Disruptive Gaze
9b69579c-ec41-54dd-9403-836b735ae23c.description: As a bonus action, the likho directs its gaze at any single creature it can see and afflicts it with a temporary bout of bad luck. The targeted creature has disadvantage on attack rolls, saving throws, and skill checks until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: As a bonus action, the likho directs its gaze at any single creature it can see and afflicts it with a temporary bout of bad luck. The targeted creature has disadvantage on attack rolls, saving throws, and skill checks until the end of its next turn.

fb4da00c-97a7-5c56-b88f-d1af0a4e50a6.name: Multiattack (Likho)
fb4da00c-97a7-5c56-b88f-d1af0a4e50a6.description: The likho makes two claw attacks.

attributes.description: The likho makes two claw attacks.

e560dc9d-d0df-580e-93e3-231463b8c7fb.name: Lindwurm Fever
e560dc9d-d0df-580e-93e3-231463b8c7fb.description: A creature infected with this disease by a lindwurm's bite gains one level of exhaustion an hour after being infected. The creature must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw after each long rest. On a failure, the creature gains one level of exhaustion and recovers no hit dice from the long rest. On a success, the creature recovers from one level of exhaustion and regains hit dice normally. If the infected creature reduces itself to zero exhaustion by making successful saving throws, the disease is cured.

The creature must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw after each long rest. On a failure, the creature gains one level of exhaustion and recovers no hit dice from the long rest. On a success, the creature recovers from one level of exhaustion and regains hit dice normally. If the infected creature reduces itself to zero exhaustion by making successful saving throws, the disease is cured.

e9564423-ce04-5930-8471-827350f48853.name: Skittering Skater
e9564423-ce04-5930-8471-827350f48853.description: Lindwurms suffer no penalties from difficult terrain on ice and are immune to the effects of the grease spell.

attributes.description: Lindwurms suffer no penalties from difficult terrain on ice and are immune to the effects of the grease spell.

c77012c5-f6b5-5446-9ee6-9ae730f8702f.name: Snake Belly
c77012c5-f6b5-5446-9ee6-9ae730f8702f.description: When lying with its sensitive stomach on the ice, a lindwurm can sense approaching creatures by the vibrations they cause, granting them tremorsense.

attributes.description: When lying with its sensitive stomach on the ice, a lindwurm can sense approaching creatures by the vibrations they cause, granting them tremorsense.

c316fe40-5fc9-556b-9687-d31ded4a7f99.name: Bite (Lindwurm)
c316fe40-5fc9-556b-9687-d31ded4a7f99.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or contract lindwurm fever.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or contract lindwurm fever.

03974009-a9f0-598a-971d-56dd45b55ab0.name: Claws (Lindwurm)
03974009-a9f0-598a-971d-56dd45b55ab0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d8 + 4) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d8 + 4) slashing damage.

60561866-4541-5658-8c3d-6d63043f4708.name: Constrict (Lindwurm)
60561866-4541-5658-8c3d-6d63043f4708.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the lindwurm can constrict only this target.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the lindwurm can constrict only this target.

7fb31924-d02c-5d36-94d6-422542483226.name: Multiattack (Lindwurm)
7fb31924-d02c-5d36-94d6-422542483226.description: The lindwurm makes one bite attack, one claw attack, and one constrict attack.

attributes.description: The lindwurm makes one bite attack, one claw attack, and one constrict attack.

6c6d564e-2264-5746-9fd9-815882a6724a.name: Alien Mentality
6c6d564e-2264-5746-9fd9-815882a6724a.description: A liosalfar's exotic consciousness renders it immune to psychic effects, and any attempt to read their thoughts leaves the reader confused for 1 round.

attributes.description: A liosalfar's exotic consciousness renders it immune to psychic effects, and any attempt to read their thoughts leaves the reader confused for 1 round.

856b980d-3e3c-5c8f-afdc-c81e2e254d35.name: Darkness Vulnerability
856b980d-3e3c-5c8f-afdc-c81e2e254d35.description: Magical darkness is harmful to a liosalfar: They take 2d10 necrotic damage, or half damage with a successful DC 14 Constitution saving throw, each time they start their turn inside magical darkness. Natural darkness is unpleasant to them but not harmful.

attributes.description: Magical darkness is harmful to a liosalfar: They take 2d10 necrotic damage, or half damage with a successful DC 14 Constitution saving throw, each time they start their turn inside magical darkness. Natural darkness is unpleasant to them but not harmful.

ca56e886-6585-544b-9053-2645cdb22cc4.name: Incorporeal Movement (Liosalfar)
ca56e886-6585-544b-9053-2645cdb22cc4.description: The liosalfar can move through other creatures and objects as difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attributes.description: The liosalfar can move through other creatures and objects as difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

105a735f-614d-5995-ad4e-ffcf54a35ce0.name: Innate Spellcasting (Liosalfar)
105a735f-614d-5995-ad4e-ffcf54a35ce0.description:
the liosalfar's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at Will: augury, color spray, dancing lights, detect magic, flare, light, silent image, spare the dying

2/day each: alter self, blur, divination, hypnotic pattern, prismatic spray, scorching ray

1/day each: hallucinatory terrain, plane shift, sunbeam

the liosalfar's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at Will: augury, color spray, dancing lights, detect magic, flare, light, silent image, spare the dying

2/day each: alter self, blur, divination, hypnotic pattern, prismatic spray, scorching ray

7a28a64b-e81e-52e3-a077-6e7f519fbe90.name: Lightform
7a28a64b-e81e-52e3-a077-6e7f519fbe90.description: Liosalfar are composed entirely of light. They are incorporeal and not subject to ability damage, polymorph, petrification, or attacks that alter their form.

attributes.description: Liosalfar are composed entirely of light. They are incorporeal and not subject to ability damage, polymorph, petrification, or attacks that alter their form.

b47f42db-111f-5ecf-a073-e0a2dbb30139.name: Prismatic Glow
b47f42db-111f-5ecf-a073-e0a2dbb30139.description: Liosalfar shed rainbow illumination equal to a daylight spell. They cannot extinguish this glow without perishing but can reduce it to the level of torchlight at will. Even when using alter self they have a faint, diffused glow that's visible in dim light or darkness.

attributes.description: Liosalfar shed rainbow illumination equal to a daylight spell. They cannot extinguish this glow without perishing but can reduce it to the level of torchlight at will. Even when using alter self they have a faint, diffused glow that's visible in dim light or darkness.

c4fbbf59-e68e-5f3e-be8f-91c3146d98dc.name: Disrupting Touch
c4fbbf59-e68e-5f3e-be8f-91c3146d98dc.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (4d12) radiant damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or become stunned for 1 round.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (4d12) radiant damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or become stunned for 1 round.

3eeca320-1fb4-5674-a3fc-6dc7fadf384e.name: Multiattack (Liosalfar)
3eeca320-1fb4-5674-a3fc-6dc7fadf384e.description: The liosalfar makes two Disrupting Touch attacks.

attributes.description: The liosalfar makes two Disrupting Touch attacks.

830b49dc-7a40-5a15-b630-c89d509f9b4a.name: Controlled
830b49dc-7a40-5a15-b630-c89d509f9b4a.description: Living wicks cannot move, attack, or perform actions when they are not lit. Living wicks only respond to the telepathic commands of the individual that lit them.

attributes.description: Living wicks cannot move, attack, or perform actions when they are not lit. Living wicks only respond to the telepathic commands of the individual that lit them.

b4732401-205c-5dc6-b7b4-c20d193cf298.name: Light
b4732401-205c-5dc6-b7b4-c20d193cf298.description: Activated living wicks produce light as a torch.

attributes.description: Activated living wicks produce light as a torch.

4f144db0-3738-56f4-a111-0a138b0d4b9f.name: Melting
4f144db0-3738-56f4-a111-0a138b0d4b9f.description: A living wick loses one hit point for every 24 hours it remains lit.

attributes.description: A living wick loses one hit point for every 24 hours it remains lit.

2be46d76-dc8b-5fdf-937b-b21764ef8f6c.name: Consume Self
2be46d76-dc8b-5fdf-937b-b21764ef8f6c.description: A living wick can be commanded to rapidly burn through the remains of its wick, creating a devastating fireball. All creatures within 20 feet of the living wick take 7 (2d6) fire damage, or half damage with a successful DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. The fire spreads around corners and ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried. The wick is reduced to a lifeless puddle of wax.

The fire spreads around corners and ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried. The wick is reduced to a lifeless puddle of wax.

8b924fc3-9dff-5ef6-9c0e-ecf18da92303.name: Slam (Living Wick)
8b924fc3-9dff-5ef6-9c0e-ecf18da92303.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage.

8f4c6020-8270-51d4-9c26-8f6d043012b3.name: Alluring Presence
8f4c6020-8270-51d4-9c26-8f6d043012b3.description: All humanoids within 30 feet of a lorelei who look directly at her must succeed on a DC 17 Charisma saving throw or be drawn to her in the most direct path, regardless of the danger. This compulsion fades once the person gets within 5 feet of the lorelei. A creature can avoid this effect for one full round by choosing to avert its eyes at the start of its turn, but it then has disadvantage on any attacks or other rolls directed against the lorelei until the start of its next turn. A lorelei can suppress or resume this ability as a bonus action. Anyone who successfully saves against this effect cannot be affected by it from the same lorelei for 24 hours.

A lorelei can suppress or resume this ability as a bonus action. Anyone who successfully saves against this effect cannot be affected by it from the same lorelei for 24 hours.

7bafb711-9e4f-5e97-a7e4-39c254a4b0bf.name: Spellcasting (Lorelei)
7bafb711-9e4f-5e97-a7e4-39c254a4b0bf.description:
the lorelei is an 8th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks). She requires no material components to cast her spells. The lorelei has the following sorcerer spells prepared:

- **Cantrips (at will)**: detect magic, guidance, light, mending, poison spray, prestidigitation
- **1st Level** (4 slots): comprehend languages, fog cloud, mage armor, ray of sickness
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): hold person, misty step, suggestion
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): hypnotic pattern, gaseous form, water walk
- **4th Level** (2 slots): dominate beast, ice storm

f4a623ce-30ee-5331-a5db-9c08e33b2641.name: Unearthly Grace (Lorelei)
f4a623ce-30ee-5331-a5db-9c08e33b2641.description: A lorelei applies her Charisma modifier to all of her saving throws in place of the normal ability modifier.

attributes.description: A lorelei applies her Charisma modifier to all of her saving throws in place of the normal ability modifier.

91266c25-41cc-5d2d-a74a-2b02e6fc723f.name: Water Spirit
91266c25-41cc-5d2d-a74a-2b02e6fc723f.description: The lorelei is under the effect of freedom of movement whenever she is in contact with a body of water.

attributes.description: The lorelei is under the effect of freedom of movement whenever she is in contact with a body of water.

a4ebfb09-fc02-571c-b6bb-d582266203cf.name: Charm
a4ebfb09-fc02-571c-b6bb-d582266203cf.description: The lorelei targets one humanoid she can see within 30 feet of her. If the target can see or hear the lorelei, it must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw against this magic or be charmed by the lorelei. The charmed target regards the lorelei as its one, true love, to be heeded and protected. Although the target isn't under the lorelei's control, it takes the lorelei's requests or actions in the most favorable way it can. Each time the lorelei or her companions cause the target to take damage, directly or indirectly, it repeats the saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success. Otherwise, the effect lasts 24 hours or until the lorelei is killed, is on a different plane of existence than the target, or takes a bonus action to end the effect.

368eb935-85e9-5560-b2f8-2d0f531fef63.name: Dagger (Lorelei)
368eb935-85e9-5560-b2f8-2d0f531fef63.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d4 + 5) piercing damage.

37df51ba-f719-5c6c-9cc6-59a3b56d62a8.name: Stunning Glance
37df51ba-f719-5c6c-9cc6-59a3b56d62a8.description: The lorelei mentally disrupts a creature within 30 feet with a look. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or be stunned for 2 rounds. Anyone who successfully saves against this effect cannot be affected by it from the same lorelei for 24 hours.

b512e4d3-d8cc-58aa-9615-789c9f7e2e67.name: Trampling Charge
b512e4d3-d8cc-58aa-9615-789c9f7e2e67.description: If the loxoda moves at least 20 feet straight toward a Large or smaller creature it then attacks with a stomp, the stomp attack is made with advantage. If the stomp attack hits, the target must also succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

ecac3f24-4f09-5b41-8a53-2dd36f771fa4.name: Innate Spellcasting (Lunar Devil)
ecac3f24-4f09-5b41-8a53-2dd36f771fa4.description:
the devil's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: fly, major image, planar binding

3/day: greater invisibility

1/day: wall of ice

f003bc1c-fa54-5684-b9e1-72f7250f7899.name: Light Incorporeality
f003bc1c-fa54-5684-b9e1-72f7250f7899.description: The devil is semi-incorporeal when standing in moonlight, and is immune to all nonmagical attacks in such conditions. Even when hit by spells or magic weapons, it takes only half damage from a corporeal source, with the exception of force damage. Holy water can affect the devil as it does incorporeal undead.

17ff2c5a-faf0-5c2d-811f-23a55146fdc1.name: Lightwalking
17ff2c5a-faf0-5c2d-811f-23a55146fdc1.description: Once per round, the lunar devil magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, from one beam of moonlight to another within 80 feet. This relocation uses half of its speed.

ccbe4302-a769-56e2-a7b5-02d3634cc40a.description: Summon Devil (1/Day): The devil can attempt a magical summoning. The devil has a 40 percent chance of summoning either 2 chain devils or 1 lunar devil.

a53764f2-e1fb-5547-9de7-d8e37b73d9ef.description: The mahoru can breathe air and water.

c1c90276-2364-54c9-ba55-7d6a85fbdb5a.description: The mahoru has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that isn't at maximum hit points.

attributes.description: The mahoru has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that isn't at maximum hit points.

969ddb0b-8dc1-5aa7-9604-003bc11f723e.name: Keen Sight and Smell
969ddb0b-8dc1-5aa7-9604-003bc11f723e.description: The mahoru has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight or smell.

2ff060e5-f240-5389-aee2-5776b72beda4.name: Pack Tactics (Mahoru)
2ff060e5-f240-5389-aee2-5776b72beda4.description: The mahoru has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the mahoru's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

c1aa0701-0db7-51c2-844d-3b94d992264d.name: Bite (Mahoru)
c1aa0701-0db7-51c2-844d-3b94d992264d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d10 + 4) slashing damage.

dfc87963-40af-577e-b9c2-11f0aac0dbca.name: Roar
dfc87963-40af-577e-b9c2-11f0aac0dbca.description: When a mahoru roars all creatures with hearing within 30 feet of it must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened until the end of the mahoru's next turn. If the target fails the saving throw by 5 or more, it's also paralyzed for the same duration. A target that succeeds on the saving throw is immune to the Roar of all mahoru for the next 24 hours.

60f7284d-5581-5970-baf7-b54377e30329.name: Vorpal Bite
60f7284d-5581-5970-baf7-b54377e30329.description:
a mahoru's saw-like jaws are excel at dismembering prey. When the mahoru scores a critical hit, the target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or lose an appendage. Roll on the following table for the result:

1-2: right hand

3-4: left hand

5-6: right food

7-8: left foot

9: right forearm

10: left forearm

11: right lower leg

12: left lower leg

3f155da6-6df5-58c6-9533-6f4064d0d3b7.name: Blistering Radiance
3f155da6-6df5-58c6-9533-6f4064d0d3b7.description: The malakbel generates a 30-foot-radius aura of searing light and heat. A creature that starts its turn in the aura, or who enters it for the first time on a turn, takes 11 (2d10) radiant damage. The area in the aura is brightly lit, and it sheds dim light for another 30 feet. The aura dispels magical darkness of - **3rd Level** or lower where the areas overlap.

3dee937d-35b7-5cb3-bf4e-c1d08a03e7c3.name: Searing Flare
3dee937d-35b7-5cb3-bf4e-c1d08a03e7c3.description: The malakbel intensifies its Blistering Radiance to withering levels. All creatures in the malakbel's aura take 31 (7d8) radiant damage and gain a level of exhaustion; a successful DC 16 Constitution saving throw reduces damage by half and negates exhaustion.

f80f126b-18b4-509a-b380-c1fa0960d806.name: Innate Spellcasting (Mallqui)
f80f126b-18b4-509a-b380-c1fa0960d806.description:
the mallqui's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: druidcraft, produce flame

4/day each: create or destroy water, entangle

2/day: locate animals or plants

1/day each: dispel magic, plant growth, wind wall

3694eddb-740f-5c99-8f7f-4772913c636d.name: Regeneration (Mallqui)
3694eddb-740f-5c99-8f7f-4772913c636d.description: The mallqui regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn. If the mallqui takes damage from its Water Sensitivity trait, its regeneration doesn't function at the start of the mallqui's next turn. The mallqui dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.

390f5359-916b-52f6-b378-7a5b9abb82bb.name: Water Sensitivity
390f5359-916b-52f6-b378-7a5b9abb82bb.description:
the flesh of a mallqui putrefies and dissolves rapidly when soaked with water in the following ways:

- Splashed with a waterskin or equivalent: 1d10 damage

- Attacked by creature made of water: Normal damage plus an extra 1d10 damage

- Caught in rain: 2d10 damage per round (DC 11 Dexterity saving throw for half)

- Immersed in water: 4d10 damage per round (DC 13 Dexterity saving throw for half)

alternatively, the saving throw and DC of the spell used to conjure or control the water damaging the mallqui can be used in place of the saving throws above

9c11d4e9-0169-5b4b-80b8-5480e35cf9e7.name: Innate Spellcasting (Malphas (Storm Crow))
9c11d4e9-0169-5b4b-80b8-5480e35cf9e7.description:
the storm crow's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: magic missile

1/day: haste

the storm crow's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

dd127a56-f561-53d2-a90d-0308a453c244.name: Night Terror (1/round)
dd127a56-f561-53d2-a90d-0308a453c244.description: As a bonus action immediately after making a successful melee attack, a malphas storm crow can cast magic missile through his or her sword at the same target.

attributes.description: As a bonus action immediately after making a successful melee attack, a malphas storm crow can cast magic missile through his or her sword at the same target.

e1e7cf75-babf-5121-bd02-c9567573a840.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Malphas (Storm Crow))
e1e7cf75-babf-5121-bd02-c9567573a840.description: While in sunlight, the malphas has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

attributes.description: While in sunlight, the malphas has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

e43c5227-3ac5-524c-890e-cd90a0550a2c.name: Swordtrained
e43c5227-3ac5-524c-890e-cd90a0550a2c.description: Malphas are trained from youth in combat. They are proficient with all martial melee and ranged weapons.

attributes.description: Malphas are trained from youth in combat. They are proficient with all martial melee and ranged weapons.

33064569-fa92-52ca-a67f-076aa72011ff.name: Longsword (Malphas (Storm Crow))
33064569-fa92-52ca-a67f-076aa72011ff.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage.

b0cacbb4-8e7c-598c-a677-b5efe6ebcba5.name: Multiattack (Malphas (Storm Crow))
b0cacbb4-8e7c-598c-a677-b5efe6ebcba5.description: The malphas makes three longsword attacks.

attributes.description: The malphas makes three longsword attacks.

797d89a9-547b-53d9-8dd4-8a57b69c5bcd.name: Shadow Call
797d89a9-547b-53d9-8dd4-8a57b69c5bcd.description: A malphas can cast magic missile as a reaction when it is hit by a ranged weapon attack.

attributes.description: A malphas can cast magic missile as a reaction when it is hit by a ranged weapon attack.

b41e674c-8e32-5209-aeb9-f75a6b24c2de.name: All-Around Vision
b41e674c-8e32-5209-aeb9-f75a6b24c2de.description: Attackers never gain advantage on attacks or bonus damage against a mamura from the presence of nearby allies.

attributes.description: Attackers never gain advantage on attacks or bonus damage against a mamura from the presence of nearby allies.

de0d571c-ed02-5d3f-975b-db9c2ad5f1c1.name: Distraction
de0d571c-ed02-5d3f-975b-db9c2ad5f1c1.description: Because of the mamura's alien and forbidding aura, any spellcaster within 20 feet of the mamura must make a successful DC 14 spellcasting check before casting a spell; if the check fails, they lose their action but not the spell slot. They must also make a successful DC 14 spellcasting check to maintain concentration if they spend any part of their turn inside the aura.

They must also make a successful DC 14 spellcasting check to maintain concentration if they spend any part of their turn inside the aura.

c74a92a6-fdc7-5105-a667-c81570fb0fdb.name: Flyby (Mamura)
c74a92a6-fdc7-5105-a667-c81570fb0fdb.description: The mamura doesn't provoke an opportunity attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

attributes.description: The mamura doesn't provoke an opportunity attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

881d93a3-26a4-58ab-8e3e-994501f278e1.name: Friend to Darkness
881d93a3-26a4-58ab-8e3e-994501f278e1.description: In darkness or dim light, the mamura has advantage on Stealth checks. It can attempt to hide as a bonus action at the end of its turn if it's in dim light or darkness.

attributes.description: In darkness or dim light, the mamura has advantage on Stealth checks. It can attempt to hide as a bonus action at the end of its turn if it's in dim light or darkness.

f84f237b-109c-5442-bbc6-6e7867d3908d.name: Magic Resistance (Mamura)
f84f237b-109c-5442-bbc6-6e7867d3908d.description: The mamura has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The mamura has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

c7b0e0ee-e0dc-5b14-9dbb-b8326b085a0d.name: Claw (Mamura)
c7b0e0ee-e0dc-5b14-9dbb-b8326b085a0d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 round. The poison duration is cumulative with multiple failed saving throws.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 round. The poison duration is cumulative with multiple failed saving throws.

51e80bca-71a9-5cc0-82a2-d352088bbc7b.name: Multiattack (Mamura)
51e80bca-71a9-5cc0-82a2-d352088bbc7b.description: The mamura makes three claw attacks and one whiptail sting attack.

attributes.description: The mamura makes three claw attacks and one whiptail sting attack.

ba6cca42-593b-5958-a6df-40968d306cc9.name: Whiptail Stinger
ba6cca42-593b-5958-a6df-40968d306cc9.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or take 1d6 poison damage. If the target is also poisoned by the mamura's claws, it takes another 1d6 poison damage at the start of each of its turns while the poisoning remains in effect.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or take 1d6 poison damage. If the target is also poisoned by the mamura's claws, it takes another 1d6 poison damage at the start of each of its turns while the poisoning remains in effect.

ef1d8628-a6f8-5bd7-bb27-94ac9e9fd0e3.name: Magic Immunity
ef1d8628-a6f8-5bd7-bb27-94ac9e9fd0e3.description: The manabane scarab swarm is immune to spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The manabane scarab swarm is immune to spells and other magical effects.

bda02208-ef7d-51ef-a3f3-70c45bab4717.name: Mana Erosion
bda02208-ef7d-51ef-a3f3-70c45bab4717.description: The manabane scarab swarm consumes magic. Unattended magic items in the swarm's space at the end of the swarm's turn have their effects suppressed for 1 minute. Additionally, charged items in the swarm's space lose 1d6 charges at the start of each of the swarm's turns; items with limited uses per day lose one daily use instead, and single-use items such as potions or scrolls are destroyed. Magical effects in the swarm's space are dispelled (as if affected by dispel magic cast with +5 spellcasting ability).

attributes.description: The manabane scarab swarm consumes magic. Unattended magic items in the swarm's space at the end of the swarm's turn have their effects suppressed for 1 minute. Additionally, charged items in the swarm's space lose 1d6 charges at the start of each of the swarm's turns; items with limited uses per day lose one daily use instead, and single-use items such as potions or scrolls are destroyed. Magical effects in the swarm's space are dispelled (as if affected by dispel magic cast with +5 spellcasting ability).

d8a47df5-9dd8-5101-9c02-b1711e196c80.name: Scent Magic
d8a47df5-9dd8-5101-9c02-b1711e196c80.description: The manabane scarab swarm can detect the presence of magical creatures, active spells or spell effects, and magical items within 120 feet.

attributes.description: The manabane scarab swarm can detect the presence of magical creatures, active spells or spell effects, and magical items within 120 feet.

034d784e-4505-56a4-85dc-86b5c59020d1.name: Bites (Manabane Scarab Swarm)
034d784e-4505-56a4-85dc-86b5c59020d1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 14 (4d6) piercing damage, or 7 (2d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or one randomly determined magic item in its possession is immediately affected by the Mana Erosion trait. A spellcaster hit by this attack must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or one of its lowest-level, unused spell slots is expended.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 14 (4d6) piercing damage, or 7 (2d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or one randomly determined magic item in its possession is immediately affected by the Mana Erosion trait. A spellcaster hit by this attack must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or one of its lowest-level, unused spell slots is expended.

d2071a81-4d1a-5289-a458-fff1f23ffe2a.name: Constrict Face
d2071a81-4d1a-5289-a458-fff1f23ffe2a.description: When a map mimic touches a Medium or smaller creature or vice versa, it adheres to the creature, enveloping the creature's face and covering its eyes and ears and airways (escape DC 13). The target creature is immediately blinded and deafened, and it begins suffocating at the beginning of the mimic's next turn.

attributes.description: When a map mimic touches a Medium or smaller creature or vice versa, it adheres to the creature, enveloping the creature's face and covering its eyes and ears and airways (escape DC 13). The target creature is immediately blinded and deafened, and it begins suffocating at the beginning of the mimic's next turn.

03d4acc6-8b77-53d6-96be-8b5216453d06.name: False Appearance (Object Form Only)
03d4acc6-8b77-53d6-96be-8b5216453d06.description: While the mimic remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary object.

attributes.description: While the mimic remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary object.

b1362fde-6b45-5fb1-99bf-88828e3ec98f.name: Mimic Page
b1362fde-6b45-5fb1-99bf-88828e3ec98f.description: The mimic can disguise itself as any tiny, flat object-a piece of leather, a plate-not only a map. In any form, a map mimic can make a map on its skin leading to its mother mimic.

attributes.description: The mimic can disguise itself as any tiny, flat object-a piece of leather, a plate-not only a map. In any form, a map mimic can make a map on its skin leading to its mother mimic.

390885fa-c99d-5e0b-9229-352cb5f074dd.name: Shapechanger (Map Mimic)
390885fa-c99d-5e0b-9229-352cb5f074dd.description: The mimic can use its action to polymorph into an object or back into its true, amorphous form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

attributes.description: The mimic can use its action to polymorph into an object or back into its true, amorphous form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

8d3b0bf4-af63-57d8-b7f2-612ddc33a073.name: Pseudopod (Map Mimic)
8d3b0bf4-af63-57d8-b7f2-612ddc33a073.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage. If the mimic is in object form, the target is subjected to its Constrict Face trait.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage. If the mimic is in object form, the target is subjected to its Constrict Face trait.

dc07038b-4d08-57b7-a0c4-9bb3ccf14660.name: Innate Spellcasting (Mask Wight)
dc07038b-4d08-57b7-a0c4-9bb3ccf14660.description:
the wight's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: alter self

1/day each: counterspell, dispel magic, enlarge/reduce, spider climb, tongues

1/week: gate

the wight's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: alter self

1/day each: counterspell, dispel magic, enlarge/reduce, spider climb, tongues

1/week: gate

22cf76cd-6f37-5670-b0c8-f972096a06b8.name: Single-minded Purpose
22cf76cd-6f37-5670-b0c8-f972096a06b8.description: The wight has advantage on attack rolls against followers of the fiend it is tasked to destroy and those in its target's employ (whether or not they are aware of their employer), as well as the fiend itself.

attributes.description: The wight has advantage on attack rolls against followers of the fiend it is tasked to destroy and those in its target's employ (whether or not they are aware of their employer), as well as the fiend itself.

d05ea5c9-3c0d-5016-8bce-a969f47ab129.name: Enervating Spiked Gauntlet
d05ea5c9-3c0d-5016-8bce-a969f47ab129.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 11 (2d10) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or gain 1 level of exhaustion. The target recovers from all exhaustion caused by the enervating spiked gauntlet at the end of its next long rest.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 11 (2d10) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or gain 1 level of exhaustion. The target recovers from all exhaustion caused by the enervating spiked gauntlet at the end of its next long rest.

fefe8b95-f03a-5275-9b77-95b1c9cea209.name: Khopesh of Oblivion
fefe8b95-f03a-5275-9b77-95b1c9cea209.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) slashing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or some cherished material thing disappears from the universe, and only the target retains any memory of it. This item can be as large as a building, but it can't be a living entity and it can't be on the target's person or within the target's sight.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) slashing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or some cherished material thing disappears from the universe, and only the target retains any memory of it. This item can be as large as a building, but it can't be a living entity and it can't be on the target's person or within the target's sight.

486d6658-89e7-57f9-894f-070a33d817de.name: Multiattack (Mask Wight)
486d6658-89e7-57f9-894f-070a33d817de.description: The mask wight makes one Khopesh of Oblivion attack and one Enervating Spiked Gauntlet attack.

attributes.description: The mask wight makes one Khopesh of Oblivion attack and one Enervating Spiked Gauntlet attack.

33dde5c3-9e5c-51e7-a506-6f8900d50d48.name: Wail of the Forgotten
33dde5c3-9e5c-51e7-a506-6f8900d50d48.description: The mask wight emits an ear-piercing wail. All creatures within 30 feet of the wight take 65 (10d12) thunder damage and are permanently deafened; a successful DC 17 Charisma saving throw reduces damage to half and limits the deafness to 1d4 hours. Targets slain by this attack are erased from the memories of every creature in the planes, all written or pictorial references to the target fade away, and its body is obliterated-the only exception is those who personally witnessed the death. Restoring such a slain creature requires a wish or divine intervention; no mortal remembers the creature's life or death.

Targets slain by this attack are erased from the memories of every creature in the planes, all written or pictorial references to the target fade away, and its body is obliterated-the only exception is those who personally witnessed the death. Restoring such a slain creature requires a wish or divine intervention; no mortal remembers the creature's life or death.

a7a1b1f7-7202-5cb8-82fe-972ce1752668.name: Innate Spellcasting (Mavka)
a7a1b1f7-7202-5cb8-82fe-972ce1752668.description:
the mavka's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 16, +8 to hit with spell attacks). She can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

constant: protection from evil and good

at will: create or destroy water, dancing lights, ray of frost, resistance, witch bolt

3/day each: darkness, hold person, inflict wounds, invisibility, silence

1/day each: animate dead, bestow curse, blindness/deafness, contagion, dispel magic, vampiric touch

6749ff38-39c5-5b49-9cbb-0c9c54ef2dd9.name: Nightmare Mount
6749ff38-39c5-5b49-9cbb-0c9c54ef2dd9.description: A mavka is bonded to a nightmare when it is created. Mavkas are encountered with their mounts 95% of the time.

attributes.description: A mavka is bonded to a nightmare when it is created. Mavkas are encountered with their mounts 95% of the time.

dcc838a4-0bfb-5a95-951c-976665669eaf.name: Sunlight Hypersensitivity
dcc838a4-0bfb-5a95-951c-976665669eaf.description: The mavka takes 20 radiant damage when she starts her turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, she has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

attributes.description: The mavka takes 20 radiant damage when she starts her turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, she has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

4afb8e20-65b5-5a6f-9c1f-96dcc274e1c7.name: Multiattack (Mavka)
4afb8e20-65b5-5a6f-9c1f-96dcc274e1c7.description: The mavka makes two slam attacks.

attributes.description: The mavka makes two slam attacks.

804389c2-6f7f-569a-9244-ee2f7398a9ad.name: Slam (Mavka)
804389c2-6f7f-569a-9244-ee2f7398a9ad.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (4d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 11 (2d10) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (4d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 11 (2d10) necrotic damage.

77ad0c90-7cf4-599d-b02a-bd491f1e4dfa.name: Toxic Skin
77ad0c90-7cf4-599d-b02a-bd491f1e4dfa.description: A creature that touches the mbielu or hits it with a melee attack exposes itself to the mbielu's poisonous skin. The creature must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. While poisoned in this way, a creature also suffers disadvantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

attributes.description: A creature that touches the mbielu or hits it with a melee attack exposes itself to the mbielu's poisonous skin. The creature must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. While poisoned in this way, a creature also suffers disadvantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

42af90b5-ba06-5e22-923b-77dc07ff2ac1.name: Rollover
42af90b5-ba06-5e22-923b-77dc07ff2ac1.description: If the mbielu is grappled by a Large creature, it rolls on top of the grappler and crushes it. The mbielu automatically escapes from the grapple and the grappler takes 20 (3d10 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: If the mbielu is grappled by a Large creature, it rolls on top of the grappler and crushes it. The mbielu automatically escapes from the grapple and the grappler takes 20 (3d10 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

18cc6c86-f8d6-55f1-a7cc-3ed6c807b675.name: Tail (Mbielu)
18cc6c86-f8d6-55f1-a7cc-3ed6c807b675.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d10 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d10 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

a941a01d-7b3a-5f3b-838b-3bd0f45359c7.name: Astral Travelers
a941a01d-7b3a-5f3b-838b-3bd0f45359c7.description: Mi-go do not require air or heat to survive, only sunlight (and very little of that). They can enter a sporulated form capable of surviving travel through the void and returning to consciousness when conditions are right.

attributes.description: Mi-go do not require air or heat to survive, only sunlight (and very little of that). They can enter a sporulated form capable of surviving travel through the void and returning to consciousness when conditions are right.

fa257a5c-6fdf-504e-9a27-e655b512ba7f.name: Disquieting Technology
fa257a5c-6fdf-504e-9a27-e655b512ba7f.description: The mi-go are a highly advanced race, and may carry items of powerful technology. Mi-go technology can be represented using the same rules as magic items, but their functions are very difficult to determine: identify is useless, but an hour of study and a successful DC 19 Arcana check can reveal the purpose and proper functioning of a mi-go item.

attributes.description: The mi-go are a highly advanced race, and may carry items of powerful technology. Mi-go technology can be represented using the same rules as magic items, but their functions are very difficult to determine: identify is useless, but an hour of study and a successful DC 19 Arcana check can reveal the purpose and proper functioning of a mi-go item.

c8d14401-bc88-5c90-98a7-102a20dd45e2.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn) (Mi-Go)
c8d14401-bc88-5c90-98a7-102a20dd45e2.description: The mi-go does an extra 7 (2d6) damage when it hits a target with a claw attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of the mi-go that isn't incapacitated and the mi-go doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

attributes.description: The mi-go does an extra 7 (2d6) damage when it hits a target with a claw attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of the mi-go that isn't incapacitated and the mi-go doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

094dcfc9-1e42-58c4-9113-0422ce4bb3d1.name: Claw (Mi-Go)
094dcfc9-1e42-58c4-9113-0422ce4bb3d1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). If both claw attacks strike the same target in a single turn, the target takes an additional 13 (2d12) psychic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). If both claw attacks strike the same target in a single turn, the target takes an additional 13 (2d12) psychic damage.

8307f1ab-5a58-5f12-82d9-0f82ecfc01ec.name: Multiattack (Mi-Go)
8307f1ab-5a58-5f12-82d9-0f82ecfc01ec.description: The mi-go makes two attacks with its claws.

attributes.description: The mi-go makes two attacks with its claws.

af770aea-4f48-5d1d-8d0e-e8f7bf6d23ec.name: Spore Release
af770aea-4f48-5d1d-8d0e-e8f7bf6d23ec.description: When a mi-go dies, it releases its remaining spores. All living creatures within 10 feet take 14 (2d8 + 5) poison damage and become poisoned; a successful DC 16 Constitution saving throw halves the damage and prevents poisoning. A poisoned creature repeats the saving throw at the end of its turn, ending the effect on itself with a success.

All living creatures within 10 feet take 14 (2d8 + 5) poison damage and become poisoned; a successful DC 16 Constitution saving throw halves the damage and prevents poisoning. A poisoned creature repeats the saving throw at the end of its turn, ending the effect on itself with a success.

59d8f1e0-66e1-5f0a-ad47-2704d4e2afe4.name: Handaxe (Millitaur)
59d8f1e0-66e1-5f0a-ad47-2704d4e2afe4.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) poison damage.

6980c975-5cf6-52d0-a5ad-fcc4c9151fa3.name: Multiattack (Millitaur)
6980c975-5cf6-52d0-a5ad-fcc4c9151fa3.description: The millitaur makes two handaxe attacks.

attributes.description: The millitaur makes two handaxe attacks.

fb7c5a8e-e86d-5229-a675-c30b5a6de1e3.name: Fungal Aura
fb7c5a8e-e86d-5229-a675-c30b5a6de1e3.description: A creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of a mindrot thrall must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become infected with mindrot spores.

attributes.description: A creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of a mindrot thrall must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become infected with mindrot spores.

2dbc3286-40c1-5de6-bfd5-54e15b8ebdf6.name: Acid Breath (Mindrot Thrall)
2dbc3286-40c1-5de6-bfd5-54e15b8ebdf6.description: The thrall exhales a blast of acidic spores from its rotten lungs in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area takes 36 (8d8) acid damage, or half damage with a successful DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. If the saving throw fails, the creature is also infected with mindrot spores.

attributes.description: The thrall exhales a blast of acidic spores from its rotten lungs in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area takes 36 (8d8) acid damage, or half damage with a successful DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. If the saving throw fails, the creature is also infected with mindrot spores.

4d40d3b5-78af-5436-80ff-796bc4c9b79b.name: Mindrot Spores
4d40d3b5-78af-5436-80ff-796bc4c9b79b.description: Infection occurs when mindrot spores are inhaled or swallowed. Infected creatures must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw at the end of every long rest; nothing happens if the saving throw succeeds, but if it fails, the creature takes 9 (2d8) acid damage and its hit point maximum is reduced by the same amount. The infection ends when the character makes successful saving throws after two consecutive long rests, or receives the benefits of a lesser restoration spell or comparable magic. A creature slain by this disease becomes a mindrot thrall after 24 hours unless the corpse is destroyed.

The infection ends when the character makes successful saving throws after two consecutive long rests, or receives the benefits of a lesser restoration spell or comparable magic. 479b20d6-2105-54c0-b22e-3e62495e5e53.name: Multiattack (Mindrot Thrall)
479b20d6-2105-54c0-b22e-3e62495e5e53.description: The mindrot thrall makes two claw attacks.

attributes.description: The mindrot thrall makes two claw attacks.

181fc4ba-b3aa-515d-bdd8-99dd1c6a9122.name: Enthralling Mirage
181fc4ba-b3aa-515d-bdd8-99dd1c6a9122.description: When the mirager casts hallucinatory terrain, the area appears so lush and inviting that those who view it feel compelled to visit. Any creature that approaches within 120 feet of the terrain must make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. Those that fail are affected as by the enthrall spell with the mirager as the caster; they give the mirage their undivided attention, wanting only to explore it, marvel at its beauty, and rest there for an hour. The mirager can choose to have creatures focus their attention on it instead of the hallucinatory terrain. Creatures affected by the enthrall effect automatically fail saving throws to disbelieve the hallucinatory terrain. This effect ends if the hallucinatory terrain is dispelled.

0ba99822-c23d-59fe-b6b2-f9c0bd7e2fe6.name: Innate Spellcasting (Mirager)
0ba99822-c23d-59fe-b6b2-f9c0bd7e2fe6.description:
the mirager's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

3/day: charm person

1/day each: hallucinatory terrain, suggestion

2c46c064-97c7-50af-a7fd-20c8fc011c28.name: Shapechanger (Mirager)
2c46c064-97c7-50af-a7fd-20c8fc011c28.description: The mirager can use its action to polymorph into a Small or Medium humanoid, or back into its true form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

3d4fd9a0-9981-5add-b02a-eef7cd28c67f.name: Captivating Dance
3d4fd9a0-9981-5add-b02a-eef7cd28c67f.description: The mirager performs a sinuously swaying dance. Humanoids within 20 feet that view this dance must make a successful DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be stunned for 1d4 rounds and charmed by the mirager for 1 minute. Humanoids of all races and genders have disadvantage on this saving throw. A creature that saves successfully is immune to this mirager's dance for the next 24 hours.

fa47b026-0097-5534-92b3-1bddf5ca2b72.name: Multiattack (Mirager)
fa47b026-0097-5534-92b3-1bddf5ca2b72.description: The mirager makes two slam attacks.

attributes.description: The mirager makes two slam attacks.

aba09024-2da2-5220-8d87-9cf88c946433.name: Thirst Kiss
aba09024-2da2-5220-8d87-9cf88c946433.description: The mirager feeds on the body moisture of creatures it lures into kissing it. A creature must be charmed, grappled, or incapacitated to be kissed. A kiss hits automatically, does 21 (6d6) necrotic damage, and fills the mirager with an exultant rush of euphoria that has the same effect as a heroism spell lasting 1 minute. The creature that was kissed doesn't notice that it took damage from the kiss unless it makes a successful DC 16 Wisdom (Perception) check.

1151859c-f2ca-5259-addb-8c596bb0b497.name: Amphibious (Miremal)
1151859c-f2ca-5259-addb-8c596bb0b497.description: The miremal can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The miremal can breathe air and water.

ad6708e6-d228-5f6b-ae2f-8bb9e221040f.name: Savage Move
ad6708e6-d228-5f6b-ae2f-8bb9e221040f.description: If the miremal surprises a creature, it gets a bonus action it can use on its first turn of combat for a claw attack, a bite attack, or a Bog Spew attack.

attributes.description: If the miremal surprises a creature, it gets a bonus action it can use on its first turn of combat for a claw attack, a bite attack, or a Bog Spew attack.

9a455e7a-e5a9-5d4c-bd9c-ef9e6343c72c.name: Swamp Camouflage
9a455e7a-e5a9-5d4c-bd9c-ef9e6343c72c.description: The miremal has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in swampy terrain.

attributes.description: The miremal has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in swampy terrain.

7850277d-0216-5474-ac7e-8a8a9435c0b3.name: Bog Spew
7850277d-0216-5474-ac7e-8a8a9435c0b3.description: The miremal spews a noxious stream of bog filth mixed with stomach acid at a target up to 20 feet away. Target must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or be blinded for 1d4 rounds.

attributes.description: The miremal spews a noxious stream of bog filth mixed with stomach acid at a target up to 20 feet away. Target must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or be blinded for 1d4 rounds.

1db07ea8-17d3-59db-8516-8b633d6c4a85.name: Muddled Escape
1db07ea8-17d3-59db-8516-8b633d6c4a85.description: If an attack would reduce the miremal's hit points to 0, it collapses into a pool of filth-laden swamp water and its hit points are reduced to 1 instead. The miremal can move at its normal speed in this form, including moving through spaces occupied by other creatures. As a bonus action at the beginning of the miremal's next turn, it can reform, still with 1 hit point.

a5de1dd9-0b3e-5c68-a096-d7cd12511543.name: Multiattack (Miremal)
a5de1dd9-0b3e-5c68-a096-d7cd12511543.description: The miremal makes two attacks, one of which must be a claw attack.

attributes.description: The miremal makes two attacks, one of which must be a claw attack.

bbf5cf0e-84da-5ece-9a2a-2981e42b480c.name: Confounding Ugliness
bbf5cf0e-84da-5ece-9a2a-2981e42b480c.description: When confronting a mirror hag at any range, a creature must make a choice at the start of each of its turns: either avert its eyes so that it has disadvantage on attack rolls against the hag until the start of its next turn, or look at the hag and make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. Failure on the saving throw leaves the character stunned until the start of its next turn.

Failure on the saving throw leaves the character stunned until the start of its next turn.

da2116bd-829d-596e-bb26-4692385534e6.name: Innate Spellcasting (Mirror Hag)
da2116bd-829d-596e-bb26-4692385534e6.description:
the hag's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). She can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: disguise self, inflict wounds (4d10), message, ray of enfeeblement

1/day each: detect thoughts, dispel magic, lightning bolt, locate creature, shillelagh, stinking cloud, teleport

683ef5d0-c2b0-5cdf-95fd-4b6a1d76e4a1.name: Reconfiguring Curse
683ef5d0-c2b0-5cdf-95fd-4b6a1d76e4a1.description: The mirror hag curses a living creature within 60 feet, giving it beastly or hideous features. The target of the reconfiguring curse must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or take 1d6 Charisma damage. A successful save renders the target immune to further uses of that hag's curse for 24 hours.

2cbaac31-38de-5eeb-b0f4-0bad876f2df7.name: Ethereal Coat
2cbaac31-38de-5eeb-b0f4-0bad876f2df7.description: The armor class of the mngwa includes its Charisma modifier. All attack rolls against the mngwa have disadvantage. If the mngwa is adjacent to an area of smoke or mist, it can take a Hide action even if under direct observation.

644f14b2-d0e5-51d4-8a90-4f8363bfb432.name: Feline Empathy
644f14b2-d0e5-51d4-8a90-4f8363bfb432.description: The mngwa has advantage on Wisdom (Animal Handling) checks to deal with felines.

36e42f09-c491-5c7c-88f9-6d7406cf2a8f.name: Keen Smell (Mngwa)
36e42f09-c491-5c7c-88f9-6d7406cf2a8f.description: The mngwa has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

attributes.description: The mngwa has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

5c1f06ec-bd6d-5392-9332-e546b837eddc.name: Pack Tactics (Mngwa)
5c1f06ec-bd6d-5392-9332-e546b837eddc.description: The mngwa has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the mngwa's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

attributes.description: The mngwa has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the mngwa's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

94b384df-693a-5787-905b-f1c8aa380863.name: Running Leap
94b384df-693a-5787-905b-f1c8aa380863.description: With a 10-foot running start, the mngwa can long jump up to 25 feet.

7f859c2f-79ed-56fc-8ec4-b5fdafc3f3d2.name: Bite (Mngwa)
7f859c2f-79ed-56fc-8ec4-b5fdafc3f3d2.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage.

cef8ffa8-6a17-5346-ba5e-d25aff475b10.name: Multiattack (Mngwa)
cef8ffa8-6a17-5346-ba5e-d25aff475b10.description: The mngwa makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

attributes.description: The mngwa makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

9cd75c27-4c24-5991-936b-55b86d7e453c.name: Blatant Dismissal
9cd75c27-4c24-5991-936b-55b86d7e453c.description: While in a fey court or castle, a monolith champion that scores a successful hit with its greatsword can try to force the substitution of the target with a shadow double. The target must succeed at a DC 14 Charisma saving throw or become invisible, silent, and paralyzed, while an illusory version of itself remains visible and audible-and under the monolith champion's control, shouting for a retreat or the like. Outside fey locales, this ability does not function.

c13c9802-5ea4-5a52-9d90-ecf274409bb4.name: Fey Flame
c13c9802-5ea4-5a52-9d90-ecf274409bb4.description: The ritual powering a monolith champion grants it an inner flame that it can use to enhance its weapon or its fists with additional fire or cold damage, depending on the construct's needs.

8948d8e0-fc2a-5966-a41a-69968175555b.name: Greatsword (Monolith Champion)
8948d8e0-fc2a-5966-a41a-69968175555b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) cold or fire damage.

bc5ea222-5403-56f9-bd86-da0f1afdc5a8.name: Multiattack (Monolith Champion)
bc5ea222-5403-56f9-bd86-da0f1afdc5a8.description: The champion makes two greatsword attacks or two slam attacks.

cef11f28-cbfa-5f05-9cc1-3f084eb53d47.name: Slam (Monolith Champion)
cef11f28-cbfa-5f05-9cc1-3f084eb53d47.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 11 (2d10) cold or fire damage.

b5386b79-047e-5b02-8f9e-178dcbb2adc7.name: Blatant Dismissal (Monolith Footman)
b5386b79-047e-5b02-8f9e-178dcbb2adc7.description: While in the courts or castles of the fey, a monolith footman that scores a successful hit with its longsword can try to force the substitution of the target with a shadow double. The target must succeed at a DC 10 Charisma saving throw or become invisible, silent, and paralyzed, while an illusory version of itself remains visible and audible-and under the monolith footman's control, shouting for a retreat or the like. Outside fey locales, this ability does not function.

8724a43d-4569-56ec-a13b-a26f4da2e27c.name: Fey Flame (Monolith Footman)
8724a43d-4569-56ec-a13b-a26f4da2e27c.description: The ritual powering a monolith footman grants it an inner flame that it can use to enhance its weapon or its fists with additional fire or cold damage, depending on the construct's needs.

0076f0a5-12c8-58af-9286-73c282c04d74.name: Simple Construction
0076f0a5-12c8-58af-9286-73c282c04d74.description: Monolith footmen are designed with a delicate fey construction. They burst into pieces and are destroyed when they receive a critical hit.

e37aec87-7ae4-5f8f-adbd-a16b08c81753.name: Longsword (Monolith Footman)
e37aec87-7ae4-5f8f-adbd-a16b08c81753.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) cold or fire damage.

f6bcac17-47ea-53ff-8d33-0f0710952548.name: Slam (Monolith Footman)
f6bcac17-47ea-53ff-8d33-0f0710952548.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) cold or fire damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) cold or fire damage.

7ed85738-0731-5475-b566-130b8e02dbe3.name: Absorb Channeled Energy
7ed85738-0731-5475-b566-130b8e02dbe3.description: If a mordant snare is in the area of effect of a turn undead attempt, it gains temporary hit points. For each mordant puppet that would have been affected by the turning if it were a zombie, the mordant snare gains 10 temporary hit points, to a maximum of 60.
