53722c59-117e-588a-8de0-288cf8e06136.name: Magic Resistance (Sand Hag)
53722c59-117e-588a-8de0-288cf8e06136.description: The sand hag has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The sand hag has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

a57c8996-4f8e-5e12-a47e-c4c1b0423310.name: Mimicry (Sand Hag)
a57c8996-4f8e-5e12-a47e-c4c1b0423310.description: The sand hag can mimic animal sounds and humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations only with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Insight) check.

attributes.description: The sand hag can mimic animal sounds and humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations only with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Insight) check.

77300085-bc91-540a-b7a4-6841b4fff8c7.name: Scorpion Step
77300085-bc91-540a-b7a4-6841b4fff8c7.description: The sand hag walks lightly across sandy surfaces, never sinking into soft sand or leaving tracks. When in sand terrain, the sand hag ignores difficult terrain, doesn't leave tracks, and gains tremorsense 30 ft.

attributes.description: The sand hag walks lightly across sandy surfaces, never sinking into soft sand or leaving tracks. When in sand terrain, the sand hag ignores difficult terrain, doesn't leave tracks, and gains tremorsense 30 ft.

a9a0aa6b-b696-5c36-9fe4-b1069c119706.name: Change Shape
a9a0aa6b-b696-5c36-9fe4-b1069c119706.description: The hag polymorphs into a Small or Medium female humanoid, or back into her true form. Her statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment she is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. She reverts to her true form if she dies.

attributes.description: The hag polymorphs into a Small or Medium female humanoid, or back into her true form. Her statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment she is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. She reverts to her true form if she dies.

56331221-5f0a-5656-abe9-4bfdd82a95b0.name: Claw (Sand Hag)
56331221-5f0a-5656-abe9-4bfdd82a95b0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage. If the target is a creature, it must make a successful DC 12 Constitution saving throw or gain one level of exhaustion.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage. If the target is a creature, it must make a successful DC 12 Constitution saving throw or gain one level of exhaustion.

2d30fcd0-3a53-503c-bf0c-1c4240ded096.name: Multiattack (Sand Hag)
2d30fcd0-3a53-503c-bf0c-1c4240ded096.description: The sand hag makes two claw attacks.

attributes.description: The sand hag makes two claw attacks.

17f2711c-9834-52a1-bd81-a26bfd0ad66e.name: Scouring Sirocco
17f2711c-9834-52a1-bd81-a26bfd0ad66e.description: The sand hag generates a blast of hot wind in a 30-foot line or a 15-foot cone. Creatures inside it take 14 (4d6) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage and are blinded for 1 minute; a successful DC 14 Constitution saving throw halves the damage and negates the blindness. A blinded creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. The affected area (line or cone) is heavily obscured until the end of the sand hag's next turn.

attributes.description: The sand hag generates a blast of hot wind in a 30-foot line or a 15-foot cone. Creatures inside it take 14 (4d6) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage and are blinded for 1 minute; a successful DC 14 Constitution saving throw halves the damage and negates the blindness. A blinded creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. The affected area (line or cone) is heavily obscured until the end of the sand hag's next turn.

6f3833b9-26fd-5a18-a79b-83a622fe26eb.name: Camouflage (Sand Silhouette)
6f3833b9-26fd-5a18-a79b-83a622fe26eb.description: While in desert environments, the sand silhouette can use the Hide action even while under direct observation.

attributes.description: While in desert environments, the sand silhouette can use the Hide action even while under direct observation.

9a202f42-e5ca-5a3d-85cd-ada6caa9b2c0.name: Sand Form
9a202f42-e5ca-5a3d-85cd-ada6caa9b2c0.description: The sand silhouette can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The sand silhouette can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

a9d9fb2c-6f93-50c5-991b-f1eea3ff8ded.name: Sand Glide
a9d9fb2c-6f93-50c5-991b-f1eea3ff8ded.description: The sand silhouette can burrow through nonmagical, loose sand without disturbing the material it is moving through. It is invisible while burrowing this way.

attributes.description: The sand silhouette can burrow through nonmagical, loose sand without disturbing the material it is moving through. It is invisible while burrowing this way.

f1829aa5-b8af-5783-9f31-86ec4bbe2922.name: Vulnerability to Water (Sand Silhouette)
f1829aa5-b8af-5783-9f31-86ec4bbe2922.description: For every 5 feet the sand silhouette moves while touching water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, it takes 2 (1d4) cold damage. If the sand silhouette is completely immersed in water, it takes 10 (4d4) cold damage.

attributes.description: For every 5 feet the sand silhouette moves while touching water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, it takes 2 (1d4) cold damage. If the sand silhouette is completely immersed in water, it takes 10 (4d4) cold damage.

0ed60edf-9952-51f2-bee0-e9896fd36bc7.name: Engulf (Sand Silhouette)
0ed60edf-9952-51f2-bee0-e9896fd36bc7.description: The sand silhouette engulfs a Medium or smaller creature grappled by it. The engulfed target is blinded and restrained, but no longer grappled. It must make a successful DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the start of each of the sand silhouette's turns or take 14 (3d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If the sand silhouette moves, the engulfed target moves with it. The sand silhouette can only engulf one creature at a time.

It must make a successful DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the start of each of the sand silhouette's turns or take 14 (3d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If the sand silhouette moves, the engulfed target moves with it. The sand silhouette can only engulf one creature at a time.

6df1855d-a7fa-5f5c-baf4-25c7cdcd638f.name: Haunted Haboob
6df1855d-a7fa-5f5c-baf4-25c7cdcd638f.description: The sand silhouette turns into a 60-foot radius roiling cloud of dust and sand filled with frightening shapes. A creature that starts its turn inside the cloud must choose whether to close its eyes and be blinded until the start of its next turn, or keep its eyes open and make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. If the saving throw fails, the creature is frightened for 1 minute. A frightened creature repeats the Wisdom saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

a4ed5d17-24ba-5e4a-9dbf-2cae6df3fb8c.name: Multiattack (Sand Silhouette)
a4ed5d17-24ba-5e4a-9dbf-2cae6df3fb8c.description: The sand silhouette makes two slam attacks.

attributes.description: The sand silhouette makes two slam attacks.

8c06a3ff-cf4a-5ea9-815b-9398cf2f594c.name: Slam (Sand Silhouette)
8c06a3ff-cf4a-5ea9-815b-9398cf2f594c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If both attacks hit a Medium or smaller target, the target is grappled (escape DC 14), and the sand silhouette engulfs it.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If both attacks hit a Medium or smaller target, the target is grappled (escape DC 14), and the sand silhouette engulfs it.

e894ac28-02c9-5c48-a474-129f76f7b162.name: Ambusher
e894ac28-02c9-5c48-a474-129f76f7b162.description: The sand spider has advantage on attack rolls against surprised targets.

attributes.description: The sand spider has advantage on attack rolls against surprised targets.

22b87d90-3871-5a95-9cd2-43570b150d6d.name: Sand Stealth (Sand Spider)
22b87d90-3871-5a95-9cd2-43570b150d6d.description: The sand spider gains an additional +3 to Stealth (+9 in total) in sand terrain.

attributes.description: The sand spider gains an additional +3 to Stealth (+9 in total) in sand terrain.

33d7e384-6489-5b0e-a3f3-02273441645b.name: Spider Climb (Sand Spider)
33d7e384-6489-5b0e-a3f3-02273441645b.description: The sand spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

attributes.description: The sand spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

343a264d-2fda-5f72-b099-fcb438772d42.name: Bite (Sand Spider)
343a264d-2fda-5f72-b099-fcb438772d42.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) piercing damage plus 13 (3d8) poison damage, or half as much poison damage with a successful DC 13 Constitution saving throw.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) piercing damage plus 13 (3d8) poison damage, or half as much poison damage with a successful DC 13 Constitution saving throw.

f441f0c3-6eab-59ad-97eb-46450b4da767.name: Impaling Leg
f441f0c3-6eab-59ad-97eb-46450b4da767.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (1d12 + 5) piercing damage. If the sand spider scores a critical hit with this attack, it rolls damage dice three times instead of twice. If both impaling leg attacks hit the same target, the second hit does an extra 11 (1d12 + 5) piercing damage.

21f20316-3d06-58a1-997c-2b5e4a9acc59.name: Multiattack (Sand Spider)
21f20316-3d06-58a1-997c-2b5e4a9acc59.description: The sand spider makes two attacks with its impaling legs and one bite attack.

attributes.description: The sand spider makes two attacks with its impaling legs and one bite attack.

b4f95381-da36-5a50-af94-ad2cf13626d8.name: Trapdoor Ambush
b4f95381-da36-5a50-af94-ad2cf13626d8.description: When a creature walks over a sand spider's hidden burrow, the spider can use its reaction to attack that creature with two impaling leg attacks. The creature is considered a surprised target for both attacks. If one or both attacks hit and the target is a Medium or smaller creature, then the sand spider and the target engage in a Strength contest. If the creature wins, it can immediately move 5 feet away from the sand spider. If the contest results in a tie, the creature is grappled (escape DC 15). If the sand spider wins, the creature is grappled and dragged by the sand spider 30 feet into its lair. If the creature is still grappled at the start of the sand spider's next turn, it becomes restrained instead. The restrained creature can escape by using an action to make a successful DC 15 Strength (Athletics) check.

The restrained creature can escape by using an action to make a successful DC 15 Strength (Athletics) check.

f1440b4a-27b8-5401-822b-98d4fd8587da.name: Eye-Closer's Curse
f1440b4a-27b8-5401-822b-98d4fd8587da.description: If a sandman obtains a critical hit or successful surprise attack against an opponent, its talons scratch a rune onto the target's eyeballs that snaps their eyelids shut, leaving them blinded. This effect can be ended with greater restoration, remove curse, or comparable magic.

This effect can be ended with greater restoration, remove curse, or comparable magic.

5e276084-da1f-571d-85c0-d4bf3cdd1ade.name: Innate Spellcasting (Sandman)
5e276084-da1f-571d-85c0-d4bf3cdd1ade.description:
the sandman's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: darkness, minor illusion, plane shift (at night only), phantom steed, prestidigitation, sleep (11d8)

3/day each: hypnotic pattern, major image

1/day each: dream, phantasmal killer (5d10)

3/day each: hypnotic pattern, major image

1/day each: dream, phantasmal killer (5d10)

c982bc75-beeb-5246-91b7-74b4360f49d3.name: Stuff of Dreams
c982bc75-beeb-5246-91b7-74b4360f49d3.description: Made partially from dreams and imagination, a sandman takes only half damage from critical hits and from sneak attacks. All of the attack's damage is halved, not just bonus damage.

attributes.description: Made partially from dreams and imagination, a sandman takes only half damage from critical hits and from sneak attacks. All of the attack's damage is halved, not just bonus damage.

2cf2824a-0f7c-5646-8fe4-0bce5e63385b.name: Surprise Attack (Sandman)
2cf2824a-0f7c-5646-8fe4-0bce5e63385b.description: If the sandman hits a surprised creature during the first round of combat, the target takes 14 (4d6) extra damage from the attack.

attributes.description: If the sandman hits a surprised creature during the first round of combat, the target takes 14 (4d6) extra damage from the attack.

9a2849e1-3af0-5767-b167-a1c40667576f.name: Multiattack (Sandman)
9a2849e1-3af0-5767-b167-a1c40667576f.description: The sandman makes two claw attacks.

attributes.description: The sandman makes two claw attacks.

f0a273ba-caba-5faf-a79c-4e137ff3a474.name: Spine Trap
f0a273ba-caba-5faf-a79c-4e137ff3a474.description: When underground with its spines exposed, the sandwyrm can snap its spines closed on one Large, two Medium, or four Small or Tiny creatures above it. Each creature must make a successful DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or be restrained. A restrained creature can use its action to make a DC 15 Strength check to free itself or another restrained creature, ending the effect on a success. Creatures restrained by this trait move with the sandwyrm. The sandwyrm's stinger attack has advantage against creatures restrained by this trait.

Each creature must make a successful DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or be restrained. A restrained creature can use its action to make a DC 15 Strength check to free itself or another restrained creature, ending the effect on a success. Creatures restrained by this trait move with the sandwyrm. The sandwyrm's stinger attack has advantage against creatures restrained by this trait.

cc08c156-3ab6-5946-a97f-b874c7bf7f6e.name: Multiattack (Sandwyrm)
cc08c156-3ab6-5946-a97f-b874c7bf7f6e.description: The sandwyrm makes one bite attack and one stinger attack. It can gore in place of the bite attack.

attributes.description: The sandwyrm makes one bite attack and one stinger attack. It can gore in place of the bite attack.

48d17673-e42a-5cd8-8329-06b8f318924d.name: Stinger (Sandwyrm)
48d17673-e42a-5cd8-8329-06b8f318924d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) piercing damage plus 24 (7d6) poison damage, or half as much poison damage with a successful DC 15 Constitution saving throw. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the target is stable but poisoned and paralyzed for 1 hour. Regaining hit points doesn't end the poisoning or paralysis.

5857525f-4fbf-5f3e-bb27-84323c8b7932.name: Amorphous (Sap Demon)
5857525f-4fbf-5f3e-bb27-84323c8b7932.description: The sap demon can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The sap demon can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

4c00ba67-9d32-5ecd-bf02-61fc70c822cf.name: Season's Change
4c00ba67-9d32-5ecd-bf02-61fc70c822cf.description: If a sap demon (or its host) takes at least 10 fire damage, it also gains the effect of a haste spell until the end of its next turn. If it takes at least 10 cold damage, it gains the effect of a slow spell until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: If a sap demon (or its host) takes at least 10 fire damage, it also gains the effect of a haste spell until the end of its next turn. If it takes at least 10 cold damage, it gains the effect of a slow spell until the end of its next turn.

1e438b50-e9b0-5304-8896-426680c4436f.name: Multiattack (Sap Demon)
1e438b50-e9b0-5304-8896-426680c4436f.description: The sap demon makes two slam attacks.

attributes.description: The sap demon makes two slam attacks.

79cc8dc2-b1cd-5a1c-a72b-b111b30830ac.name: Slam (Sap Demon)
79cc8dc2-b1cd-5a1c-a72b-b111b30830ac.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d8 + 2) bludgeoning damage. If both attacks hit a Medium or smaller target, the target is grappled (escape DC 12), and the sap demon uses Soul Sap on it as a bonus action.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d8 + 2) bludgeoning damage. If both attacks hit a Medium or smaller target, the target is grappled (escape DC 12), and the sap demon uses Soul Sap on it as a bonus action.

42b9d98f-aae3-50e2-87ab-d5cab2553bf4.name: Soul Sap
42b9d98f-aae3-50e2-87ab-d5cab2553bf4.description: The sap demon slides down the throat of a sleeping, helpless, or grappled living creature of Medium size or smaller. Once inside, the sap demon takes control of its host, as per the dominate monster spell (Wisdom DC 12 negates). While dominated, the host gains blindsight 90 feet. The host drips blood from its ears, nose, eyes, or from a wound that resembles the injury done to the sap demon's tree (1 damage/ hour). Damage inflicted on the host has no effect on the sap demon. If the host dies or is reduced to 0 hit points, the sap demon must leave the body within one hour.

If the host dies or is reduced to 0 hit points, the sap demon must leave the body within one hour.

ccf62ff4-0957-5604-a488-6b4e7e621e7c.name: Amorphous (Sarcophagus Slime)
ccf62ff4-0957-5604-a488-6b4e7e621e7c.description: The sarcophagus slime can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The sarcophagus slime can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

b5f9e887-3f43-5dbc-882d-913c7c641bf6.name: Corrupting Gaze
b5f9e887-3f43-5dbc-882d-913c7c641bf6.description: The sarcophagus slime targets one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. If the target can see the sarcophagus slime, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or take 14 (4d6) necrotic damage and its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. If this effect reduces a creature's hit point maximum to 0, the creature dies and its corpse becomes a sarcophagus slime within 24 hours. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest or until it is affected by greater restoration or comparable magic.

attributes.description: The sarcophagus slime targets one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. If the target can see the sarcophagus slime, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or take 14 (4d6) necrotic damage and its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. If this effect reduces a creature's hit point maximum to 0, the creature dies and its corpse becomes a sarcophagus slime within 24 hours. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest or until it is affected by greater restoration or comparable magic.

1d956112-c49d-5ad9-9027-24cded37aad0.name: Frightful Presence (Sarcophagus Slime)
1d956112-c49d-5ad9-9027-24cded37aad0.description: Each creature of the sarcophagus slime's choice that is within 60 feet of the sarcophagus slime and aware of it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A frightened creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the sarcophagus slime's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

7e3cbeb7-c513-5c9a-bb70-0e98269b5c80.name: Multiattack (Sarcophagus Slime)
7e3cbeb7-c513-5c9a-bb70-0e98269b5c80.description: The sarcophagus slime uses its Frightful Presence, uses its Corrupting Gaze, and makes two slam attacks.

27aaf2c6-0d84-5ec4-a9d0-609edf323182.name: Slam (Sarcophagus Slime)
27aaf2c6-0d84-5ec4-a9d0-609edf323182.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage plus 14 (4d6) acid damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage plus 14 (4d6) acid damage.

6956ff96-7ab0-5745-9266-e88fb99d0d4d.name: Agonizing Aura
6956ff96-7ab0-5745-9266-e88fb99d0d4d.description: The sathaq worms' presence induces pain in creatures native to the Material Plane. Any creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the sathaq worm must make a DC 17 Fortitude saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is poisoned until the start of its next turn. If a creature's saving throw succeeds, it is immune to the sathaq worm's Agonizing Aura for the next 24 hours.

5dc90d83-eb7d-5b3d-9223-8bbadb14a104.name: Earth Glide (Sathaq Worm)
5dc90d83-eb7d-5b3d-9223-8bbadb14a104.description: The sathaq worm can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the elemental doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

attributes.description: The sathaq worm can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the elemental doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

a63309ef-507e-5134-a7b3-ce9987d893bd.name: Earthen Camoflage
a63309ef-507e-5134-a7b3-ce9987d893bd.description: The sathaq worm's stealth bonus is increased to +6 in sand, mud, or dirt.

attributes.description: The sathaq worm's stealth bonus is increased to +6 in sand, mud, or dirt.

acb6312e-f753-5e2c-8674-72e288909235.name: Siege Monster (Sathaq Worm)
acb6312e-f753-5e2c-8674-72e288909235.description: The sathaq worm deals double damage to objects and structures.

attributes.description: The sathaq worm deals double damage to objects and structures.

c7baf0df-10e8-57bc-8124-06388ede3996.name: Bite (Sathaq Worm)
c7baf0df-10e8-57bc-8124-06388ede3996.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 24 (4d8 + 6) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw or be swallowed by the sathaq worm. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the worm, and takes 7 (2d6) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) acid damage at the start of each of the sathaq worm's turns. The sathaq worm can have only one creature swallowed at a time. If the sathaq worm takes 20 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the sathaq worm must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the swallowed creature, which falls prone in a space within 5 feet of the sathaq worm. If the sathaq worm dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 10 feet of movement, exiting prone.

76ebc3d6-de31-5776-a229-98028f0c7953.name: Innate Spellcasting (Scheznyki)
76ebc3d6-de31-5776-a229-98028f0c7953.description:
the scheznyki's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: dancing lights, darkness, detect evil and good, faerie fire, invisibility*, fly*, mage hand, ray of frost (*only when wearing a vanisher hat)

5/day each: magic missile, ray of enfeeblement, silent image

3/day each: locate object (radius 3,000 ft. to locate a vanisher hat), hideous laughter, web

1/day each: dispel magic, dominate person, hold person

cf5e7daa-e0a6-506f-b361-522a08954071.name: Tidal Breath (Sea Dragon Wyrmling)
cf5e7daa-e0a6-506f-b361-522a08954071.description: The dragon exhales a crushing wave of frigid seawater in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 11 (2d10) bludgeoning damage and 11 (2d10) cold damage, and is pushed 15 feet away from the dragon and knocked prone. On a successful save the creature takes half as much damage and isn't pushed or knocked prone.

195af7be-7f82-50b7-ae1e-bda88f8889f8.name: Alien Piping
195af7be-7f82-50b7-ae1e-bda88f8889f8.description: A selang can confuse and injure its enemies by playing weird, ear-bending harmonies on alien pipes, made from the beaks, cartilage, and throat sacs of a dorreq. When the selang plays a tune on these pipes, all creatures within 60 feet must make a successful DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be affected by contagion, confusion, irresistible dance, or hideous laughter, depending on what alien and otherworldly music the dark satyr chooses to play. A creature that saves successfully against this psychic effect is immune to the piping for 24 hours. The selang can use each of these spell-like effects once per day.

An unconscious creature wakes if it takes damage, or if a creature uses its action to shake it awake.

6930354e-e81f-5755-937e-60ed484589ef.name: Musk
6930354e-e81f-5755-937e-60ed484589ef.description: The serpopard releases a jet of foul-smelling musk in a 15-foot cone that lasts for 2d4 rounds. Creatures in the cone must make DC 13 Dexterity saving throws. If the save succeeds, the creature moves to the nearest empty space outside the cone; if the saving throw fails, the creature becomes drenched in musk. A creature that enters the area of the cone while the musk persists is saturated automatically. A creature saturated in musk is poisoned. In addition, every creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of a saturated creature must make a successful DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn. Serpopard musk (and the poisoning) wear off naturally in 1d4 hours. A saturated creature can end the effect early by spending 20 minutes thoroughly washing itself, its clothes, and its equipment with water and soap.

25a196d0-754e-5691-9bca-dd441fd0b1ae.name: Serpentine Armlets
25a196d0-754e-5691-9bca-dd441fd0b1ae.description: As a bonus action, the shabti commands its armlets to drop to the floor, whereupon they become two giant poisonous snakes. The shabti can mentally direct the serpents (this does not require an action). If the snakes are killed, they dissolve into wisps of smoke which reform around the shabti's forearms, and they can't be turned into snakes for 1 week. These armlets are linked to the shabti at the time of its creation and do not function for other creatures.

8f862d8e-b0b1-5899-b899-b03caaf5760d.name: Nabboot
8f862d8e-b0b1-5899-b899-b03caaf5760d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d4 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be cursed with tomb taint. The cursed target's speed is reduced to half, and its hit point maximum decreases by 3 (1d6) for every 24 hours that elapse. If the curse reduces the target's hit point maximum to 0, the target dies and its body turns to dust. The curse lasts until removed by the remove curse spell or comparable magic.

2/day: darkness (centered on itself, moves with the shadhavar)

Creatures within 60 feet that can hear the shadhavar must make a successful DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed until the start of the shadhavar's next turn. A creature charmed in this way is incapacitated, its speed is reduced to 0, and a shadhavar has advantage on attack rolls against it.

A poisoned creature repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

e609c8ec-4f08-5856-80b7-8715aae7814f.description: The shadow fey duelist adds 3 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the duelist must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

4/day: misty step (when in shadows, dim light, or darkness only)

593315d8-cbb3-5d3c-ab07-5ae916185651.name: Spellcasting (Shadow Fey Enchantress)
593315d8-cbb3-5d3c-ab07-5ae916185651.description:
the shadow fey is a 10th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Charisma (save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). She knows the following bard spells.

- **Cantrips (at will)**: blade ward, friends, message, vicious mockery
- **1st Level** (4 slots): bane, charm person, faerie fire
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): enthrall, hold person
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): conjure fey, fear, hypnotic pattern
- **4th Level** (3 slots): confusion, greater invisibility, phantasmal killer
- **5th Level** (2 slots): animate objects, dominate person, hold monster

00f061b5-cc8f-5116-989b-f69af867a4be.name: Beguiling Whispers
00f061b5-cc8f-5116-989b-f69af867a4be.description: The shadow fey speaks sweet words to a creature she can see within 60 feet, that can hear the enchantress. The creature must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or be charmed for 1 minute. While charmed in this way, the creature has disadvantage on Wisdom and Charisma saving throws made to resist spells cast by the enchantress.

5aef375c-07eb-552c-b223-d1afcdb058f2.name: Leadership (Shadow Fey Enchantress)
5aef375c-07eb-552c-b223-d1afcdb058f2.description: The enchantress can utter a special command or warning to a creature she can see within 30 feet of her. The creature must not be hostile to the enchantress and it must be able to hear (the command is inaudible to all but the target creature). For 1 minute, the creature adds a d4 to its attack rolls and saving throws. A creature can benefit from only one enchantress's Leadership at a time. This effect ends if the enchantress is incapacitated.

88cedda5-1d37-556a-8e52-4fea8e8205e0.name: Protect (Shadow Fey Guardian)
88cedda5-1d37-556a-8e52-4fea8e8205e0.description: The shadow fey guardian imposes disadvantage on an attack roll against an ally within 5 feet. The guardian must be wielding a melee weapon to use this reaction.

f6f9e1aa-c4b4-5f2a-b1cb-06c4532215e5.name: Bite (Sharkjaw Skeleton)
f6f9e1aa-c4b4-5f2a-b1cb-06c4532215e5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the sharkjaw skeleton can bite only the grappled creature and has advantage on attack rolls to do so.

the shellycoat can cast the following spells innately, requiring no components:

1/day each: darkness, fog cloud

1/day (if in possession of its coat): water breathing

68a6a203-0df8-5c94-ac9b-ed4bf00ab432.name: Regeneration (Shellycoat)
68a6a203-0df8-5c94-ac9b-ed4bf00ab432.description: The shellycoat regains 3 hit points at the start of its turn. If the creature takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the monster's next turn. The shellycoat dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.

837f731f-9c7a-5604-b35b-e1f6029a577a.name: Stealthy Observer
837f731f-9c7a-5604-b35b-e1f6029a577a.description: The shellycoat has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide and any Perception checks that rely on hearing.

attributes.description: The shellycoat has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide and any Perception checks that rely on hearing.

3b18897a-ea8e-5226-b3a9-104acf9cdc46.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Shellycoat)
3b18897a-ea8e-5226-b3a9-104acf9cdc46.description: The shellycoat becomes petrified after 5 (2d4) uninterrupted rounds of exposure to direct, natural sunlight.

attributes.description: The shellycoat becomes petrified after 5 (2d4) uninterrupted rounds of exposure to direct, natural sunlight.

6ef4d08f-9938-5610-b5d6-163aeb6bd0d9.name: Claws (Shellycoat)
6ef4d08f-9938-5610-b5d6-163aeb6bd0d9.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) slashing damage and the target is grappled (escape DC 13), restrained, and poisoned (DC 13 Strength saving throw negates, lasts while grappled and 1 round after). The shellycoat can shift the position of a grappled creature by up to 15 feet as a bonus action. While it has a creature grappled, the shellycoat can use its claws attack only against the grappled creature.

9d9f94cd-e13e-5036-baa3-43b431abc1d1.description: The shellycoat makes one bite attack and one claws attack.

attributes.description: The shellycoat makes one bite attack and one claws attack.

597bd093-29db-52c9-9487-7d677b82a9c5.name: Absorb Flesh
597bd093-29db-52c9-9487-7d677b82a9c5.description: The body of a creature that dies while grappled by a shoggoth is completely absorbed into the shoggoth's mass. No portion of it remains to be used in raise dead, reincarnate, and comparable spells that require touching the dead person's body.

attributes.description: The body of a creature that dies while grappled by a shoggoth is completely absorbed into the shoggoth's mass. No portion of it remains to be used in raise dead, reincarnate, and comparable spells that require touching the dead person's body.

734d6c3d-0c0b-50f1-85f4-94aa2ca2f35b.name: Amorphous (Shoggoth)
734d6c3d-0c0b-50f1-85f4-94aa2ca2f35b.description: A shoggoth can move through a space as small as 1 foot wide. It must spend 1 extra foot of movement for every foot it moves through a space smaller than itself, but it isn't subject to any other penalties for squeezing.

attributes.description: A shoggoth can move through a space as small as 1 foot wide. It must spend 1 extra foot of movement for every foot it moves through a space smaller than itself, but it isn't subject to any other penalties for squeezing.

dd771218-7071-5c16-8115-f4e2f09d6ff8.name: Anaerobic
dd771218-7071-5c16-8115-f4e2f09d6ff8.description: A shoggoth doesn't need oxygen to live. It can exist with equal comfort at the bottom of the ocean or in the vacuum of outer space.

attributes.description: A shoggoth doesn't need oxygen to live. It can exist with equal comfort at the bottom of the ocean or in the vacuum of outer space.

84638627-0299-5ffb-b977-04572257d8f1.name: Hideous Piping
84638627-0299-5ffb-b977-04572257d8f1.description: The fluting noises made by a shoggoth are otherworldly and mind-shattering. A creature that can hear this cacophony at the start of its turn and is within 120 feet of a shoggoth must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be confused (as the spell confusion) for 1d4 rounds. Creatures that roll a natural 20 on this saving throw become immune to the Hideous Piping for 24 hours. Otherwise, characters who meet the conditions must repeat the saving throw every round.

attributes.description: The fluting noises made by a shoggoth are otherworldly and mind-shattering. A creature that can hear this cacophony at the start of its turn and is within 120 feet of a shoggoth must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be confused (as the spell confusion) for 1d4 rounds. Creatures that roll a natural 20 on this saving throw become immune to the Hideous Piping for 24 hours. Otherwise, characters who meet the conditions must repeat the saving throw every round.

a76e6c0d-ee76-52a2-8a58-8c2863beff16.name: Keen Senses (Shoggoth)
a76e6c0d-ee76-52a2-8a58-8c2863beff16.description: A shoggoth has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

attributes.description: A shoggoth has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

f7e42f97-11c6-59da-b7f1-ecbd2fde98d9.name: Rolling Charge
f7e42f97-11c6-59da-b7f1-ecbd2fde98d9.description: If the shoggoth moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and hits it with a slam attack on the same turn, that creature must succeed on a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw or be knocked prone. If the creature is knocked prone, the shoggoth immediately moves into the creature's space as a bonus action and crushes the creature beneath its bulk. The crushed creature can't breathe, is restrained, and takes 11 (2d10) bludgeoning damage at the start of each of the shoggoth's turns. A crushed creature remains in its space and does not move with the shoggoth. A crushed creature can escape by using an action and making a successful DC 19 Strength check. On a success, the creature crawls into an empty space within 5 feet of the shoggoth.

attributes.description: If the shoggoth moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and hits it with a slam attack on the same turn, that creature must succeed on a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw or be knocked prone. If the creature is knocked prone, the shoggoth immediately moves into the creature's space as a bonus action and crushes the creature beneath its bulk. 5575ae45-6d9c-5171-ad44-432790e98733.name: Multiattack (Shoggoth)
5575ae45-6d9c-5171-ad44-432790e98733.description: The shoggoth makes 1d4 + 1 slam attacks. Reroll the number of attacks at the start of each of the shoggoth's turns.

attributes.description: The shoggoth makes 1d4 + 1 slam attacks. Reroll the number of attacks at the start of each of the shoggoth's turns.

c8762917-dc74-5fd2-88a7-161833f05a17.name: Slam (Shoggoth)
c8762917-dc74-5fd2-88a7-161833f05a17.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (4d10 + 8) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 18) and restrained. The shoggoth can grapple any number of creatures simultaneously, and this has no effect on its number of attacks.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (4d10 + 8) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 18) and restrained. The shoggoth can grapple any number of creatures simultaneously, and this has no effect on its number of attacks.

0f4f6734-8491-507f-b6d2-9b1144529817.name: Amorphous (Shroud)
0f4f6734-8491-507f-b6d2-9b1144529817.description: The shroud can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The shroud can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

5e331f4d-bf92-5085-b034-23cbccc71886.name: Shadow Evolution
5e331f4d-bf92-5085-b034-23cbccc71886.description: Shrouds instantly become shadows once they cause a total of 12 damage. Any damage they've suffered is subtracted from the shadow's total hit points or abilities.

attributes.description: Shrouds instantly become shadows once they cause a total of 12 damage. Any damage they've suffered is subtracted from the shadow's total hit points or abilities.

7b2aa186-8e02-52d6-ab0f-abb75ccfe2b9.name: Shroud Stealth
7b2aa186-8e02-52d6-ab0f-abb75ccfe2b9.description: When in dim light or darkness, the shroud can take the Hide action as a bonus action.

attributes.description: When in dim light or darkness, the shroud can take the Hide action as a bonus action.

1e5ca6e0-df2a-5597-9c10-89dfa3bc1370.name: Sunlight Weakness
1e5ca6e0-df2a-5597-9c10-89dfa3bc1370.description: While in sunlight, the shroud has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.

attributes.description: While in sunlight, the shroud has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.

6c241328-d3b4-53fd-97d6-daa2c1699623.name: Strength Drain (Shroud)
6c241328-d3b4-53fd-97d6-daa2c1699623.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) necrotic damage, and the target's Strength score is reduced by one-half that amount. The target dies if this reduces its Strength to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a short or long rest. If a non-evil humanoid dies from this attack, a new shadow rises from the corpse 1d4 hours later.

276faa69-12f2-5a20-82d8-22abf020e14d.name: Bend Fate (3/day)
276faa69-12f2-5a20-82d8-22abf020e14d.description: If the skein witch fails a saving throw, she may choose to succeed instead and reflect the effect of the failed saving throw onto one enemy within 30 feet. The skein witch still suffers the effect of a successful saving throw, if any. The new target is entitled to a saving throw as if it were the original target of the attack, but with disadvantage.

The skein witch still suffers the effect of a successful saving throw, if any. The new target is entitled to a saving throw as if it were the original target of the attack, but with disadvantage.

d365deb3-9efb-5005-b25f-b0f22f68d9e6.name: Fear All Cards
d365deb3-9efb-5005-b25f-b0f22f68d9e6.description: If a deck of many things is brought within 30 feet of a skein witch, she emits a psychic wail and disintegrates.

attributes.description: If a deck of many things is brought within 30 feet of a skein witch, she emits a psychic wail and disintegrates.

11a911fd-e664-57cc-8f69-a614f776e753.name: Magic Resistance (Skein Witch)
11a911fd-e664-57cc-8f69-a614f776e753.description: The skein witch has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The skein witch has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

eeef29a7-afb3-5853-936a-73019d352ac5.name: Misty Step (At Will)
eeef29a7-afb3-5853-936a-73019d352ac5.description: The skein witch can step between places as a bonus action.

attributes.description: The skein witch can step between places as a bonus action.

67ceae4a-5fba-5ff9-807f-0cf8cc68cf35.name: Sealed Destiny (1/Day)
67ceae4a-5fba-5ff9-807f-0cf8cc68cf35.description: The skein witch attunes herself to the threads of the PCs' fates. Ask each player to write down their prediction of how the PC to their left will die, and at what level. Collect the notes without revealing the answers. When one of those PCs dies, reveal the prediction. If the character died in the manner predicted, they fulfill their destiny and are immediately resurrected by the gods as a reward. If they died at or within one level of the prediction, they return to life with some useful insight into the destiny of someone important.

If they died at or within one level of the prediction, they return to life with some useful insight into the destiny of someone important.

38aa48b9-46f7-57c9-b671-220f9aed661e.name: Bind Fates
38aa48b9-46f7-57c9-b671-220f9aed661e.description: One target within 60 feet of the skein witch must make a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target's fate is bound to one random ally of the target. Any damage or condition the target suffers is inflicted on the individual to which they are bound instead, and vice versa. A creature can be bound to only one other creature at a time. This effect lasts until either of the affected creatures gains a level, or until a heal or heroes' feast lifts this binding.

This effect lasts until either of the affected creatures gains a level, or until a heal or heroes' feast lifts this binding.

33e52b4a-37c8-5bcf-80fa-52a3aae8f913.name: Destiny Distortion Wave
33e52b4a-37c8-5bcf-80fa-52a3aae8f913.description: The skein witch projects a 60-foot cone of distortion that frays the strands of fate. All targets in the cone take 55 (10d10) force damage, or half damage with a successful DC 18 Wisdom saving throw. In addition, if more than one target that failed its saving throw is affected by a condition, those conditions are randomly redistributed among the targets with failed saving throws.

1bb54ca6-05b8-5810-a046-96ba5affb25a.name: Inexorable Threads
1bb54ca6-05b8-5810-a046-96ba5affb25a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 30 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (5d8 + 5) radiant damage, and the target is "one step closer to death."If the target is reduced to 0 hit points, it's treated as if it's already failed one death saving throw. This effect is cumulative; each inexorable threads hit adds one unsuccessful death saving throw. If a character who's been hit three or more times by inexorable threads is reduced to 0 hit points, he or she dies immediately. This effect lasts until the character completes a long rest.

5c18b77d-60e5-59fc-9fdb-850a8be5a1e6.name: Multiattack (Skein Witch)
5c18b77d-60e5-59fc-9fdb-850a8be5a1e6.description: The skein witch makes two Inexorable Thread attacks.

attributes.description: The skein witch makes two Inexorable Thread attacks.

421146d0-ab9b-51dd-93b2-adfe90a95491.name: Summon Bat Swarm
421146d0-ab9b-51dd-93b2-adfe90a95491.description: The high-frequency cries of a skin bat attract nearby mundane bats. When a skin bat faces danger, 0-3 (1d4 - 1) swarms of bats arrive within 1d6 rounds. These swarms are not under the skin bat's command, but they tend to reflexively attack whatever the skin bat is fighting.

attributes.description: The high-frequency cries of a skin bat attract nearby mundane bats. When a skin bat faces danger, 0-3 (1d4 - 1) swarms of bats arrive within 1d6 rounds. These swarms are not under the skin bat's command, but they tend to reflexively attack whatever the skin bat is fighting.

e9782753-dbe5-5555-b9fb-7e436fafaeb7.name: Bite (Skin Bat)
e9782753-dbe5-5555-b9fb-7e436fafaeb7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage and the target must make a successful DC 10 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1d4 rounds. In addition, the skin bat attaches itself to the target. The skin bat can't bite a different creature while it's attached, and its bite attack automatically hits a creature the skin bat is attached to. Removing a skin bat requires a successful DC 11 Strength check and inflicts 5 (1d4 + 3) slashing damage to the creature the bat is being removed from. A successful save renders the target immune to skin bat poison for 24 hours.

9bb48ebc-ffcc-56c7-b376-ce0d1ef4b1eb.name: Broken Shell
9bb48ebc-ffcc-56c7-b376-ce0d1ef4b1eb.description: A creature that hits the skitterhaunt with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) acid damage.

attributes.description: A creature that hits the skitterhaunt with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) acid damage.

8cd8ac6d-b57d-5d55-98b5-0de29b3e1cd2.name: Infest Vermin
8cd8ac6d-b57d-5d55-98b5-0de29b3e1cd2.description: If the skitterhaunt damages a Medium or smaller beast, it can try to infest it as a bonus action. The damaged creature must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw against disease or become poisoned until the disease is cured. Every 24 hours that elapse, the target must repeat the saving throw, reducing its hit point maximum by 5 (1d10) on a failure. If the disease reduces its hit point maximum to 0, the skitterhaunt has devoured the creature's insides and the affected becomes a skitterhaunt, retaining its outward shell but replacing its flesh with skitterhaunt ooze.

26ad46dc-f96a-5aa4-be66-67abf5eb598e.name: Acid Spray (Skitterhaunt)
26ad46dc-f96a-5aa4-be66-67abf5eb598e.description: The skitterhaunt spits acid in a line 30 feet long and 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line takes 18 (4d8) acid damage, or half damage with a successful DC 14 Dexterity saving throw.

attributes.description: The skitterhaunt spits acid in a line 30 feet long and 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line takes 18 (4d8) acid damage, or half damage with a successful DC 14 Dexterity saving throw.

7d12ec69-85d1-5da3-87d0-c48d1e0bf044.name: Claw (Skitterhaunt)
7d12ec69-85d1-5da3-87d0-c48d1e0bf044.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) slashing damage plus 5 (1d10) acid damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). The skitterhaunt has two claws, each of which can grapple one target.

0d11150c-0703-565c-bff1-0d004ef1d029.name: Multiattack (Skitterhaunt)
0d11150c-0703-565c-bff1-0d004ef1d029.description: The skitterhaunt makes two claw attacks and one sting attack.

fa3deda3-b734-5aa6-bbb4-3c50109ebe43.name: Sting (Skitterhaunt)
fa3deda3-b734-5aa6-bbb4-3c50109ebe43.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage plus 5 (1d10) acid damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage plus 5 (1d10) acid damage.

eac25f71-eb52-5172-a300-ef5e7891ba1d.name: Bone Wrack
eac25f71-eb52-5172-a300-ef5e7891ba1d.description: When hit by the slow storm's slam or breath weapon attack, the storm absorbs moisture from the living creatures' joints, causing stiffness and pain. In addition to 1d4 Dexterity drain, any creature caught within the slow storm's breath weapon that fails another DC 18 Constitution save suffers crushing pain in bones and joints. Any round in which the pained creature moves, it takes 1d4 necrotic damage per 5 feet moved. Bone wracking pain lasts until the affected creature regains at least 1 point of lost Dexterity.

27b7f213-5ba8-5d9b-ad21-4e4a6ff23e64.name: Innate Spellcasting (Slow Storm)
27b7f213-5ba8-5d9b-ad21-4e4a6ff23e64.description:
the slow storm's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 16). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: lightning bolt

3/day: chain lightning

f6d5e9a5-8b54-58d7-b64c-7a70ca00e4d8.name: Storm Form
f6d5e9a5-8b54-58d7-b64c-7a70ca00e4d8.description: A creature that enters or starts its turn inside the slow storm's whirlwind takes 9 (2d8) force damage. A creature can take this damage just once per round. In addition, ranged missile weapon attacks against the slow storm have disadvantage because of the high-speed wind.

044ed06b-2ebf-59c9-8e86-fbb27bb290d0.name: Slam (Slow Storm)
044ed06b-2ebf-59c9-8e86-fbb27bb290d0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 31 (4d12 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 31 (4d12 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) piercing damage.

b377b12b-26c0-5f28-bf95-ed29425ae332.name: Static Shock
b377b12b-26c0-5f28-bf95-ed29425ae332.description: The slow storm exhales its electrical power in a 30-foot cone. Targets in the area of effect take 54 (12d8) lightning damage, 1d4 Dexterity loss, and suffer bone wrack. A successful DC 18 Constitution saving throw halves the Dexterity loss and prevents the bone wrack.

495be27e-4452-55aa-a7ad-f96a59efbebb.name: Lone Slaughs
495be27e-4452-55aa-a7ad-f96a59efbebb.description: They travel in swarms for a reason.

attributes.description: They travel in swarms for a reason.

5805e64a-1c6f-5951-9b4c-c5b3a8420fea.name: Shadowy Stealth
5805e64a-1c6f-5951-9b4c-c5b3a8420fea.description: While in dim light or darkness, the sluagh swarm can take the Hide action as a bonus action.

attributes.description: While in dim light or darkness, the sluagh swarm can take the Hide action as a bonus action.

34b8c115-4a34-578e-ac97-2f37b32eca2b.name: Sunlight Weakness (Sluagh Swarm)
34b8c115-4a34-578e-ac97-2f37b32eca2b.description: While in sunlight, the sluagh swarm has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.

attributes.description: While in sunlight, the sluagh swarm has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.

530c9838-d630-5471-966a-e4e840b3dec3.name: Swarm (Sluagh Swarm)
530c9838-d630-5471-966a-e4e840b3dec3.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny fey. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

attributes.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny fey. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

c7d81220-f97f-5fce-832d-7b325ee33841.name: Chilling Touch
c7d81220-f97f-5fce-832d-7b325ee33841.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 28 (8d6) cold damage or 14 (4d6) cold damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer. The target must make a successful DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be unable to regain hit points. An affected creature repeats the saving throw at the end of its turns, ending the effect on itself with a successful save. The effect can also be ended with a greater restoration spell or comparable magic.

Hit: 28 (8d6) cold damage or 14 (4d6) cold damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer. The effect can also be ended with a greater restoration spell or comparable magic.

dbfa73f4-1550-5b16-9793-0574c624405d.name: Absorb Magic
dbfa73f4-1550-5b16-9793-0574c624405d.description: As a bonus action, the golem targets any creature, object, or magical effect within 10 feet of it. The golem chooses a spell already cast on the target. If the spell is of - **3rd Level** or lower, the golem absorbs the spell and it ends. If the spell is of 4th level or higher, the golem must make a check with a +9 modifier. The DC equals 10 + the spell's level. On a successful check, the golem absorbs the spell and it ends. The golem's body glows when it absorbs a spell, as if under the effect of a light spell. A smaragdine golem can only hold one absorbed spell at a time.

A smaragdine golem can only hold one absorbed spell at a time.

00552483-cb57-52d8-a8fc-710681646521.name: Release Spell
00552483-cb57-52d8-a8fc-710681646521.description: The golem can release an absorbed spell effect as a blast of green energy, which blasts out as a sphere centered on the golem with a radius of 10 feet per level of the absorbed spell. All creatures in the area of effect other than the golem takes 7 (2d6) lightning damage per level of the absorbed spell, or half damage with a successful DC 18 Dexterity saving throw. Creatures that fail the saving throw are also blinded until the end of the golem's next turn.

8dd306ad-4085-561a-9ffa-fb255adc13ca.name: Slam (Smaragdine Golem)
8dd306ad-4085-561a-9ffa-fb255adc13ca.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (4d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (4d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.

46a3ff9a-20d4-5f5d-ab43-59450d9b2c62.name: Arctic Tunneler
46a3ff9a-20d4-5f5d-ab43-59450d9b2c62.description: While in snow or ice, the Son of Fenris' burrow speed increases to 30 ft.

attributes.description: While in snow or ice, the Son of Fenris' burrow speed increases to 30 ft.

0261ff17-ff11-5fb0-bbb9-eed7d7b32fca.name: Keen Hearing and Smell (Son Of Fenris)
0261ff17-ff11-5fb0-bbb9-eed7d7b32fca.description: The son of Fenris has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

attributes.description: The son of Fenris has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

440ed92f-a0dc-51cc-b4e3-68023855297c.name: Magic Weapons (Son Of Fenris)
440ed92f-a0dc-51cc-b4e3-68023855297c.description: The son of Fenris' weapon attacks are magical.

attributes.description: The son of Fenris' weapon attacks are magical.

d05727e0-7b18-54df-94c6-1f268ecb35bc.name: Spellcasting (Son Of Fenris)
d05727e0-7b18-54df-94c6-1f268ecb35bc.description:
the son of Fenris is a 15th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 16, +8 to hit with spell attacks). It requires no material components to cast its spells. It has the following cleric spells prepared:

- **Cantrips (at will)**: guidance, light, sacred flame, spare the dying, thaumaturgy
- **1st Level** (4 slots): bane, command, guiding bolt, sanctuary
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): blindness/deafness, hold person, silence
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): animate dead, bestow curse, dispel magic
- **4th Level** (3 slots): banishment, death ward, locate creature
- **5th Level** (2 slots): contagion, scrying
- **6th Level** (1 slot): harm
- **7th Level** (1 slot): plane shift
- **8th Level** (1 slot): earthquake

43f70e2f-1cf5-5628-968e-b4bc34dc5c19.name: Trampling Charge (Son Of Fenris)
43f70e2f-1cf5-5628-968e-b4bc34dc5c19.description: If the son of Fenris moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and hits it with a slam attack on that turn, that target must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If it is knocked prone, the son of Fenris can make another slam attack against it as a bonus action.

attributes.description: If the son of Fenris moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and hits it with a slam attack on that turn, that target must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If it is knocked prone, the son of Fenris can make another slam attack against it as a bonus action.

f01ac31d-d68a-59a7-b112-b348e5567504.name: Acid Breath (Son Of Fenris)
f01ac31d-d68a-59a7-b112-b348e5567504.description: The son of Fenris exhales acid in a 60-foot line that is 10 feet wide. Each creature in the line takes 45 (10d8) acid damage, or half damage with a successful DC 18 Dexterity saving throw.

attributes.description: The son of Fenris exhales acid in a 60-foot line that is 10 feet wide. Each creature in the line takes 45 (10d8) acid damage, or half damage with a successful DC 18 Dexterity saving throw.

6f2191fb-56a1-5171-9fe3-915617f83248.name: Bite (Son Of Fenris)
6f2191fb-56a1-5171-9fe3-915617f83248.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d10 + 8) piercing damage plus 5 (1d10) poison damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 18). If the target was already grappled, it is swallowed instead. While swallowed, the target is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects from outside the son of Fenris, and it takes 28 (8d6) acid damage at the start of each of the son of Fenris's turns. It can swallow only one creature at a time. If it takes 45 damage or more on a single turn from the swallowed creature, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the creature, which falls prone in a space within 10 feet of the son of Fenris. If the son of Fenris dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting prone.

3b3f0ed4-5ba3-54de-adcb-ddbc6f7a0420.name: Multiattack (Son Of Fenris)
3b3f0ed4-5ba3-54de-adcb-ddbc6f7a0420.description: The son of Fenris makes one bite attack and one slam attack.

e79cd9a4-e8a4-53a7-a1f7-99828c3bf999.name: Slam (Son Of Fenris)
e79cd9a4-e8a4-53a7-a1f7-99828c3bf999.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d10 + 8) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d10 + 8) bludgeoning damage.

02ec5864-a40e-568e-b573-48e69fb95495.name: Caster Link
02ec5864-a40e-568e-b573-48e69fb95495.description: When a soul eater is summoned, it creates a mental link between itself and its conjurer. If the soul eater's assigned target (see Find Target ability, below) dies before the soul eater can drain the target's soul, or if the soul eater is defeated by its target (but not slain), it returns to its conjurer at full speed and attacks. While the soul eater and the conjurer share the same plane, it can use its Find Target ability to locate its conjurer.

While the soul eater and the conjurer share the same plane, it can use its Find Target ability to locate its conjurer.

e8139f60-28b9-5d51-a1fe-6dc7e22b6a1c.name: Find Target
e8139f60-28b9-5d51-a1fe-6dc7e22b6a1c.description: When a soul eater's conjurer orders it to find a creature, it can do so unerringly, despite the distance or intervening obstacles, provided the target is on the same plane of existence. The conjurer must have seen the desired target and must speak the target's name.

attributes.description: When a soul eater's conjurer orders it to find a creature, it can do so unerringly, despite the distance or intervening obstacles, provided the target is on the same plane of existence. The conjurer must have seen the desired target and must speak the target's name.

5c63196c-7335-5d06-b853-dc7c0f2c47d2.name: Claw (Soul Eater)
5c63196c-7335-5d06-b853-dc7c0f2c47d2.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) psychic damage, or half as much psychic damage with a successful DC 15 Constitution saving throw.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) psychic damage, or half as much psychic damage with a successful DC 15 Constitution saving throw.

95b198db-49ee-5f14-b6dc-67891e077212.name: Multiattack (Soul Eater)
95b198db-49ee-5f14-b6dc-67891e077212.description: The soul eater makes two claw attacks.

attributes.description: The soul eater makes two claw attacks.

c06a7980-847a-5422-ab76-e12fbfc12d5e.name: Soul Drain
c06a7980-847a-5422-ab76-e12fbfc12d5e.description: If the soul eater reduces a target to 0 hit points, the soul eater can devour that creature's soul as a bonus action. The victim must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. Success means the target is dead but can be restored to life by normal means. Failure means the target's soul is consumed by the soul eater and the target can't be restored to life with clone, raise dead, or reincarnation. A resurrection, miracle, or wish spell can return the target to life, but only if the caster succeeds on a DC 15 spellcasting check. If the soul eater is killed within 120 feet of its victim's corpse and the victim has been dead for no longer than 1 minute, the victim's soul returns to the body and restores it to life, leaving the victim unconscious and stable with 0 hit points.

dce724c1-9d76-5760-9dc2-4912833b7c37.name: Innate Spellcasting (Spark)
dce724c1-9d76-5760-9dc2-4912833b7c37.description:
the spark's innate casting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: shocking grasp

3/day: lightning bolt

1/day: call lightning

3057e1ab-4474-5a19-b8d2-c6689ed1c20c.name: Inhabit
3057e1ab-4474-5a19-b8d2-c6689ed1c20c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: The target must succeed on a DC 14 Charisma saving throw or become dominated by the spark, as the dominate person spell. The spark instantly enters the target's space and merges into the target's physical form. While inhabiting a creature, a spark takes no damage from physical attacks. The target creature receives a +4 bonus to its Dexterity and Charisma scores while it's inhabited. The speech and actions of an inhabited creature are noticeably jerky and erratic to any creature with passive Perception 14 or higher. Each time the spark uses innate spellcasting, the host can attempt another DC 14 Charisma saving throw. A successful save expels the spark, which appears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the former host. The inhabiting spark slowly burns out its host's nervous system. The inhabited creature must make a successful DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the end of each 24 hour-period or take 2d6 lightning damage and have its maximum hit points reduced by the same amount. The creature dies if this damage reduces its hit point maximum to 0. The reduction lasts until the inhabited creature completes a long rest after the spark is expelled.

36b72e7c-b3c2-5587-b2fc-9fefe2ba6354.name: Hive Mind (Spawn Of Arbeyach)
36b72e7c-b3c2-5587-b2fc-9fefe2ba6354.description: Spawn of Arbeyach share a bond with other members of their hive that enhances their hive mates' perception. As long as a spawn is within 60 feet of at least one hive mate, it has advantage on initiative rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks. If one spawn is aware of a particular danger, all others in the hive are, too. No spawn in a hive mind is surprised at the beginning of an encounter unless all of them are.

49323217-ce6e-5511-9fdc-424b455b6ece.name: Innate Spellcasting (Spawn Of Arbeyach)
49323217-ce6e-5511-9fdc-424b455b6ece.description: The spawn of Arbeyach's spellcasting ability is Charisma. The Spawn of Arbeyach can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components: 1/day: conjure animals (only swarms of insects) Scent Communication. Spawn of Arbeyach can communicate with each other and all swarms of insects within 60 feet via pheromone transmission. In a hive, this range extends to cover the entire hive. This is a silent and instantaneous mode of communication that only Arbeyach, spawn of Arbeyach, and swarms of insects can understand. As a bonus action, the spawn of Arbeyach can use this trait to control and give orders to one swarm of insects within 60 feet.

065490ab-91b4-52e8-a0ec-e6ae2592b2a1.name: Stinger (Spawn Of Arbeyach)
065490ab-91b4-52e8-a0ec-e6ae2592b2a1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) poison damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. A poisoned creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

95732bf0-a05a-5615-a5e6-fe7b8c1c52e0.name: Incorporeal Movement (Spectral Guardian)
95732bf0-a05a-5615-a5e6-fe7b8c1c52e0.description: The spectral guardian can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

32b07ad4-bee3-5889-b64b-139a4d0c353d.name: Tomb Bound
32b07ad4-bee3-5889-b64b-139a4d0c353d.description: The spectral guardian is bound to the area it defends. It can't move more than 100 feet from the place it is bound to protect.

98227861-22c3-508b-be93-272c62ae8bab.name: Variant: Arcane Guardian
98227861-22c3-508b-be93-272c62ae8bab.description:
some spectral guardians were not warriors in life, but powerful magic users. An arcane guardian has a challenge rating of 8 (3,900 XP) and the following added trait: Spellcasting. The arcane guardian is a 9th level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). The guardian knows the following sorcerer spells, which do not require material components:

- **Cantrips (at will)**: acid splash, chill touch, dancing lights,minor illusion, ray of frost
- **1st Level** (4 slots): mage armor, ray of sickness
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): darkness, scorching ray
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): fear, slow, stinking cloud
- **4th Level** (3 slots): blight, ice storm
- **5th Level** (1 slot): cone of cold

This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest.

0d134707-509e-506f-93d6-727bee8aa3ca.description:
the spider of Leng's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

f620f372-cc43-5f39-8f4f-e71a43e375dc.description: The spider thief has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

dc49046a-8494-5f1e-9404-0ff39760528d.name: Wire-Assisted Jump
dc49046a-8494-5f1e-9404-0ff39760528d.description: If its razor line attack is available, a spider thief can use its movement to leap 20 feet in any direction by launching the wire like a spider's web so that it spears or snags an object, then immediately reeling it back in. It can carry up to 25 lb. of additional weight while moving this way. Moving this way doesn't expend its razor line attack.

b26e8b68-70b4-5c45-839c-551d1fffd7d2.name: Multiattack (Spider Thief)
b26e8b68-70b4-5c45-839c-551d1fffd7d2.description: The spider thief makes two sickle claw attacks.

b6776b9e-88b8-509c-85c3-5d1ce0e821c6.name: Razor Line
b6776b9e-88b8-509c-85c3-5d1ce0e821c6.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 10). Instead of moving, the spider thief can retract the razor line and pull itself onto the grappled creature (the spider thief enters and remains in the target's space). The spider thief's sickle claw attacks have advantage against a grappled creature in the same space. If the grappled creature escapes, the spider thief immediately displaces into an unoccupied space within 5 feet.

626c93e5-616e-5dfb-91bc-0cfd61c8e8af.name: Siege Monster (Spinosaurus)
626c93e5-616e-5dfb-91bc-0cfd61c8e8af.description: The spinosaurus deals double damage to objects and structures.

d6987a75-1b1a-5f1f-8bba-e17acab48f4b.name: Tamed
d6987a75-1b1a-5f1f-8bba-e17acab48f4b.description: The spinosaurus will never willingly attack any reptilian humanoid, and if forced or magically compelled to do so, it suffers disadvantage on attack rolls. Up to twelve Medium or four Large creatures can ride the spinosaurus. This trait disappears if the spinosaurus spends a month away from any reptilian humanoid.

11955e6f-7ba8-5eeb-9ddd-d38bdfefd3a4.name: Bite (Spinosaurus)
11955e6f-7ba8-5eeb-9ddd-d38bdfefd3a4.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 34 (4d12 + 8) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 18). When the spinosaurus moves, the grappled creature moves with it. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and the spinosaurus can't bite another target.

59b7f804-09fb-5650-afd3-57baac7a60ef.description: Each creature of the spinosaurus' choice that is within 120 feet of the spinosaurus and aware of it must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A frightened creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the spinosaurus' Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

d3900d65-e1c9-5d85-aea1-3cf2aa62d279.description: The spinosaurus makes one tail attack.

attributes.description: The spinosaurus makes one tail attack.

d81d2e38-8d71-591e-8418-5322a59ddbfa.name: Energized Body
d81d2e38-8d71-591e-8418-5322a59ddbfa.description: A creature that hits the spire walker with a melee attack using a metal weapon takes 5 (1d10) lightning damage.

attributes.description: A creature that hits the spire walker with a melee attack using a metal weapon takes 5 (1d10) lightning damage.

ffd797e8-8b0e-56fc-aaf7-2019a8c4bac5.name: Innate Spellcasting (Spire Walker)
ffd797e8-8b0e-56fc-aaf7-2019a8c4bac5.description:
the spire walker's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 12, +4 to hit with spell attacks). The spire walker can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: produce spark (as the cantrip produce flame, but it does lightning damage)

3/day each: dancing lights, feather fall, invisibility

1/day each: faerie fire, thunderwave

4987e18d-d441-53b9-afb1-8df5024a45e0.name: Steeple Step
4987e18d-d441-53b9-afb1-8df5024a45e0.description: The spire walker can use 10 feet of its movement to step magically from its position to the point of a steeple, mast, or other spire-like feature that is in view within 30 feet. The spire walker has advantage on Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks and Dexterity saving throws while it is standing on a steeple or any similar narrow, steep structure or feature.

aec3db16-421e-5da1-96f3-9b0c5535211c.name: Lightning Dart
aec3db16-421e-5da1-96f3-9b0c5535211c.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) lightning damage. If the attack misses, the target still takes 4 (1d8) lightning damage. Whether the attack hits or misses its intended target, every other creature within 10 feet of the target takes 9 (2d8) lightning damage, or half damage with a successful DC 14 Dexterity saving throw.

e64529e3-9bb4-56e4-8ac6-4d0917de5be8.name: Innate Spellcasting (Star Drake)

the drake's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 20). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: faerie fire, moonbeam

3/day: plane shift

1/day each: gate, planar binding

8473d4b3-3c37-5ca3-aa57-d5f19b99fafe.name: Legendary Resistance (2/day)
8473d4b3-3c37-5ca3-aa57-d5f19b99fafe.description: If the star drake fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

fdc783aa-ac45-5341-9e60-0bf66085de90.name: Magic Weapons (Star Drake)
fdc783aa-ac45-5341-9e60-0bf66085de90.description: The drake's weapon attacks are magical.

cea41259-33c5-5d55-8446-0be0bb8495a2.name: Nimbus of Stars
cea41259-33c5-5d55-8446-0be0bb8495a2.description: The drake is surrounded by a whirling nimbus of tiny motes of starlight. A sighted creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the drake must make a successful DC 18 Constitution saving throw or become incapacitated. At the start of a character's turn, a character can choose to avert its eyes and gain immunity against this effect until the start of its next turn, but it must treat the drake as invisible while the character's eyes are averted.

53e1f9d1-fd60-5379-ad7b-53f6e1ae1d3a.name: Bite (Star Drake)
53e1f9d1-fd60-5379-ad7b-53f6e1ae1d3a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) piercing damage.

e054d978-4166-5442-8b48-eb1a3cf06b1c.name: Bite Attack (Star Drake)
e054d978-4166-5442-8b48-eb1a3cf06b1c.description: The drake makes one bite attack.

159b5ebd-204d-5e0d-b512-0b25613c6bfa.name: Breath Weapon (Star Drake)
159b5ebd-204d-5e0d-b512-0b25613c6bfa.description: The drake exhales either fire or frigid air in a 40-foot cone. Each creature in that area takes 78 (12d12) fire or cold damage, whichever the drake wishes, or half damage with a successful DC 18 Dexterity saving throw.

e0b83bcf-05d3-546d-ba30-8cd99e281ad1.name: Claw (Star Drake)
e0b83bcf-05d3-546d-ba30-8cd99e281ad1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) slashing damage.

7237477c-9422-512b-96e8-88fbb1c946f2.name: Multiattack (Star Drake)
7237477c-9422-512b-96e8-88fbb1c946f2.description: The drake makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

attributes.description: The drake makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

bc85eeae-00cf-5537-9bd7-33f157e36c7b.name: Nova
bc85eeae-00cf-5537-9bd7-33f157e36c7b.description: The drake momentarily doubles the radius and intensity of its nimbus of stars. Every sighted creature within 20 feet of the drake must make a successful DC 18 Constitution saving throw or become blinded until the end of its next turn. Characters who are averting their eyes are immune to the nova.

2867591b-17c8-5cd2-84ee-6ec85a0da39d.name: Pale Sparks
2867591b-17c8-5cd2-84ee-6ec85a0da39d.description: The drake casts faerie fire or moonbeam.

ef008955-8561-5882-a355-cbfae30278c0.name: Searing Star
ef008955-8561-5882-a355-cbfae30278c0.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +12 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 65 (10d12) force damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or be permanently blinded.

6b474d81-77d7-54c8-b741-2e06ff606fca.name: Interdimensional Movement
6b474d81-77d7-54c8-b741-2e06ff606fca.description: A star spawn of Cthulhu can use misty step as a bonus action once per round.

attributes.description: A star spawn of Cthulhu can use misty step as a bonus action once per round.

319551c7-4f28-5776-969e-bc274f070297.name: Psychic Tower
319551c7-4f28-5776-969e-bc274f070297.description: When an attack that causes psychic damage is directed against the spawn, the attack rebounds against the attacker. Resolve the attack as if the attacker were the original target and using the star spawn's ability modifiers and proficiency bonus rather than the original attacker's.

186cbe91-d68e-5892-9208-c0e521ff0383.name: Void Traveler
186cbe91-d68e-5892-9208-c0e521ff0383.description: The star spawn of Cthulhu requires no air, warmth, ambient pressure, food, or water, enabling it to travel safely through interstellar space and similar voids.

attributes.description: The star spawn of Cthulhu requires no air, warmth, ambient pressure, food, or water, enabling it to travel safely through interstellar space and similar voids.

02886e3f-746e-52af-97a2-ceac05794987.name: Crushing Claws
02886e3f-746e-52af-97a2-ceac05794987.description: Melee Weapon Attack. +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (2d12 + 7) bludgeoning damage plus 13 (3d8) necrotic damage.

9fb4078b-d675-5e0b-988e-9fcf906994df.name: Dimensional Stomp
9fb4078b-d675-5e0b-988e-9fcf906994df.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (2d20 + 7) bludgeoning damage, and the target must make a successful DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or be teleported to a new location as if affected by the dimension door spell. The destination is chosen by the star spawn, but it cannot be in the same space as another object or creature.

The destination is chosen by the star spawn, but it cannot be in the same space as another object or creature.

5c1b3e0c-a8fe-52c9-9d51-9cf9fe74d833.name: Disintegrating Gaze
5c1b3e0c-a8fe-52c9-9d51-9cf9fe74d833.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +15 to hit, range 60 ft., one target in line of sight. Hit: 32 (5d12) necrotic damage, and the target must make a successful DC 20 Constitution saving throw or dissipate into vapor as if affected by a gaseous form spell. An affected creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns; on a success, the effect ends on that creature, but on a failure, the creature takes another 32 (5d12) necrotic damage and remains gaseous. A creature reduced to 0 hit points by this necrotic damage is permanently disintegrated and can be restored only by a wish or comparable magic that doesn't require some portion of a corpse to work.

Hit: 32 (5d12) necrotic damage, and the target must make a successful DC 20 Constitution saving throw or dissipate into vapor as if affected by a gaseous form spell. An affected creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns; on a success, the effect ends on that creature, but on a failure, the creature takes another 32 (5d12) necrotic damage and remains gaseous. A creature reduced to 0 hit points by this necrotic damage is permanently disintegrated and can be restored only by a wish or comparable magic that doesn't require some portion of a corpse to work.

7c8caf77-fabf-5607-8a4b-a4c1c5c8fec4.name: Multiattack (Star Spawn Of Cthulhu)
7c8caf77-fabf-5607-8a4b-a4c1c5c8fec4.description: The star spawn can use disintegrating gaze if it's available, and also make one claws attack and one dimensional stomp attack.

attributes.description: The star spawn can use disintegrating gaze if it's available, and also make one claws attack and one dimensional stomp attack.

6d0bc557-dba2-57c3-819c-0b331cea3f13.name: Boiler Weakness
6d0bc557-dba2-57c3-819c-0b331cea3f13.description: A steam golem that's immersed in water or whose boiler is soaked with at least 20 gallons of water (such as from a water elemental) may be stopped in its tracks by the loss of steam pressure in the boiler. In the case of a water elemental, dousing a steam golem destroys the elemental and the golem must make a DC 20 Constitution saving throw. If it succeeds, the water instantly evaporates and the golem continues functioning normally. If it fails, the golem's fire is extinguished and the boiler loses pressure. The steam golem acts as if affected by a slow spell for 1d3 rounds, then becomes paralyzed until its fire is relit and it spends 15 minutes building up pressure.

0b9d81b9-4f8a-5edb-894e-594a595702e0.name: Multiattack (Steam Golem)
0b9d81b9-4f8a-5edb-894e-594a595702e0.description: The steam golem makes two ax arm attacks, or one long axe attack.

9d20926c-ab32-5652-9aac-e293af902e0e.name: Steam Blast
9d20926c-ab32-5652-9aac-e293af902e0e.description: A steam golem can release a blast of steam. The golem chooses whether to affect a 5-foot radius around itself or a 20-foot cube adjacent to itself. Creatures in the affected area take 38 (7d10) fire damage, or half damage with a successful DC 17 Constitution saving throw.
