cbcb28ab-5d16-5271-91a5-054382327431.name: Whistle
cbcb28ab-5d16-5271-91a5-054382327431.description: When an opponent within 30 feet of the golem tries to cast a spell, the steam golem can emit a shriek from its twin steam whistles. The spellcaster must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw. If the save succeeds, the spell is cast normally. If it fails, the spell is not cast; the spell slot is not used, but the caster's action is.

16fb072e-13c6-50de-927f-f668dc2614b2.description: Until a stryx speaks or opens its mouth, it is indistinguishable from a normal owl.

4105b0c1-1337-5cb6-8048-bb60d7321886.name: Mountain Stride
4105b0c1-1337-5cb6-8048-bb60d7321886.description: Mountain slopes and stone outcroppings pose no obstacle to a stuhac's movement. In mountainous areas, it scrambles through difficult terrain without hindrance.

e6a29321-1bf7-56c5-8a13-4b52c9616a23.description: The stuhac can jump three times the normal distance: 66 feet horizontally or 27 feet vertically with a running start, or half those distances from a stationary start.

2f1fc10b-cf68-504b-8c69-fc806d2bff1a.name: Shapechanger (Stuhac)
2f1fc10b-cf68-504b-8c69-fc806d2bff1a.description: The stuhac can use its action to polymorph into one of two forms: that of an elderly humanoid male, and its natural form. It cannot alter either form's appearance or capabilities using this ability, and damage sustained in one form transfers to the other form.

549c1445-33ba-58b4-b530-1b34cb7ebf24.name: Bite (Stuhac)

af8ec16d-3e54-53e9-b83d-39a73e444f82.name: Claw (Stuhac)

dff09df1-62a8-501e-931e-6659cb8dc0bc.name: Hobble
dff09df1-62a8-501e-931e-6659cb8dc0bc.description: A stuhac can cripple a creature by telekinetically tearing its tendons and ligaments. A stuhac can target one creature within 100 feet. The target must make a successful DC 16 Constitution saving throw or take 13 (3d8) force damage and its speed is reduced by 20 feet. Magical movement (flight, teleportation, etc.) is unaffected. This damage can only be cured through magical healing, not by spending hit dice or resting.

77cc53c4-8d60-5228-ad68-de8c14e91dfd.name: Claw (Stygian Fat-Tailed Scorpion)

e5321fcb-b3b6-5fa9-9ddb-d5acebf8b53a.name: Sting (Stygian Fat-Tailed Scorpion)

A successful DC 10 Constitution saving throw reduces the poison damage to half and prevents the poisoned condition. If the target fails this saving throw while already poisoned, it gains one level of exhaustion in addition to the other effects.

eb4462fd-3e1a-58e5-9ba9-51f2579ff5ef.description: During flood season, the subek is overcome with bloodthirsty malice. Its alignment shifts to chaotic evil, it gains the Blood Frenzy trait, and it loses the capacity to speak Common and its bonuses to History and Investigation.

11774ba0-6c22-59fd-9913-f48089681f06.description: The subek makes one bite attack and one claws attack. If both attacks hit the same target, the subek can make a thrash attack as a bonus action against that target.

d3f0ceb0-46f9-502e-a38b-677f3278e8d1.name: Thrash
d3f0ceb0-46f9-502e-a38b-677f3278e8d1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d10) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d10) slashing damage.

4e24f4e3-bd59-5ef8-936a-1dddd486a31f.name: Camouflage (Suturefly)
4e24f4e3-bd59-5ef8-936a-1dddd486a31f.description: A suturefly in forest surroundings has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

attributes.description: A suturefly in forest surroundings has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

3f358e7d-81d7-5e09-92ac-3f3941a98d2d.name: Detect Blasphemy
3f358e7d-81d7-5e09-92ac-3f3941a98d2d.description: The most common variety of suturefly attacks any creature that blasphemes aloud, which it can detect at a range of 100 feet unless the blasphemer makes a successful DC 13 Charisma saving throw.

attributes.description: The most common variety of suturefly attacks any creature that blasphemes aloud, which it can detect at a range of 100 feet unless the blasphemer makes a successful DC 13 Charisma saving throw.

6bad0fdf-99cd-521e-969d-9a3aa2436e0f.name: Sew
6bad0fdf-99cd-521e-969d-9a3aa2436e0f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the suturefly sews the target's mouth, nose, or eye closed. With supernatural speed, the suturefly repeatedly pierces the target's face, each time threading a loop of the target's own skin through the previous hole. These skin loops rapidly blacken, shrink, and draw the orifice tightly closed. It takes two actions and a sharp blade to sever the loops and reopen the orifice, and the process causes intense pain and 2 slashing damage. A victim whose mouth and nose have been sewn shut begins suffocating at the start of his or her next turn.

771dc107-c7d6-53bf-bc1d-e68559964dd3.name: Swamp Camouflage (Swamp Adder)
771dc107-c7d6-53bf-bc1d-e68559964dd3.description: The swamp adder has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks while in swamp terrain.

attributes.description: The swamp adder has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks while in swamp terrain.

f663894c-975b-56bb-9ac2-c738aa1d7f50.name: Bite (Swamp Adder)
f663894c-975b-56bb-9ac2-c738aa1d7f50.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the target must make a successful DC 11 saving throw or become poisoned. While poisoned this way, the target is paralyzed and takes 3(1d6) poison damage at the start of each of its turns. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself with a success.

e11e7114-a6e3-5aff-b15f-b33769d4bc33.name: Magic Resistance (Temple Dog)
e11e7114-a6e3-5aff-b15f-b33769d4bc33.description: The temple dog has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The temple dog has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

90e76a88-2a3d-5363-85eb-ad95facc5715.name: Protector's Initiative
90e76a88-2a3d-5363-85eb-ad95facc5715.description: If the temple dog is entering combat against a clear threat to its temple, it has advantage on its initiative roll.

attributes.description: If the temple dog is entering combat against a clear threat to its temple, it has advantage on its initiative roll.

f6690bc0-0282-5a83-8a6e-5c3e642118a5.name: Rushing Slam
f6690bc0-0282-5a83-8a6e-5c3e642118a5.description: If the temple dog moves at least 10 feet straight toward a target and then makes a slam attack against that target, it can make an additional slam attack against a second creature within 5 feet of the first target as a bonus action.

attributes.description: If the temple dog moves at least 10 feet straight toward a target and then makes a slam attack against that target, it can make an additional slam attack against a second creature within 5 feet of the first target as a bonus action.

6796d48c-2e8e-5f37-a5ed-5f00ba594dbc.name: Bite (Temple Dog)
6796d48c-2e8e-5f37-a5ed-5f00ba594dbc.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d8 + 4) piercing damage plus 9 (2d4 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14). The target must also make a successful DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

577d9cfd-54e6-5eb0-b468-fdff71f0ef5d.name: Slam (Temple Dog)
577d9cfd-54e6-5eb0-b468-fdff71f0ef5d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone and pushed 5 feet. The temple dog can immediately enter the position the target was pushed out of, if it chooses to.

9f197436-ebd3-55f0-b5d4-d70ebf76f7a7.name: Air Mastery
9f197436-ebd3-55f0-b5d4-d70ebf76f7a7.description: Airborne creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against the thuellai.

attributes.description: Airborne creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against the thuellai.

4eaa3e05-88fe-5585-86a4-7fe18f295d7f.name: Snow Vision
4eaa3e05-88fe-5585-86a4-7fe18f295d7f.description: The thuellai see perfectly well in snowy conditions. It does not suffer Wisdom (Perception) penalties from snow, whiteout, or snow blindness.

attributes.description: The thuellai see perfectly well in snowy conditions. It does not suffer Wisdom (Perception) penalties from snow, whiteout, or snow blindness.

8d1db678-d459-5fc0-aead-e55de7bee8ab.name: Algid Aura
8d1db678-d459-5fc0-aead-e55de7bee8ab.description: All creatures within 10 feet of a thuellai take 7 (2d6) cold damage at the beginning of the thuellai's turn. Spells or magical effects that protect against cold are affected as if by a dispel magic spell (the theullai's effective spellcasting bonus is +5) if a thuellai is within 20 feet of the target at the start of the theullai's turn, and nonmagical flames within 20 feet of the thuellai are extinguished at the start of its turn.

attributes.description: All creatures within 10 feet of a thuellai take 7 (2d6) cold damage at the beginning of the thuellai's turn. Spells or magical effects that protect against cold are affected as if by a dispel magic spell (the theullai's effective spellcasting bonus is +5) if a thuellai is within 20 feet of the target at the start of the theullai's turn, and nonmagical flames within 20 feet of the thuellai are extinguished at the start of its turn.

ea099610-2011-50fb-b83a-1a54e67d1050.name: Blizzard
ea099610-2011-50fb-b83a-1a54e67d1050.description: The thuellai creates an icy blizzard in the area around it. A 50-foot radius sphere surrounding the theullai fills with icy fog, whirling snow, and driving ice crystals. Vision is lightly obscured, and creatures have disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on vision or hearing. The ground in the affected area becomes difficult terrain. The effect lasts for 10 minutes and moves with the theullai.

82f57f98-281f-5617-a136-eebb995f3c9e.name: Claw (Thuellai)
82f57f98-281f-5617-a136-eebb995f3c9e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) slashing damage plus 26 (4d12) cold damage. If the target is wearing metal armor, it must make a successful DC 17 Constitution saving throw or gain one level of exhaustion.

6ec244e3-71fb-51f1-8a3b-424a2addd7f6.name: Freezing Breath
6ec244e3-71fb-51f1-8a3b-424a2addd7f6.description: The thuellai exhales an icy blast in a 40-foot cone. Each target in the area takes 39 (6d12) cold damage, or half damage with a successful DC 17 Constitution saving throw.

attributes.description: The thuellai exhales an icy blast in a 40-foot cone. Each target in the area takes 39 (6d12) cold damage, or half damage with a successful DC 17 Constitution saving throw.

681e15f5-e214-58e2-8a4f-43ac6626c9a4.name: Howl of the Maddening Wind
681e15f5-e214-58e2-8a4f-43ac6626c9a4.description:
a thuellai's howl can cause creatures to temporarily lose their minds and even to attack themselves or their companions. Each target within 100 feet of the theullai and able to hear the howl must make a successful DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or roll 1d8 and consult the table below at the start of its next turn. An affected creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns; a success ends the effect on itself, but a failure means it must roll again on the table below at the start of its next turn.

1 - Act normally

2-4 - Do nothing but babble incoherently

5-6 - Do 1d8 damage + Str modifier to self with item in hand

7-8 - Attack nearest target; select randomly if more than one

50b7aafd-fae6-5543-a5ee-60999efe0be6.name: Multiattack (Thuellai)
50b7aafd-fae6-5543-a5ee-60999efe0be6.description: The thuellai makes two claw attacks.

attributes.description: The thuellai makes two claw attacks.

812cd6de-38eb-5ac6-ae75-376812e63996.name: Cast Iron Stomach
812cd6de-38eb-5ac6-ae75-376812e63996.description: The giant can consume half of its weight in food without ill effect, and it has advantage against anything that would give it the poisoned condition. Poisonous and spoiled foodstuffs are common in a thursir lair.

attributes.description: The giant can consume half of its weight in food without ill effect, and it has advantage against anything that would give it the poisoned condition. Poisonous and spoiled foodstuffs are common in a thursir lair.

d236ed45-154a-5ab0-a2d3-6ae3cfe42410.name: Multiattack (Thursir Giant)
d236ed45-154a-5ab0-a2d3-6ae3cfe42410.description: The giant makes two warhammer attacks.

attributes.description: The giant makes two warhammer attacks.

a6684644-3b30-5074-91a3-aeb440f6ce1f.name: Rock (Thursir Giant)
a6684644-3b30-5074-91a3-aeb440f6ce1f.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 40/160 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 40/160 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

139395fd-c841-55ec-a89e-df8bf02fa883.name: Runic Blood
139395fd-c841-55ec-a89e-df8bf02fa883.description: Thursir giants can inscribe the thurs rune on a weapon. A creature hit by the weapon takes an additional 1d8 lightning damage, and the target can't take reactions until the start of its next turn. The thurs rune lasts for one hour, or for three hits, whichever comes first.

attributes.description: Thursir giants can inscribe the thurs rune on a weapon. A creature hit by the weapon takes an additional 1d8 lightning damage, and the target can't take reactions until the start of its next turn. The thurs rune lasts for one hour, or for three hits, whichever comes first.

e662cedc-a271-596a-ae38-5d91c321e4c8.name: Slither
e662cedc-a271-596a-ae38-5d91c321e4c8.description: If the titanoboa hasn't eaten a Huge creature in the last 24 hours, it can move through a space as narrow as 10 feet wide without squeezing, or 5 feet while squeezing.

attributes.description: If the titanoboa hasn't eaten a Huge creature in the last 24 hours, it can move through a space as narrow as 10 feet wide without squeezing, or 5 feet while squeezing.

95f62f53-8fa1-59fc-99bc-5e85cf090b6a.name: Sparkling Scales
95f62f53-8fa1-59fc-99bc-5e85cf090b6a.description: The titanoboa's scales refract light in iridescent cascades that are hypnotic to gaze upon. If the titanoboa is in bright light, a creature within 30 feet that looks at it must make a successful DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn. Unless surprised, a creature can avoid the saving throw by choosing to avert its eyes at the start of its turn. A creature that averts its eyes can't see the titanoboa until the start of its next turn, when it can choose to avert its eyes again. If the creature looks at the titanoboa in the meantime, it must immediately make the saving throw.

attributes.description: The titanoboa's scales refract light in iridescent cascades that are hypnotic to gaze upon. If the titanoboa is in bright light, a creature within 30 feet that looks at it must make a successful DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn. Unless surprised, a creature can avoid the saving throw by choosing to avert its eyes at the start of its turn. A creature that averts its eyes can't see the titanoboa until the start of its next turn, when it can choose to avert its eyes again. If the creature looks at the titanoboa in the meantime, it must immediately make the saving throw.

51fb0bc4-6bf0-559a-9e68-30b44d51b13b.name: Bite (Titanoboa)
51fb0bc4-6bf0-559a-9e68-30b44d51b13b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d8 + 8) piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw or be swallowed by the titanoboa. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the snake, and takes 21 (6d6) acid damage at the start of each of the titanoboa's turns. If the titanoboa takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the titanoboa must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which fall prone in a space within 10 feet of the titanoboa. If the titanoboa dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 20 feet of movement, exiting prone.

42726730-3ba8-5b9a-a19d-ec6559ea9900.name: Constrict (Titanoboa)
42726730-3ba8-5b9a-a19d-ec6559ea9900.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (3d12 + 8) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 18). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the titanoboa can't constrict another target.

a2149fdb-6e47-5c15-95bc-60cabbc24a2c.name: Multiattack (Titanoboa)
a2149fdb-6e47-5c15-95bc-60cabbc24a2c.description: The titanoboa makes one bite attack and one constrict attack.

attributes.description: The titanoboa makes one bite attack and one constrict attack.

03c314cf-ffa5-5af8-b3d8-8a2cb771ffc1.name: Burning Belly
03c314cf-ffa5-5af8-b3d8-8a2cb771ffc1.description: Creatures inside a tophet's burning core take 21 (6d6) fire damage at the start of each of the tophet's turns. Escaping from a tophet's belly takes 10 feet of movement and a successful DC 16 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check.

attributes.description: Creatures inside a tophet's burning core take 21 (6d6) fire damage at the start of each of the tophet's turns. Escaping from a tophet's belly takes 10 feet of movement and a successful DC 16 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check.

4dcee5bc-34c4-5f7a-aa51-c245bf30f578.name: Fiery Heart
4dcee5bc-34c4-5f7a-aa51-c245bf30f578.description: A tophet's inner fire can be ignited or doused at will. Its heat is such that all creatures have resistance to cold damage while within 30 feet of the tophet.

attributes.description: A tophet's inner fire can be ignited or doused at will. Its heat is such that all creatures have resistance to cold damage while within 30 feet of the tophet.

ebffc239-6205-5c0d-a65d-5f0141581845.name: Gout of Flame
ebffc239-6205-5c0d-a65d-5f0141581845.description: The tophet targets a point within 100 feet of itself that it can see. All targets within 10 feet of that point take 22 (4d10) fire damage, or half damage with a successful DC 16 Dexterity saving throw.

attributes.description: The tophet targets a point within 100 feet of itself that it can see. All targets within 10 feet of that point take 22 (4d10) fire damage, or half damage with a successful DC 16 Dexterity saving throw.

3290c8db-5c47-50c4-aebe-39388dc8e89d.name: Multiattack (Tophet)
3290c8db-5c47-50c4-aebe-39388dc8e89d.description: A tophet makes two attacks, no more than one of which can be a gout of flame.

attributes.description: A tophet makes two attacks, no more than one of which can be a gout of flame.

d0fc5e54-4459-5145-9c15-96e50a222bd3.name: Slam (Tophet)
d0fc5e54-4459-5145-9c15-96e50a222bd3.description: Melee Weapon Attack. +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (1d10+7) bludgeoning damage. The target is also knocked inside the tophet's burning belly if the attack scores a critical hit.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack. +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (1d10+7) bludgeoning damage. The target is also knocked inside the tophet's burning belly if the attack scores a critical hit.

14dc9304-65aa-5fbe-a052-3599fef68be0.name: Gliding Wings
14dc9304-65aa-5fbe-a052-3599fef68be0.description: The tosculi drone can use its wings to slowly descend when falling (as if under the effect of the feather fall spell). It can move up to 5 feet horizontally for every foot it falls. The tosculi drone can't gain height with these wings alone. If subjected to a strong wind or lift of any kind, it can use the updraft to glide farther.

f0a87abb-1150-542d-86c9-5574977c7865.name: Skittering
f0a87abb-1150-542d-86c9-5574977c7865.description: Up to two tosculi can share the same space at one time. The tosculi has advantage on melee attack rolls while sharing its space with another tosculi that isn't incapacitated.

attributes.description: Up to two tosculi can share the same space at one time. The tosculi has advantage on melee attack rolls while sharing its space with another tosculi that isn't incapacitated.

df1c898e-1958-5d41-938b-af0a7f0d4921.name: Deadly Precision
df1c898e-1958-5d41-938b-af0a7f0d4921.description: The tosculi elite bow raider's ranged attacks do an extra 9 (2d8) damage (included below).

17536740-a002-5164-a5f9-5274bb202216.name: Evasive (Tosculi Elite Bow Raider)
17536740-a002-5164-a5f9-5274bb202216.description: Ranged weapon attacks against the tosculi elite bow raider have disadvantage.

attributes.description: Ranged weapon attacks against the tosculi elite bow raider have disadvantage.

820b034a-7288-5f85-ab54-d15ba29b6d03.name: Keen Smell (Tosculi Elite Bow Raider)
820b034a-7288-5f85-ab54-d15ba29b6d03.description: The tosculi elite bow raider has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

attributes.description: The tosculi elite bow raider has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

4d88db09-363e-51f1-bb64-d569448f4aa8.name: Skirmisher
4d88db09-363e-51f1-bb64-d569448f4aa8.description: The tosculi elite bow raider can Dash as a bonus action.

a0c05a1d-924a-580e-92c2-1e14911103cb.name: Claws (Tosculi Elite Bow Raider)
a0c05a1d-924a-580e-92c2-1e14911103cb.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) slashing damage.

2186ea14-8bdf-5af7-a472-034bfa2e8ca1.name: Longbow (Tosculi Elite Bow Raider)
2186ea14-8bdf-5af7-a472-034bfa2e8ca1.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d8 + 4) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d8 + 4) piercing damage.

5520802f-d1ac-5301-88f4-9edd46795a68.name: Multiattack (Tosculi Elite Bow Raider)
5520802f-d1ac-5301-88f4-9edd46795a68.description: The tosculi elite bow raider makes two longbow attacks or two claws attacks.

attributes.description: The tosculi elite bow raider makes two longbow attacks or two claws attacks.

744352d5-6de0-5998-8838-af0b73eeff4f.name: Hive Mind (Tosculi Hive-Queen)
744352d5-6de0-5998-8838-af0b73eeff4f.description: The hive-queen is the psychic nexus for every tosculi in her hive. She is aware of the direction and distance to all members of the hive, can telepathically communicate with them when they are within 20 miles, and can sense what they sense when they are within 1 mile of her. Tosculi from her hive that travel more than 20 miles away instinctively know the direction and distance to the hive and try to return. Hive-queens sometimes dispatch rescue missions to recover separated members of the hive.

She is aware of the direction and distance to all members of the hive, can telepathically communicate with them when they are within 20 miles, and can sense what they sense when they are within 1 mile of her. Tosculi from her hive that travel more than 20 miles away instinctively know the direction and distance to the hive and try to return. Hive-queens sometimes dispatch rescue missions to recover separated members of the hive.

d1fa4b6c-d9ae-5826-aeb6-6b2b42f2769f.name: Hive Queen Lair
d1fa4b6c-d9ae-5826-aeb6-6b2b42f2769f.description:
on initiative count 20 (losing initiative ties), the hive-queen takes a lair action to cause one of the following effects:

- The tosculi hive-queen releases a cloud of pheromones that drives the tosculi to fight harder. All tosculi within 60 feet of the hive-queen (including the hive-queen herself) regain 7 (2d6) hit points.

- A swarm of tiny tosculi offspring crawls from its nest and attacks a creature within 120 feet of the hive-queen, automatically doing 10 (4d4) piercing damage. Then the swarm dies. 

- The ceiling above one creature that the hive-queen can see within 120 feet of her drips sticky resin. The creature must make a successful DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or be encased in rapidly-hardening resin. A creature encased this way is restrained. It can free itself, or another creature within 5 feet can free it, by using an action to make a successful DC 15 Strength check. If the creature is still encased the next time the initiative count reaches 20, the resin hardens, trapping it. The trapped creature can't move or speak; attack rolls against it have disadvantage because it is encased in resin armor; it automatically fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws; and it has resistance to all damage. The trapped creature is released when the resin is destroyed (AC 10, 20 HP, immune to cold, fire, necrotic, poison, psychic, radiant, and piercing damage). 

the tosculi hive-queen can't repeat an effect until they have all been used, and she can't use the same effect two rounds in a row.

3fd040d3-799f-55a6-a25d-073d984e4dd9.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Tosculi Hive-Queen)
3fd040d3-799f-55a6-a25d-073d984e4dd9.description: If the hive-queen fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

attributes.description: If the hive-queen fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

24173149-3c2f-5d7d-8231-2595b715d005.name: Regional Effects (Tosculi Hive-Queen)
24173149-3c2f-5d7d-8231-2595b715d005.description:
the region containing a tosculi hive-queen's lair is warped by the creature's presence, which creates one or more of the following effects:

- Intelligent creatures within 6 miles suffer frequent headaches. It's as if they had a constant buzzing inside their heads. 

- Beasts within 6 miles are more irritable and violent than usual and have the Blood Frenzy trait:The beast has advantage on melee attack rolls against a creature that doesn't have all its hit points. 

if the tosculi hive-queen dies, the buzzing disappears immediately, and the beasts go back to normal within 1d10 days.

cab2ac04-1a44-5d98-b64d-21b90e80fd3f.name: Flight
cab2ac04-1a44-5d98-b64d-21b90e80fd3f.description: The hive-queen flies up to half its flying speed.

attributes.description: The hive-queen flies up to half its flying speed.
The hive-queen uses Glitter Dust.

57870c98-f9a8-5343-b3ed-708c6fb49cd8.name: Implant Egg (Tosculi Hive-Queen)
57870c98-f9a8-5343-b3ed-708c6fb49cd8.description: The hive-queen implants an egg into an incapacitated creature within 5 feet of her that is neither undead nor a construct. Until the egg hatches or is removed, the creature is poisoned, paralyzed, and does not need to eat or drink. The egg hatches in 1d6 weeks, and the larval tosculi kills the host creature. The implanted egg can be removed with a successful DC 20 Wisdom (Medicine) check or by a spell or magical effect that cures disease.

2caef4b7-2361-5f40-9133-277fa93c57eb.name: Multiattack (Tosculi Hive-Queen)
2caef4b7-2361-5f40-9133-277fa93c57eb.description: The hive-queen makes four scimitar attacks.

1569ccc7-6bf7-5c8f-bef6-e397dc13d5be.name: Stinger (Tosculi Hive-Queen)
1569ccc7-6bf7-5c8f-bef6-e397dc13d5be.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (1d6 + 7) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. A paralyzed target repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

5e764001-47fa-53bb-be26-3c98ed12cc81.description: Up to two tosculi can share the same space at one time. The tosculi has advantage on attack rolls while sharing its space with another tosculi that isn't incapacitated.

e0a56529-35ee-5438-b9d3-bb8231878ed2.name: Bite (Tosculi Warrior)
e0a56529-35ee-5438-b9d3-bb8231878ed2.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d4 + 5) piercing damage.

c891885b-2166-5579-bb2c-819c797448fc.name: Claws (Tosculi Warrior)
c891885b-2166-5579-bb2c-819c797448fc.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d4 + 5) slashing damage.

7c7f994b-9163-5bb3-82ef-59f4a4717c91.name: Multiattack (Tosculi Warrior)
7c7f994b-9163-5bb3-82ef-59f4a4717c91.description: The tosculi warrior makes one bite attack, one claws attack, and one stinger attack.

f09d77d2-cb9b-5eb2-b2d3-3a84339b11a7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one paralyzed creature. Hit: 10 (2d4 + 5) piercing damage, and the target is paralyzed for 8 hours. The paralysis can be ended with a successful DC 20 Wisdom (Medicine) check or by a spell or magical effect that cures disease. (Because only paralyzed creatures can be targeted, a hit by this attack is automatically a critical hit; bonus damage is included in the damage listing.)

eb974661-e305-5831-bfba-d5da2e8039f8.name: Amorphous (Treacle)
eb974661-e305-5831-bfba-d5da2e8039f8.description: The treacle can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

7d1da577-d4f5-5701-9f74-c83121241fd9.name: Charming Presence
7d1da577-d4f5-5701-9f74-c83121241fd9.description: The treacle has an uncanny ability to sense and to play off of another creature's emotions. It uses Charisma (Deception) to oppose Wisdom (Insight or Perception) skill checks made to see through its ruse, and it has advantage on its check.

19472121-de05-5de1-bbff-b0156ee00bc8.name: Blood Drain (1/hour)
19472121-de05-5de1-bbff-b0156ee00bc8.description: A treacle touching the skin of a warm-blooded creature inflicts 4 (1d8) necrotic damage per hour of contact, and the victim's maximum hit points are reduced by the same number. Blood is drained so slowly that the victim doesn't notice the damage unless he or she breaks contact with the treacle (sets it down or hands it to someone else, for example). When contact is broken, the victim notices blood on his or her skin or clothes with a successful DC 13 Wisdom (Perception) check.

ae34d88f-7051-573c-a7dd-be503dbeea6c.name: Reshape

ff711791-bdf2-5e30-8609-fd95542726f3.name: Regeneration (Trollkin Reaver)
ff711791-bdf2-5e30-8609-fd95542726f3.description: The trollkin reaver regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn. This trait doesn't function if the trollkin took acid or fire damage since the end of its previous turn. The trollkin dies if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.

4a455a1b-4fbd-55cf-88dc-f84e7bf78f79.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage or 9 (1d10 + 4) slashing damage if used with two hands. Using the battleaxe two-handed prevents using the handaxe.

6cde23a4-5407-5aad-a154-29adec1f0c9d.description: Up to three allies who can hear the trollkin reaver and are within 30 feet of it can each make one melee attack as a reaction.

0b7b97b4-b7e3-5605-82e9-2ea5ff8c5c0a.name: Multiattack (Trollkin Reaver)
0b7b97b4-b7e3-5605-82e9-2ea5ff8c5c0a.description: The trollkin raider makes three melee attacks: two with its claws and one with its bite, or two with its battleaxe and one with its handaxe, or it makes two ranged attacks with its handaxes.

aa15db7b-51b6-554f-9eb8-10ebfb6e856c.name: Tendril Curtain
aa15db7b-51b6-554f-9eb8-10ebfb6e856c.description: When the tusked skyfish is flying, its wispy, electrified tendrils dangle beneath it and touch all creatures within 20 feet directly below its space as it moves. Any creatures in the path of its movement take 10 (3d6) lightning damage, or half damage with a successful DC 13 Dexterity saving throw.

c720f7d8-a0a3-5a50-bde8-3f016cba385d.name: Gore (Tusked Skyfish)
c720f7d8-a0a3-5a50-bde8-3f016cba385d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) piercing damage.

19a9183c-6be9-5f5a-ada0-f6b77d227f2a.name: Multiattack (Tusked Skyfish)
19a9183c-6be9-5f5a-ada0-f6b77d227f2a.description: The tusked skyfish makes one gore attack and one tentacles attack.

attributes.description: The tusked skyfish makes one gore attack and one tentacles attack.

8b1313df-fa79-5111-92ca-373eff698302.name: Stench Spray
8b1313df-fa79-5111-92ca-373eff698302.description: The tusked skyfish sprays foul-smelling liquid in a line 20 feet long and 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a successful DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 minute. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the creature falls unconscious for the same duration. A poisoned creature repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

dbd15758-2cfb-585b-87bf-563e12239dfa.name: Tentacles
dbd15758-2cfb-585b-87bf-563e12239dfa.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) lightning damage. The target is also grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. While grappling the target, the tusked skyfish can't use this attack against other targets. When the tusked skyfish moves, a Medium or smaller target it is grappling moves with it.

6caf6c77-d3b3-5a50-bce5-1aee547fe731.name: Incorporeal Movement (Umbral Vampire)
6caf6c77-d3b3-5a50-bce5-1aee547fe731.description: The umbral vampire can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attributes.description: The umbral vampire can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

19d9679a-0bde-5ea5-85af-abd0ccb524cb.name: Innate Spellcasting (Umbral Vampire)
19d9679a-0bde-5ea5-85af-abd0ccb524cb.description:
the umbral vampire's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15). The umbral vampire can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: mirror image, plane shift (plane of shadows only)

1/day each: bane (when in dim light or darkness only), black tentacles

a2916f1b-71f6-50bd-be49-685f52ec1128.name: Shadow Blend (Umbral Vampire)
a2916f1b-71f6-50bd-be49-685f52ec1128.description: When in dim light or darkness, the umbral vampire can Hide as a bonus action, even while being observed.

attributes.description: When in dim light or darkness, the umbral vampire can Hide as a bonus action, even while being observed.

eb8c96fa-c7f5-560b-90b3-3f448d90ce11.name: Strike from Shadow
eb8c96fa-c7f5-560b-90b3-3f448d90ce11.description: The reach of the umbral vampire's umbral grasp attack increases by 10 feet and its damage increases by 4d6 when both the umbral vampire and the target of the attack are in dim light or darkness and the umbral vampire is hidden from its target.

attributes.description: The reach of the umbral vampire's umbral grasp attack increases by 10 feet and its damage increases by 4d6 when both the umbral vampire and the target of the attack are in dim light or darkness and the umbral vampire is hidden from its target.

dff1b3e3-8781-543e-97b3-b02786fb9470.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Umbral Vampire)
dff1b3e3-8781-543e-97b3-b02786fb9470.description: While in direct sunlight, the umbral vampire has disadvantage on attack rolls and on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

attributes.description: While in direct sunlight, the umbral vampire has disadvantage on attack rolls and on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

be1ad41b-a8d3-525b-a9e3-747376eb9466.name: Umbral Grasp
be1ad41b-a8d3-525b-a9e3-747376eb9466.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (4d6 + 4) cold damage and the target's Strength score is reduced by 1d6. The target dies if this reduces its Strength to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a short or long rest. If a non-evil humanoid dies from this attack, a shadow rises from the corpse 1d4 hours later.

4abb9ae3-75cb-5be2-ada1-64f5f2924694.name: Flyby (Uraeus)
4abb9ae3-75cb-5be2-ada1-64f5f2924694.description: The uraeus doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

attributes.description: The uraeus doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

2ce45917-2c97-58a4-85b7-8dd2e8e37b14.name: Ward Bond
2ce45917-2c97-58a4-85b7-8dd2e8e37b14.description: As a bonus action, the uraeus forms a magical bond with a willing creature within 5 feet. Afterward, no matter how great the distance between them, the uraeus knows the distance and direction to its bonded ward and is aware of the creature's general state of health. The bond lasts until the uraeus or the ward dies, or the uraeus ends the bond as an action.

7473e3c4-a84e-5633-a15e-f45c8e621d87.name: Bite (Uraeus)
7473e3c4-a84e-5633-a15e-f45c8e621d87.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) poison damage, and the target must make a successful DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. While poisoned in this way, the target takes 9 (2d8) fire damage at the start of its turn. A poisoned creature repeats the saving throw at the end of its turn, ending the effect on a success.

8a134df4-b526-56d9-8160-2b9fda8b3794.name: Bonded Savior
8a134df4-b526-56d9-8160-2b9fda8b3794.description: When the uraeus' bonded ward takes damage, the uraeus can transfer the damage to itself instead. The uraeus' damage resistance and immunity don't apply to transferred damage.

e50866ae-eb05-5e29-a333-993ac7698230.name: Searing Breath
e50866ae-eb05-5e29-a333-993ac7698230.description: The uraeus exhales a 15-foot cone of fire. Creatures in the area take 10 (3d6) fire damage, or half damage with a successful DC 12 Dexterity saving throw.

attributes.description: The uraeus exhales a 15-foot cone of fire. Creatures in the area take 10 (3d6) fire damage, or half damage with a successful DC 12 Dexterity saving throw.

d4363d69-e99b-5418-9cb8-f59c7bee7e41.name: Death Throes
d4363d69-e99b-5418-9cb8-f59c7bee7e41.description: When a strangling watcher dies, it releases all the fear it consumed in its lifetime in a single, soul-rending wave. All creatures within 60 feet of it must succeed on a DC 19 Charisma saving throw or become frightened. A frightened creature takes 13 (2d12) psychic damage at the start of each of its turns from the centuries of accumulated dread. It can repeat the Charisma saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

It can repeat the Charisma saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

5af10ac5-6c20-52a6-9814-2dff4f28d2ff.name: Innate Spellcasting (Urochar (Strangling Watcher))
5af10ac5-6c20-52a6-9814-2dff4f28d2ff.description:
the watcher's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 19). It can cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: feather fall

3/day each: blur, meld into stone, phantasmal killer

1/day each: black tentacles, eyebite, greater invisibility

49052a62-7d94-5fdf-bb71-d58290ab46b4.name: Spider Climb (Urochar (Strangling Watcher))
49052a62-7d94-5fdf-bb71-d58290ab46b4.description: The watcher can climb any surface, including upside down on ceilings, without making an ability check.

attributes.description: The watcher can climb any surface, including upside down on ceilings, without making an ability check.

24bbd826-44c6-52ff-b51b-31fcd55fe8c5.name: Squeeze
24bbd826-44c6-52ff-b51b-31fcd55fe8c5.description: Despite their size, strangling watchers have slender, boneless bodies, enabling them to squeeze through passages only a Small-sized creature could fit through, without affecting their movement or combat capabilities.

attributes.description: Despite their size, strangling watchers have slender, boneless bodies, enabling them to squeeze through passages only a Small-sized creature could fit through, without affecting their movement or combat capabilities.

f9edc120-2027-51a9-a53b-28d29adca292.name: Crush Attack
f9edc120-2027-51a9-a53b-28d29adca292.description: The urochar crushes one creature grappled by its tentacle. The target takes 25 (4d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: The urochar crushes one creature grappled by its tentacle. The target takes 25 (4d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.

c35c696b-ee2c-542b-b78b-6766d1be39f1.name: Multiattack (Urochar (Strangling Watcher))
c35c696b-ee2c-542b-b78b-6766d1be39f1.description: The watcher makes four attacks with its tentacles.

attributes.description: The watcher makes four attacks with its tentacles.

a5202cb5-568a-583c-9ddf-4331078e64aa.name: Paralyzing Gaze
a5202cb5-568a-583c-9ddf-4331078e64aa.description: The watcher can target one creature within 60 feet with its eerie gaze. The target must succeed on a DC 19 Wisdom saving throw or become paralyzed for 1 minute. The paralyzed target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success. If a target's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the target is immune to the watcher's gaze for the next 24 hours.

The paralyzed target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success. If a target's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the target is immune to the watcher's gaze for the next 24 hours.

7c4c889b-4986-566d-9b56-b304ff2959af.name: Tentacle (Urochar (Strangling Watcher))
7c4c889b-4986-566d-9b56-b304ff2959af.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. Each of its four tentacles can grapple one target.

77f39d6f-90cc-5113-a1a7-1e5223ed45dc.name: Tentacle Attack
77f39d6f-90cc-5113-a1a7-1e5223ed45dc.description: The watcher makes one tentacle attack.

1dfde42f-cdbf-579b-ae94-07e5802e0966.name: Tentacle Leap
1dfde42f-cdbf-579b-ae94-07e5802e0966.description: Using a tentacle, the urochar moves up to 20 feet to an unoccupied space adjacent to a wall, ceiling, floor, or other solid surface. This move doesn't trigger reactions. The urochar must have at least one tentacle free (not grappling a creature) to use this action. Grappled creatures move with the urochar.

7b356d72-d229-5561-a207-db4c755ae873.name: Dynastic Aura
7b356d72-d229-5561-a207-db4c755ae873.description: A creature that starts its turn within 15 feet of the ushabti must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, unless the ushabti is incapacitated. On a failed save, the creature has its breath stolen; it takes 9 (2d8) necrotic damage, and until the end of the ushabti's next turn, can't cast spells that require a verbal component or speak louder than a whisper. If a creature's saving throw is successful, the creature is immune to this ushabti's Dynastic Aura for the next 24 hours.

2c5dbc27-d01d-5379-9491-4d64eca0a5a6.name: Healing Leech
2c5dbc27-d01d-5379-9491-4d64eca0a5a6.description: If a creature within 30 feet of the ushabti regains hit points from a spell or a magical effect, the creature gains only half the normal number of hit points and the ushabti gains the other half.

f9ee7144-728a-56b1-8f05-5fd3bad49025.name: Immutable Form (Ushabti)
f9ee7144-728a-56b1-8f05-5fd3bad49025.description: The ushabti is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

6741863f-f6ed-5abb-853c-497c84077631.description: The ushabti has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The ushabti has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

50f28081-875a-5d12-aaa5-91521cf13ca8.name: Magic Weapons (Ushabti)
50f28081-875a-5d12-aaa5-91521cf13ca8.description: The ushabti's weapon attacks are magical.

081ceccb-d4ef-5f45-9ad8-29691cd77c91.name: Medjai's Scepter
081ceccb-d4ef-5f45-9ad8-29691cd77c91.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

7654822e-bdb9-5b6b-aad3-65eceeaae366.name: Multiattack (Ushabti)
7654822e-bdb9-5b6b-aad3-65eceeaae366.description: The ushabti makes one attack with Medjai's scepter and one with its khopesh.

attributes.description: The ushabti makes one attack with Medjai's scepter and one with its khopesh.

5ab25805-da1c-58b9-bbdf-24fef0ec7f64.name: Covetous Bond
5ab25805-da1c-58b9-bbdf-24fef0ec7f64.description: Corpse-black vaettir can see the face of any creature holding or carrying any item the vaettir ever claimed as its own. It also detects the direction and distance to items it ever owned, so long as that item is currently owned by another. If the item changes hands, the new owner becomes the target of the vaettir's hunt. Bone-white vaettir see individuals who have offended them. Neither time nor distance affects these abilities, so long as both parties are on the same plane.

It also detects the direction and distance to items it ever owned, so long as that item is currently owned by another. If the item changes hands, the new owner becomes the target of the vaettir's hunt. Bone-white vaettir see individuals who have offended them. Neither time nor distance affects these abilities, so long as both parties are on the same plane.

87f7d259-a1bb-5686-865f-6370989a89d6.name: Deathless
87f7d259-a1bb-5686-865f-6370989a89d6.description: The vaettir is destroyed when reduced to 0 hit points, but it returns to unlife where it fell on the next nightfall with full hit points. It can be killed only by removing its head, burning the corpse, and dumping the ashes in the sea, or by returning it to its burial mound, placing an open pair of scissors on its chest, and driving pins through its feet.

the vaettir's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 12). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

1/day each: enlarge/reduce, phantom steed

1/week each: bestow curse, geas, remove curse

7af6e669-ce12-5702-9380-6db8668fc040.description: Vaettir avoid daylight. A vaettir in direct sunlight has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

2db83013-35b6-5425-8b1d-9b0352194f79.description: The vaettir spews forth a 15.foot cone of putrid gas. Those caught in the area must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1d4 rounds.

cc2f34ac-1f86-5504-8aa6-73466e81fe78.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage.

a67666c4-1f31-520c-ba55-ef60f22051f9.name: Maddening Gaze
a67666c4-1f31-520c-ba55-ef60f22051f9.description: The vaettir can lock eyes with a creature and drive it mad. Any creature within 30 feet of a vaettir that is the focus of its gaze must make a DC 12 Charisma saving throw or become confused (as the spell) for 1d4 rounds. If the save is successful, the target is immune to the effect for 24 hours.

ed9f9872-b575-581a-9b09-3455139a9f28.name: Asgardian Weapons
ed9f9872-b575-581a-9b09-3455139a9f28.description: The valkyrie's weapon attacks are magical. When she hits with any weapon, it does an extra 11 (2d10) radiant damage (included in attacks listed below).

0d3c327f-e8f2-5414-aaf5-91b09727eb25.name: Cloak of Doom
0d3c327f-e8f2-5414-aaf5-91b09727eb25.description: Any living creature that starts its turn within 60 feet of a valkyrie senses her unsettling presence and must succeed on a DC 16 Charisma saving throw or be frightened for 1d4 rounds. Those who succeed are immune to the effect for 24 hours. The valkyrie can suppress this aura at will.

4f926f1f-dfce-5a6d-9d74-88bfca2d3ec9.name: Gift of Tongues
4f926f1f-dfce-5a6d-9d74-88bfca2d3ec9.description: Valkyries become fluent in any language they hear spoken for at least 1 minute, and they retain this knowledge forever.

attributes.description: Valkyries become fluent in any language they hear spoken for at least 1 minute, and they retain this knowledge forever.

d18e0e80-b18b-5955-91c8-84cd29e6364a.name: Innate Spellcasting (Valkyrie)
d18e0e80-b18b-5955-91c8-84cd29e6364a.description:
the valkyrie's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 16, +8 to hit with spell attacks). She can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: bane, bless, invisibility, sacred flame, spare the dying, speak with animals, thaumaturgy

5/day each: gentle repose, healing word, warding bond

3/day each: beacon of hope, mass healing word, revivify

1/day each: commune, death ward, freedom of movement, geas

c8e6f390-cf63-5b63-8681-868049df3d8e.name: Cast a Cantrip
c8e6f390-cf63-5b63-8681-868049df3d8e.description: The valkyrie casts one spell from her at-will list.

attributes.description: The valkyrie casts one spell from her at-will list.

a11d9ebe-6b9b-53c1-8ad7-e116e541a60f.name: Harvest the Fallen
a11d9ebe-6b9b-53c1-8ad7-e116e541a60f.description: A valkyrie can take the soul of a newly dead body and bind it into a weapon or shield. Only one soul can be bound to any object. Individuals whose souls are bound can't be raised by any means short of a wish or comparable magic. A valkyrie can likewise release any soul that has been bound by another valkyrie, or transfer a bound soul from one object to another. Once bound, the soul grants the item a +1 bonus for every 4 character levels of the soul (maximum of +3), and this replaces any other magic on the item. At the DM's discretion, part of this bonus can become an appropriate special quality (a fire giant's soul might create a flaming weapon, for example).

the vampire's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components.

at will: darkness, dominate person, invisibility, misty step

1/day each: arms of hadar, disguise self, dissonant whispers, detect thoughts, hold monster

e925e04f-8bba-5978-ba4f-470699c859df.name: Blood Puppet
e925e04f-8bba-5978-ba4f-470699c859df.description: The vampire warlock targets one humanoid it can see within 30 feet. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or be dominated by the vampire warlock as if it were the target of a dominate person spell. The target repeats the saving throw each time the vampire warlock or the vampire's companions do anything harmful to it, ending the effect on itself on a success. Otherwise, the effect lasts 24 hours or until the vampire warlock is destroyed, is on a different plane of existence than the target, or uses a bonus action to end the effect; the vampire warlock doesn't need to concentrate on maintaining the effect.

56d5c077-befb-5f53-b56e-500cef90c2ab.name: Bloody Arms

The called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the vampire warlock and obeying its spoken commands, and remain for 1 hour, until the vampire warlock dies, or until the vampire warlock dismisses them as a bonus action.

79c360cd-96f0-5811-b6e3-f632a569d122.name: Smoky Constitution
79c360cd-96f0-5811-b6e3-f632a569d122.description: The vapor lynx spends its time in both gaseous and solid form. Its unique constitution makes it immune to all fog- or gas-related spells and attacks, including its own. A vapor lynx sees clearly through light or heavy obscurement caused by fog, mist, or spells such as fog cloud.

attributes.description: The vapor lynx makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

abb38913-d3af-58e3-902d-eb1920f09778.name: Poison Breath (Vapor Lynx)
abb38913-d3af-58e3-902d-eb1920f09778.description: The vapor lynx exhales a 40- foot radius poison fog, which heavily obscures a spherical area around the lynx. Any breathing creature that ends its turn in the fog must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1d4 + 1 rounds.

attributes.description: The vapor lynx exhales a 40- foot radius poison fog, which heavily obscures a spherical area around the lynx. Any breathing creature that ends its turn in the fog must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1d4 + 1 rounds.

c12ec1c2-2350-5fbf-84d3-8547df821f77.name: Selket's Venom
c12ec1c2-2350-5fbf-84d3-8547df821f77.description: The venomous mummy's body and wrappings are magically imbued with substances that are highly toxic. Any creature that comes in physical contact with the venomous mummy (e.g., touching the mummy barehanded, grappling, using a bite attack) must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned with Selket's venom. The poisoned target takes 3 (1d6) poison damage every 10 minutes. Selket's venom is a curse, so it lasts until ended by the remove curse spell or comparable magic.

attributes.description: The venomous mummy's body and wrappings are magically imbued with substances that are highly toxic. Any creature that comes in physical contact with the venomous mummy (e.g., touching the mummy barehanded, grappling, using a bite attack) must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned with Selket's venom. The poisoned target takes 3 (1d6) poison damage every 10 minutes. Selket's venom is a curse, so it lasts until ended by the remove curse spell or comparable magic.

766e4e0e-42be-5563-b93a-a28428482c37.name: Toxic Smoke
766e4e0e-42be-5563-b93a-a28428482c37.description: The venomous mummy's poison-imbued wrappings and flesh create toxic fumes when burned. If a venomous mummy takes fire damage, it is surrounded by a cloud of toxic smoke in a 10-foot radius. This cloud persists for one full round. A creature that starts its turn inside the cloud or enters it for the first time on its turn takes 14 (4d6) poison damage, or half damage with a successful DC 12 Constitution saving throw.

attributes.description: The venomous mummy's poison-imbued wrappings and flesh create toxic fumes when burned. If a venomous mummy takes fire damage, it is surrounded by a cloud of toxic smoke in a 10-foot radius. This cloud persists for one full round. A creature that starts its turn inside the cloud or enters it for the first time on its turn takes 14 (4d6) poison damage, or half damage with a successful DC 12 Constitution saving throw.

4d72b3d7-94a5-53f0-a5ed-baa12f906082.name: Venomous Fist
4d72b3d7-94a5-53f0-a5ed-baa12f906082.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be affected by the Selket's venom curse (see above).

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be affected by the Selket's venom curse (see above).

27b9f7cd-548e-5c34-87f5-ac6ccf5682f8.name: False Appearance (Vesiculosa)
27b9f7cd-548e-5c34-87f5-ac6ccf5682f8.description: While the vesiculosa remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal pool of water.

attributes.description: While the vesiculosa remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal pool of water.

d7caaa1c-2052-53e2-975d-03c857fa6f97.name: Rich Sapphire Heartvine
d7caaa1c-2052-53e2-975d-03c857fa6f97.description: A vesiculosa's heartvine resembles a lump of sapphire and is highly prized by alchemists (worth 1,000 gp). It can be reached with an hour or two of hard digging.

attributes.description: A vesiculosa's heartvine resembles a lump of sapphire and is highly prized by alchemists (worth 1,000 gp). It can be reached with an hour or two of hard digging.

60e4fefe-2b82-526a-8207-5fa5aa02044b.name: Rootlet Swarms
60e4fefe-2b82-526a-8207-5fa5aa02044b.description: The vesiculosa is surrounded at all times by four Medium swarms of Tiny rootlets that move as the vesiculosa directs. Each swarm has a speed of 30 feet, can be targeted independently, has 25 hit points, and (unlike the parent plant) quite vulnerable to fire damage. Other than that, they have the same statistics as the vesiculosa's main body. For each swarm that drops to 0 hit points, the vesiculosa loses one of its Entrap attacks. A destroyed swarm regrows in 24 hours.

attributes.description: The vesiculosa is surrounded at all times by four Medium swarms of Tiny rootlets that move as the vesiculosa directs. Each swarm has a speed of 30 feet, can be targeted independently, has 25 hit points, and (unlike the parent plant) quite vulnerable to fire damage. Other than that, they have the same statistics as the vesiculosa's main body. For each swarm that drops to 0 hit points, the vesiculosa loses one of its Entrap attacks. A destroyed swarm regrows in 24 hours.

41690f1b-2313-557c-8f44-4258fddb71bb.name: Sweet Water
41690f1b-2313-557c-8f44-4258fddb71bb.description: The vesiculosa's pool emits a sweet fragrance that lures creatures to drink. Creatures that are neither undead nor constructs within 60 feet must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be compelled to approach the vesiculosa and drink. The water is cool and refreshing but carries a sleeping poison: any creature (other than undead and constructs) that drinks from it regains 1d4 hp and recovers from 1 level of exhaustion, but must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw against poison or fall unconscious for 1 minute. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the creature is unconscious for 1 hour. An unconscious creature wakes up if it takes damage or if another creature uses an action to shake it awake.

Creatures that are neither undead nor constructs within 60 feet must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or be compelled to approach the vesiculosa and drink. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the creature is unconscious for 1 hour. An unconscious creature wakes up if it takes damage or if another creature uses an action to shake it awake.

39f9f50c-95c5-54ff-8910-c02ae9bf5bf0.name: Verdant
39f9f50c-95c5-54ff-8910-c02ae9bf5bf0.description: The vesiculosa's sap seeps into the soil, promoting lush vegetation. At any given time, 3d6 beneficial fruits (fruit, nuts, figs, dates) can be found within 30 feet of the vesiculosa. These have the same effect as berries from a goodberry spell, but they retain their potency for one week after being picked or after the vesiculosa is killed.

At any given time, 3d6 beneficial fruits (fruit, nuts, figs, dates) can be found within 30 feet of the vesiculosa. These have the same effect as berries from a goodberry spell, but they retain their potency for one week after being picked or after the vesiculosa is killed.

05dee47c-ecfc-520e-aaf5-f3c4d52d7079.name: Engulf (Vesiculosa)
05dee47c-ecfc-520e-aaf5-f3c4d52d7079.description: The vesiculosa engulfs all restrained or unconscious creatures within 5 feet of its main body (up to 2 Large, 4 Medium or 8 Small creatures). An engulfed creature is restrained, has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the vesiculosa, and takes 21 (6d6) acid damage at the start of each of the vesiculosa's turns. When the vesiculosa moves, the engulfed creature moves with it. An engulfed creature can try to escape by using an action to make a DC 15 Strength check. On a success, the creature escapes and enters a space of its choice within 5 feet of the vesiculosa's main body.

An engulfed creature is restrained, has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the vesiculosa, and takes 21 (6d6) acid damage at the start of each of the vesiculosa's turns. When the vesiculosa moves, the engulfed creature moves with it. An engulfed creature can try to escape by using an action to make a DC 15 Strength check. On a success, the creature escapes and enters a space of its choice within 5 feet of the vesiculosa's main body.

f002bbdc-abf8-566e-95b2-88836891646b.name: Entrap
f002bbdc-abf8-566e-95b2-88836891646b.description: The vesiculosa targets a Large or smaller creature within 5 feet of one of its rootlet swarms. The target takes 10 (4d4) piercing damage and is grappled (escape DC 15), or takes half damage and isn't grappled if it makes a successful DC 17 Dexterity saving throw. Until the grapple ends, the target is restrained, it has disadvantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws, and that rootlet swarm can't entrap another target.

75063158-d082-5558-bac2-e3409ffef0d4.name: Multiattack (Vesiculosa)
75063158-d082-5558-bac2-e3409ffef0d4.description: The vesiculosa uses Entrap 4 times, and uses Reel and Engulf once each. It loses one Entrap attack for each rootlet swarm that's been destroyed.

attributes.description: The vesiculosa uses Entrap 4 times, and uses Reel and Engulf once each. It loses one Entrap attack for each rootlet swarm that's been destroyed.

884efee9-5ec5-5134-835f-6dd7c66cdabb.name: Reel (Vesiculosa)
884efee9-5ec5-5134-835f-6dd7c66cdabb.description: Each rootlet swarm that has a creature grappled moves up to 20 feet toward the vesiculosa's main body. Rootlets wander up to 100 feet from the main body.

attributes.description: Each rootlet swarm that has a creature grappled moves up to 20 feet toward the vesiculosa's main body. Rootlets wander up to 100 feet from the main body.

44434675-17b1-5471-927b-ac56769a9710.name: Dance of the Luckless (1/Day)
44434675-17b1-5471-927b-ac56769a9710.description: Vila who dance for one hour create a fairy ring of small gray mushrooms. The ring lasts seven days and has a 50-foot diameter per dancing vila. Non-vila who fall asleep (including magical sleep) inside the ring have disadvantage on skill checks for 24 hours from the time they awaken.

a8f89ead-ed3c-5621-9e65-760f59e3df0f.name: Forest Meld
a8f89ead-ed3c-5621-9e65-760f59e3df0f.description: A vila can meld into any tree in her forest for as long as she wishes, similar to the meld into stone spell.

attributes.description: A vila can meld into any tree in her forest for as long as she wishes, similar to the meld into stone spell.

c150bb48-30b6-5077-b28f-ee23e0527b8b.name: Forest Quickness
c150bb48-30b6-5077-b28f-ee23e0527b8b.description: While in forest surroundings, a vila receives a +4 bonus on initiative checks.

attributes.description: While in forest surroundings, a vila receives a +4 bonus on initiative checks.

7b9d886e-2488-5558-9fd0-6e6467043ced.name: Innate Spellcasting (Vila)
7b9d886e-2488-5558-9fd0-6e6467043ced.description:
the vila's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14). She can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

3/day: sleep

1/week: control weather

490a9ee4-7bc3-5184-8264-43e13bf97882.name: +1 Shortbow
490a9ee4-7bc3-5184-8264-43e13bf97882.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d6 + 6) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d6 + 6) piercing damage.

ff74d30d-3c89-51e4-8148-2d8718eff74a.name: +1 Shortsword
ff74d30d-3c89-51e4-8148-2d8718eff74a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d6 + 6) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d6 + 6) piercing damage.

945d8575-b6c9-53b8-ba44-82cfe8c62583.name: Fascinate
945d8575-b6c9-53b8-ba44-82cfe8c62583.description: When the vila sings, all those within 60 feet of her and who can hear her must make a successful DC 14 Charisma saving throw or be stunned for 1d4 rounds. Those who succeed on the saving throw are immune to that vila's singing for 24 hours.

attributes.description: When the vila sings, all those within 60 feet of her and who can hear her must make a successful DC 14 Charisma saving throw or be stunned for 1d4 rounds. Those who succeed on the saving throw are immune to that vila's singing for 24 hours.

333fa56b-1b59-52b7-8842-8ab115f7aef6.name: Forest Song
333fa56b-1b59-52b7-8842-8ab115f7aef6.description: The vila magically calls 2d6 wolves or 2 wampus cats. The called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the vila and obeying its spoken commands. The beasts remain for 1 hour, until the vila dies, or until the vila dismisses them as a bonus action.

4832fe89-eaa6-5691-a011-b2bf84acede7.name: Multiattack (Vila)
4832fe89-eaa6-5691-a011-b2bf84acede7.description: A vila makes two shortsword attacks or two shortbow attacks.

attributes.description: A vila makes two shortsword attacks or two shortbow attacks.

e85610b9-1de0-5cb5-95dc-43348315dc76.name: Close-in Slasher
e85610b9-1de0-5cb5-95dc-43348315dc76.description: The vile barber has advantage on attack rolls against any creature in the same space with it.

attributes.description: The vile barber has advantage on attack rolls against any creature in the same space with it.

188cf092-32fb-5b4e-8aeb-6eadcdf44efc.name: Inhumanly Quick
188cf092-32fb-5b4e-8aeb-6eadcdf44efc.description: The vile barber can take two bonus actions on its turn, instead of one. Each bonus action must be different; it can't use the same bonus action twice in a single turn.

attributes.description: The vile barber can take two bonus actions on its turn, instead of one. Each bonus action must be different; it can't use the same bonus action twice in a single turn.

70c3495e-dd80-5605-ab3e-226018bef6f1.name: Invasive
70c3495e-dd80-5605-ab3e-226018bef6f1.description: The vile barber can enter, move through, or even remain in a hostile creature's space regardless of the creature's size, without penalty.

attributes.description: The vile barber can enter, move through, or even remain in a hostile creature's space regardless of the creature's size, without penalty.

438d07a3-f5ff-5c92-ad08-5f5652614902.name: Nimble Escape
438d07a3-f5ff-5c92-ad08-5f5652614902.description: As a bonus action, the vile barber can take the Disengage or Hide action on each of its turns.

attributes.description: As a bonus action, the vile barber can take the Disengage or Hide action on each of its turns.

fce42b6e-39bc-5216-8445-1171c3076ced.name: Pilfer
fce42b6e-39bc-5216-8445-1171c3076ced.description: As a bonus action, the vile barber can take the Use an Object action or make a Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check.

attributes.description: As a bonus action, the vile barber can take the Use an Object action or make a Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check.

85506f4d-4460-5c81-8b1d-b9e85e1ce249.name: Shadow Step
85506f4d-4460-5c81-8b1d-b9e85e1ce249.description: As a bonus action, the vile barber magically teleports from an area of dim light or darkness it currently occupies, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 80 feet to any other area of dim light or darkness it can see. The barber then has advantage on the first melee attack it makes before the end of the turn.

The barber then has advantage on the first melee attack it makes before the end of the turn.

d3a2e62c-a5c9-58d6-916d-ea4251d89a58.name: Multiattack (Vile Barber)
d3a2e62c-a5c9-58d6-916d-ea4251d89a58.description: The vile barber makes two attacks with its straight razor.

attributes.description: The vile barber makes two attacks with its straight razor.

b7e1c6e4-4692-57bd-aac9-066be7625a97.name: Unclean Cut
b7e1c6e4-4692-57bd-aac9-066be7625a97.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature that is grappled by the vile barber, incapacitated, or restrained. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage. The creature and all its allies who see this attack must make successful DC 15 Wisdom saving throws or become frightened for 1d4 rounds.

35c5d8c6-25fa-5430-b35f-55876cc1c6e3.name: Green Strider
35c5d8c6-25fa-5430-b35f-55876cc1c6e3.description: The vine lord ignores movement restrictions and damage caused by natural undergrowth.

attributes.description: The vine lord ignores movement restrictions and damage caused by natural undergrowth.

931bf505-4d65-50a4-82e9-8252f088e7b9.name: Magic Resistance (Vine Lord)
931bf505-4d65-50a4-82e9-8252f088e7b9.description: The vine lord has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The vine lord has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

a5f7347b-4c7c-54c6-8d5e-27c0d864dc2b.name: Regeneration (Vine Lord)
a5f7347b-4c7c-54c6-8d5e-27c0d864dc2b.description: The vine lord regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and is within its home forest or jungle.

attributes.description: The vine lord regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and is within its home forest or jungle.

7279f043-f12a-5141-b0d5-c94034c3581d.name: Root Mind
7279f043-f12a-5141-b0d5-c94034c3581d.description: Within its home forest or jungle, the vine lord's blindsight extends to 60 ft., it succeeds on all Wisdom (Perception) checks, and it can't be surprised.

attributes.description: Within its home forest or jungle, the vine lord's blindsight extends to 60 ft., it succeeds on all Wisdom (Perception) checks, and it can't be surprised.

d942aa69-569a-5ae5-8392-103d29f8c04d.name: Awaken the Green
d942aa69-569a-5ae5-8392-103d29f8c04d.description: The vine lord magically animates one or two trees it can see within 60 feet of it. These trees have the same statistics as a treant, except they have Intelligence and Charisma scores of 1, they can't speak, and they have only the Slam action option. An animated tree acts as an ally of the vine lord. The tree remains animate for 1 day or until it dies; until the vine lord dies or is more than 120 feet from the tree; or until the vine lord takes a bonus action to turn it back into an inanimate tree. The tree then takes root if possible.

70eae107-a327-5950-954d-7ce24ad49589.name: Claw (Vine Lord)
70eae107-a327-5950-954d-7ce24ad49589.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) slashing damage.

401beb43-b0aa-5f2c-b689-3597042f7ee4.name: Multiattack (Vine Lord)
401beb43-b0aa-5f2c-b689-3597042f7ee4.description: The vine lord makes two claw attacks and four tendril attacks. A single creature can't be the target of more than one tendril attack per turn.

attributes.description: The vine lord makes two claw attacks and four tendril attacks. A single creature can't be the target of more than one tendril attack per turn.

bc6938f8-8746-5698-8dcd-40ca8f44e092.name: Spore Sacs (1/week)
bc6938f8-8746-5698-8dcd-40ca8f44e092.description: The vine lord can release seeds from specialized sacs on its tendrils. These seeds sprout into 1d4 green spore pods that reach maturity in 3 days. The pods contain noxious spores that are released when the pod is stepped on, picked, or otherwise tampered with. A humanoid or beast that inhales these spores must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw against disease or tendrils start growing inside the creature's body. If the disease is not cured within 3 months, the tendrils take over the creature's nervous system and the victim becomes a tendril puppet.

b18a669b-f469-53f0-8937-09d9f4da279f.name: Tendril (Vine Lord)
b18a669b-f469-53f0-8937-09d9f4da279f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d4 + 5) slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.

14966d9b-2928-5948-9967-d5b8b6f33b56.name: Green Strider (Vine Lord's Tendril Puppet)
14966d9b-2928-5948-9967-d5b8b6f33b56.description: The tendril puppet ignores movement restrictions and damage caused by natural undergrowth.

01e82dae-11ef-5d20-8f5c-ffb0b50763d2.name: Magic Resistance (Vine Lord's Tendril Puppet)
01e82dae-11ef-5d20-8f5c-ffb0b50763d2.description: The tendril puppet has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

14b2f5bf-65a0-5584-be57-f66fe402675a.name: Poor Vision
14b2f5bf-65a0-5584-be57-f66fe402675a.description: Tendril puppets see almost nothing beyond 30 feet away.

attributes.description: Tendril puppets see almost nothing beyond 30 feet away.

defcea0f-8cdb-53ea-b98c-04e5875cc917.name: Regeneration (Vine Lord's Tendril Puppet)
defcea0f-8cdb-53ea-b98c-04e5875cc917.description: The tendril puppet regains 5 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and is in jungle terrain.

5d85ccf9-a773-5685-99b5-b1daeeb5c719.name: Root Mind (Vine Lord's Tendril Puppet)
5d85ccf9-a773-5685-99b5-b1daeeb5c719.description: Within a vine lord's forest or jungle, the tendril puppet's blindsight extends to 60 feet, it succeeds on all Wisdom (Perception) checks, and it can't be surprised.

54ec7eab-9098-53e8-8102-2b63c2ba2966.name: Assegai
54ec7eab-9098-53e8-8102-2b63c2ba2966.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage, or 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

bd43431f-7244-5716-bebc-f4d848a17eed.name: Hurl Thorns
bd43431f-7244-5716-bebc-f4d848a17eed.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) piercing damage, and the thorn explodes in a 10-foot-radius sphere centered on the target. Every creature in the affected area other than the original target takes 4 (1d8) piercing damage, or half damage with a successful DC 13 Dexterity saving throw.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) piercing damage, and the thorn explodes in a 10-foot-radius sphere centered on the target. 1f5f0937-06a5-5d1c-b500-dead9a1c56e7.name: Regeneration (Vine Troll Skeleton)
1f5f0937-06a5-5d1c-b500-dead9a1c56e7.description: The vine troll skeleton regains 5 hit points at the start of its turn if it is within 10 feet of the duskthorn dryad's vines and it hasn't taken acid or fire damage since its previous turn. The skeleton dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate, or if the duskthorn dryad who created it dies, or if the troll's heart inside the dryad's or treant's tree is destroyed.

3b9390ba-d5ff-5d3b-9d95-34bd0449bb0c.name: Bite (Vine Troll Skeleton)

30738946-f980-59cb-921f-3d6d3dbb53b3.name: Claw (Vine Troll Skeleton)
30738946-f980-59cb-921f-3d6d3dbb53b3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) slashing damage.

86ce7720-5277-5616-aaf9-030528e950f8.name: Multiattack (Vine Troll Skeleton)
86ce7720-5277-5616-aaf9-030528e950f8.description: The skeleton makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

attributes.description: The skeleton makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

c9eb700f-9028-5162-8d40-f4c8a81f5319.name: Gravitic Breath (Void Dragon Wyrmling)
c9eb700f-9028-5162-8d40-f4c8a81f5319.description: The dragon exhales a 15-foot cube of powerful localized gravity, originating from the dragon. Falling damage in the area increases to 1d10 per 10 feet fallen. When a creature starts its turn within the area or enters it for the first time in a turn, including when the dragon creates the field, must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure the creature is restrained. On a success the creature's speed is halved as long as it remains in the field. A restrained creature repeats the saving throw at the end of its turn. The field persists until the dragon's breath recharges, and it can't use gravitic breath twice consecutively.

b7ecf572-4891-597c-be05-a6970114eeed.name: Stellar Flare Breath (Void Dragon Wyrmling)
b7ecf572-4891-597c-be05-a6970114eeed.description: The dragon exhales star fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage and 10 (3d6) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

7f94fb02-87a1-57bc-bd5a-653e2902e92d.name: Void Twist (Void Dragon Wyrmling)
7f94fb02-87a1-57bc-bd5a-653e2902e92d.description: When the dragon is hit by a ranged attack it can create a small rift in space to increase its AC by 2 against that attack. If the attack misses because of this increase the dragon can choose a creature within 30 feet to become the new target for that attack. Use the original attack roll to determine if the attack hits the new target.

39a0333a-1ac7-5444-8a69-587f12276d9e.name: Fed by Darkness
39a0333a-1ac7-5444-8a69-587f12276d9e.description: A voidling in magical darkness at the start of its turn heals 5 hit points.

attributes.description: A voidling in magical darkness at the start of its turn heals 5 hit points.

b13b37f6-edd9-5bf9-87b1-7f943eb5d0ac.name: Innate Spellcasting (Voidling)
b13b37f6-edd9-5bf9-87b1-7f943eb5d0ac.description:
the voidling's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 15, spell attack bonus +7). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: darkness, detect magic, fear

3/day each: eldritch blast (3 beams), black tentacles

1/day each: phantasmal force, reverse gravity

ca55beee-ffa2-57ae-9645-f463476d4405.name: Natural Invisibility
ca55beee-ffa2-57ae-9645-f463476d4405.description: A voidling in complete darkness is considered invisible to creatures that rely on normal vision or darkvision.

e52eab19-71e2-59e8-96d6-1fbdafd66090.name: Necrotic Burst
e52eab19-71e2-59e8-96d6-1fbdafd66090.description: The voidling releases a burst of necrotic energy in a 20-foot radius sphere centered on itself. Those in the area take 35 (10d6) necrotic damage, or half damage with a successful DC 17 Constitution saving throw.

attributes.description: The voidling releases a burst of necrotic energy in a 20-foot radius sphere centered on itself. Those in the area take 35 (10d6) necrotic damage, or half damage with a successful DC 17 Constitution saving throw.

13462df5-55f4-5790-b8ed-13435f12ad10.name: Tendril (Voidling)
13462df5-55f4-5790-b8ed-13435f12ad10.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d8 + 6) slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d8 + 6) slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) necrotic damage.

f8c3ce69-e86d-5cec-89e0-0c278cdd1115.name: Focused Animosity
f8c3ce69-e86d-5cec-89e0-0c278cdd1115.description: The wampus cat has advantage on melee attacks against any male she has seen employ divine magic or wield a holy symbol.

attributes.description: The wampus cat has advantage on melee attacks against any male she has seen employ divine magic or wield a holy symbol.

28120093-87c7-54ca-9798-9adde44e2f3d.name: Innate Spellcasting (Wampus Cat)
28120093-87c7-54ca-9798-9adde44e2f3d.description:
the wampus cat's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13). She can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: disguise self (appearance of a female human), mage hand

2/day: hex

attributes.description:
the wampus cat's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13). She can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: disguise self (appearance of a female human), mage hand

2/day: hex

51a959dd-0d61-5940-b645-2f2c43927c38.name: Magic Resistance (Wampus Cat)
51a959dd-0d61-5940-b645-2f2c43927c38.description: The wampus cat has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The wampus cat has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

a065affb-1adf-5079-ae7c-1145417bf714.name: Yowl
a065affb-1adf-5079-ae7c-1145417bf714.description: Intelligent creatures within 60 feet of the cat who are able to hear its voice must make a DC 13 Charisma saving throw. Those who fail find the sound of the wampus cat's voice pleasant and alluring, so that the cat has advantage on Charisma checks against them for 1 minute. The affected characters cannot attack the wampus cat during this time unless they are wounded in that time.

d49b9087-eaf0-5247-b192-20732d9a55b2.name: Amphibious (Water Leaper)
d49b9087-eaf0-5247-b192-20732d9a55b2.description: The water leaper can breathe both air and water.
