f80e08d2-5633-53d1-80d2-85fa832cf0a6.name: Camouflage (Water Leaper)
f80e08d2-5633-53d1-80d2-85fa832cf0a6.description: The water leaper has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks when underwater.

attributes.description: The water leaper has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks when underwater.

e743f7d0-8505-5167-8f29-0c8981a4f2e8.name: Bite (Water Leaper)
e743f7d0-8505-5167-8f29-0c8981a4f2e8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and the water leaper can't bite another target.

f2b88bcd-d529-5ab3-a454-bcc5658b63a1.name: Multiattack (Water Leaper)
f2b88bcd-d529-5ab3-a454-bcc5658b63a1.description: The water leaper uses its shriek and makes one bite attack and one stinger attack.

ebbd96ca-7282-5f50-8054-360dcf588d59.name: Shriek (Water Leaper)
ebbd96ca-7282-5f50-8054-360dcf588d59.description: The water leaper lets out a blood-curdling shriek. Every creature within 40 feet that can hear the water leaper must make a successful DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be frightened until the start of the water leaper's next turn. A creature that successfully saves against the shriek is immune to the effect for 24 hours.

6f5d3cc4-554c-53b0-89a2-e03e66602bbf.name: Stinger (Water Leaper)
6f5d3cc4-554c-53b0-89a2-e03e66602bbf.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage and the target must make a successful DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. While poisoned in this way, the creature takes 7 (2d6) poison damage at the start of its turn. A poisoned creature repeats the saving throw at the end of its turn, ending the effect on a success.

30b2f536-097f-596d-a208-664ebbb60f34.name: Swallow (Water Leaper)
30b2f536-097f-596d-a208-664ebbb60f34.description: The water leaper makes a bite attack against a medium or smaller creature it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is swallowed and the grapple ends. The swallowed target is blinded and restrained, and has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the water leaper. A swallowed target takes 10 (3d6) acid damage at the start of the water leaper's turn. The water leaper can have one creature swallowed at a time. If the water leaper dies, the swallowed creature is no longer restrained and can use 5 feet of movement to crawl, prone, out of the corpse.

c997c7b2-f94a-5367-9339-b485e76db417.name: Immutable Form (Weaving Spider)
c997c7b2-f94a-5367-9339-b485e76db417.description: The weaving spider is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The weaving spider is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

ccc2d7be-ff82-5811-b5d5-f0703d9ef587.name: Magic Resistance (Weaving Spider)
ccc2d7be-ff82-5811-b5d5-f0703d9ef587.description: The weaving spider has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The weaving spider has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

db910ca2-3a77-5db9-9f63-3e4fd94a379f.name: Multiattack (Weaving Spider)
db910ca2-3a77-5db9-9f63-3e4fd94a379f.description: The weaving spider makes two trimming blade attacks or two needle shuttle attacks.

614a0803-69e2-58fd-a4c3-507aed840efe.name: Poisoned Needle Shuttle
614a0803-69e2-58fd-a4c3-507aed840efe.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 30 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become paralyzed. The target repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself with a success.

7076d971-082e-52f3-ac94-239982a9ccbe.name: Trimming Blade
7076d971-082e-52f3-ac94-239982a9ccbe.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage and possible unmaking.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage and possible unmaking.

2fe90cdc-0d6f-51c0-b57d-535e8383e521.name: Unmaking
2fe90cdc-0d6f-51c0-b57d-535e8383e521.description: The weaving spider's speed and its slim, sharp blade can slice cloth, leather, and paper into scraps very quickly. Whenever a weaving spider's trimming blade attack roll exceeds the target's armor class by 5 or more, the target must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or one of their possessions becomes unusable or damaged until repaired (DM's choice)

Whenever a weaving spider's trimming blade attack roll exceeds the target's armor class by 5 or more, the target must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or one of their possessions becomes unusable or damaged until repaired (DM's choice)

c1435e38-e126-5af4-8feb-fbf2563cb5f6.name: Acidic Tears
c1435e38-e126-5af4-8feb-fbf2563cb5f6.description: Thick tears of dark sap stream continuously down the treant's face and trunk. These tears are highly acidic - anyone who attacks the treant from a range of 5 feet or less must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 6 (1d12) acid damage from splashed tears. This acidic matter continues doing 6 (1d12) acid damage at the start of each of the creature's turns until it or an adjacent ally uses an action to wipe off the tears or three rounds elapse.

This acidic matter continues doing 6 (1d12) acid damage at the start of each of the creature's turns until it or an adjacent ally uses an action to wipe off the tears or three rounds elapse.

4b5650f0-1d11-584b-918a-e688d267358b.name: Siege Monster (Weeping Treant)
4b5650f0-1d11-584b-918a-e688d267358b.description: The treant deals double damage to objects and structures.

attributes.description: The treant deals double damage to objects and structures.

555ea205-1b35-5eb1-905b-c3b481ccf638.name: Treespeech
555ea205-1b35-5eb1-905b-c3b481ccf638.description: A weeping treant can converse with plants, and most plants greet them with a friendly or helpful attitude.

attributes.description: A weeping treant can converse with plants, and most plants greet them with a friendly or helpful attitude.

34dc11aa-e72e-53c4-b289-d048506a3693.name: Multiattack (Weeping Treant)
34dc11aa-e72e-53c4-b289-d048506a3693.description: The treant makes three slam attacks.

attributes.description: The treant makes three slam attacks.

0abfdaa9-ef4c-588e-b39e-8adf22c40d8a.name: Rock (Weeping Treant)
0abfdaa9-ef4c-588e-b39e-8adf22c40d8a.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 60/180 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 60/180 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

cb2ecd83-e133-5730-a89c-362c1e3b6bfb.name: Slam (Weeping Treant)
cb2ecd83-e133-5730-a89c-362c1e3b6bfb.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

7263d8e3-6ca2-56e8-94b6-d203b8907de1.name: Bite (Wharfling)
7263d8e3-6ca2-56e8-94b6-d203b8907de1.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 10). Until this grapple ends, the wharfling can't use its bite on another target. While the target is grappled, the wharfling's bite attack hits it automatically.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 10). Until this grapple ends, the wharfling can't use its bite on another target. While the target is grappled, the wharfling's bite attack hits it automatically.

ed4841f6-a859-530e-905d-ec3eb6dabea1.name: Pilfer
ed4841f6-a859-530e-905d-ec3eb6dabea1.description: A wharfling that has an opponent grappled at the start of its turn can make a Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check as a bonus action. The DC for this check equals 10 plus the grappled target's Dexterity modifier. If the check is successful, the wharfling steals some small metallic object from the target, and the theft is unnoticed if the same result equals or exceeds the target's passive Perception. A wharfling flees with its treasure.

5499154c-e4a4-5dcf-811c-930c6c8f72a5.name: Swarm (Wharfling Swarm)
5499154c-e4a4-5dcf-811c-930c6c8f72a5.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a tiny wharfling. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

b0933a23-d67d-5434-8829-416ef93abafa.name: Bites (Wharfling Swarm)
b0933a23-d67d-5434-8829-416ef93abafa.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 21 (6d6) piercing damage, or 10 (3d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 21 (6d6) piercing damage, or 10 (3d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer.

abf3579f-875e-58f4-a0d8-f1d143b0fcf2.name: Locking Bite
abf3579f-875e-58f4-a0d8-f1d143b0fcf2.description: When a creature leaves a wharfling swarm's space, 1d3 wharflings remain grappled to them (escape DC 10). Each wharfling inflicts 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage at the start of the creature's turns until it escapes from the grapples.

attributes.description: When a creature leaves a wharfling swarm's space, 1d3 wharflings remain grappled to them (escape DC 10). Each wharfling inflicts 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage at the start of the creature's turns until it escapes from the grapples.

d4d93880-2c04-5759-ba00-d0bd6abf9f79.name: Pilfer (Wharfling Swarm)
d4d93880-2c04-5759-ba00-d0bd6abf9f79.description: A wharfling swarm makes 1d6 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks each round against every creature in the swarm's space. The DC for each check equals 10 plus the target creature's Dexterity modifier. For each successful check, the wharflings steal some small metallic object from the target, and the theft is unnoticed if the same result equals or exceeds the target's passive Perception.

attributes.description: A wharfling swarm makes 1d6 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks each round against every creature in the swarm's space. The DC for each check equals 10 plus the target creature's Dexterity modifier. For each successful check, the wharflings steal some small metallic object from the target, and the theft is unnoticed if the same result equals or exceeds the target's passive Perception.

6bb51165-0781-5c7c-984b-bb5ab81020bd.name: Arcane Wasting (Disease)
6bb51165-0781-5c7c-984b-bb5ab81020bd.description: When the bodily fluid of an infected creature touches a humanoid or when an infected creature casts a spell (direct or indirect) on a humanoid, that humanoid must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or become infected with arcane wasting. Beginning 1d6 days after infection, the infected creature must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the end of each long rest. If the saving throw fails, the victim loses 1d3 Intelligence and 1d3 Wisdom. Lost Intelligence and Wisdom can't be recovered while the disease persists. If the saving throw succeeds, nothing happens; the disease ends after the second consecutive successful saving throws. Once the disease ends, lost Intelligence and Wisdom can be restored by greater restoration or comparable magic. The disease is also cured by lesser restoration if the caster makes a successful DC 15 spellcasting check.

9a9d7b56-f642-5b60-ace7-071579452c91.name: Hatred for Spellcasters
9a9d7b56-f642-5b60-ace7-071579452c91.description: The white ape does one extra die of damage (d8 or d10, respectively) per attack against an enemy it has seen cast a spell.

attributes.description: The white ape does one extra die of damage (d8 or d10, respectively) per attack against an enemy it has seen cast a spell.

f5f7ee6f-44ed-5108-bcad-b6d6503dd320.name: Bite (White Ape)
f5f7ee6f-44ed-5108-bcad-b6d6503dd320.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or contract the arcane wasting disease (see sidebar).

08ec2343-d9e8-5f9c-b7fa-01c480328a85.name: Claw (White Ape)
08ec2343-d9e8-5f9c-b7fa-01c480328a85.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) slashing damage.

1f9809e5-a0a7-5e0c-9202-b8979e5df160.name: Frenzy
1f9809e5-a0a7-5e0c-9202-b8979e5df160.description: When two or more foes are adjacent to the ape, it can enter a deadly battle frenzy. Instead of using its normal multiattack, a frenzied white ape makes one bite attack and two claw attacks against each enemy within 5 feet of it. Melee attacks against the white ape are made with advantage from the end of that turn until the start of the white ape's next turn.

962be9ae-033f-5839-80cf-9ae053e78db6.name: Multiattack (White Ape)

ac8520e3-78b1-547f-801f-6e5038affb30.name: Dispel Magic Weakness
ac8520e3-78b1-547f-801f-6e5038affb30.description: Casting dispel magic on a witchlight paralyzes it for 1d10 rounds.

attributes.description: Casting dispel magic on a witchlight paralyzes it for 1d10 rounds.

1a28cba3-10ec-59d2-a2db-4d953df5006b.name: Luminance
1a28cba3-10ec-59d2-a2db-4d953df5006b.description: A witchlight normally glows as brightly as a torch. The creature can dim itself to the luminosity of a candle, but it cannot extinguish its light. Because of its glow, the witchlight has disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

57190bd4-5dea-5fb6-9f64-9a35a5202b0c.name: Thin As Light
57190bd4-5dea-5fb6-9f64-9a35a5202b0c.description: While a witchlight is not incorporeal, it can pass through any opening that light can.

attributes.description: While a witchlight is not incorporeal, it can pass through any opening that light can.

8a901f2d-38a2-538a-ac10-53cf732d5a6e.name: Flash
8a901f2d-38a2-538a-ac10-53cf732d5a6e.description: The witchlight emits a bright burst of light that blinds all sighted creatures within 30 feet for 1d4 rounds unless they succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw.

attributes.description: The witchlight emits a bright burst of light that blinds all sighted creatures within 30 feet for 1d4 rounds unless they succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw.

018d1e6a-be37-5464-9e89-0bf23a53f48c.name: Light Ray
018d1e6a-be37-5464-9e89-0bf23a53f48c.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 30 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) radiant damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 30 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) radiant damage.

62fa2124-44ba-5b9c-8135-a9bb4765c067.name: Danger Sense
62fa2124-44ba-5b9c-8135-a9bb4765c067.description: The wolf reaver dwarf has advantage on Dexterity saving throws against attacks it can see when it is not blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

attributes.description: The wolf reaver dwarf has advantage on Dexterity saving throws against attacks it can see when it is not blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

79f32add-3c09-57a5-a452-adf1a1ee1e5c.name: Dwarven Resistance (Wolf Reaver Dwarf)
79f32add-3c09-57a5-a452-adf1a1ee1e5c.description: The wolf reaver dwarf has advantage on saving throws against poison.

attributes.description: The wolf reaver dwarf has advantage on saving throws against poison.

2cdd6d6c-029b-5fda-8bf2-48e8a935bdff.name: Pack Tactics (Wolf Reaver Dwarf)
2cdd6d6c-029b-5fda-8bf2-48e8a935bdff.description: The wolf reaver dwarf has advantage on attacks if at least one of the dwarf's allies is within 5 feet of the target and the ally isn't incapacitated.

ca9fc9af-e2f0-53ff-8920-97dc2ee01f67.name: Reckless
ca9fc9af-e2f0-53ff-8920-97dc2ee01f67.description: At the start of its turn, the wolf reaver dwarf can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn.

a2706e26-7ab4-5fc5-b1aa-9624fa4a7f70.name: Dagger (Wolf Reaver Dwarf)
a2706e26-7ab4-5fc5-b1aa-9624fa4a7f70.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) piercing damage.

ee8c4d10-5da2-5653-9fb9-eef505d14a68.name: Multiattack (Wolf Reaver Dwarf)
ee8c4d10-5da2-5653-9fb9-eef505d14a68.description: The wolf reaver dwarf makes two melee or ranged attacks.

attributes.description: The wolf reaver dwarf makes two melee or ranged attacks.

f9d1c798-d413-5866-93f0-57cb084c7fe8.name: Spear (Wolf Reaver Dwarf)
f9d1c798-d413-5866-93f0-57cb084c7fe8.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage, or 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

94d9b39c-1e61-5932-8689-2f7e0e206bdc.name: Speed Over Snow
94d9b39c-1e61-5932-8689-2f7e0e206bdc.description: A swarm of wolf spirits is not affected by difficult terrain caused by snowy or icy conditions.

attributes.description: A swarm of wolf spirits is not affected by difficult terrain caused by snowy or icy conditions.

b29b3b96-121b-5f0a-b85b-5b5b79763d6d.name: Bite (Wolf Spirit Swarm)
b29b3b96-121b-5f0a-b85b-5b5b79763d6d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) cold damage. The target is also knocked prone if the attack scored a critical hit.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) cold damage. The target is also knocked prone if the attack scored a critical hit.

c4e77cc7-534a-5c83-9cee-8bd42d1b8daf.name: Chilling Howl
c4e77cc7-534a-5c83-9cee-8bd42d1b8daf.description: As a bonus action on its first turn of combat, the wolf spirit swarm howls, emitting an unnatural and eerie cacophony that chills the blood. All creatures within 300 feet that hear the howl must make a successful DC 12 Charisma saving throw or be frightened until the start of the swarm's next turn.

e447a7cf-63c3-53a5-9ee9-bae73dab7c51.name: Icy Doom
e447a7cf-63c3-53a5-9ee9-bae73dab7c51.description: All creatures within 5 feet of the wolf spirit swarm take 22 (4d10) cold damage, or half damage with a successful DC 14 Constitution saving throw. Those that fail the saving throw also gain one level of exhaustion and become frightened until the start of the swarm's next turn.

732d1d9e-5624-567d-9bb6-4c7f3ab030fb.name: Multiattack (Wolf Spirit Swarm)
732d1d9e-5624-567d-9bb6-4c7f3ab030fb.description: A wolf spirit swarm uses icy doom, if it's available, and makes 3 bite attacks.

4f11d9e5-94d0-556d-bbe7-1e8b495079e4.name: Innate Spellcasting (Wormhearted Suffragan)
4f11d9e5-94d0-556d-bbe7-1e8b495079e4.description:
the wormhearted suffragan's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

at will: command, detect evil and good

4/day: inflict wounds

2/day each: blindness-deafness, hold person

1/day each: animate dead, speak with dead

6e309e4a-e466-5efe-ab83-fa50e8f9e21f.name: Helminth Infestation
6e309e4a-e466-5efe-ab83-fa50e8f9e21f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d6) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be afflicted with a helminth infestation (parasitic worms). An afflicted creature can't regain hit points and its hit point maximum decreases by 10 (3d6) for every 24 hours that elapse. If the affliction reduces the target's hit point maximum to 0, the victim dies. The affliction lasts until removed by any magic that cures disease.

008f839a-ff14-5776-a97e-f35a9faedb19.name: Bite (Wyrmling Wind Dragon)
008f839a-ff14-5776-a97e-f35a9faedb19.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) piercing damage.

042c3cf5-a714-526c-a6c0-2511aa88ff1c.name: Breath of Gales (Wyrmling Wind Dragon)
042c3cf5-a714-526c-a6c0-2511aa88ff1c.description: The dragon exhales a blast of wind in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that cone must make a successful DC 12 Strength saving throw or be pushed 15 feet away from the dragon and knocked prone. Unprotected flames in the cone are extinguished, and sheltered flames (such as those in lanterns) have a 50 percent chance of being extinguished.

46cd9f23-d26d-5e3d-91cc-c9efeb2690e2.name: Constructed Nature
46cd9f23-d26d-5e3d-91cc-c9efeb2690e2.description: A xanka doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: A xanka doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

efbd71f8-5332-545a-bd49-38decee44323.name: Ingest Weapons
efbd71f8-5332-545a-bd49-38decee44323.description: When the xanka is hit by a melee weapon and the final, adjusted attack roll is 19 or less, the weapon gains a permanent -1 penalty to damage rolls, after inflicting damage for this attack. If the penalty reaches -5, the weapon is destroyed. Even magic weapons are subject to this effect.

0784b4e3-51dc-5e2d-9f15-e125e2a9cf49.name: Magic Weapons (Xanka)
0784b4e3-51dc-5e2d-9f15-e125e2a9cf49.description: The xanka's weapon attacks are magical.

attributes.description: The xanka's weapon attacks are magical.

707dad2e-3c36-51a9-8048-0f99cbfcbb9c.name: Absorb (Xanka)
707dad2e-3c36-51a9-8048-0f99cbfcbb9c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) force damage, and the xanka regains hit points equal to the damage caused by its attack. In addition, a living creature hit by this attack must make a successful DC 12 Dexterity saving throw or suffer a gaping wound that causes 2 (1d4) necrotic damage at the end of each of the creature's turns until the wound is treated with magical healing or with a successful DC 10 Intelligence (Medicine) check. If a creature who fails this saving throw is wearing armor or using a shield, the creature can choose to prevent the necrotic damage by permanently reducing the AC of its armor or shield by 1 instead.

3c0c619f-3126-5074-b49d-bb2ff64b6dfe.name: Invisibility (Xhkarsh)
3c0c619f-3126-5074-b49d-bb2ff64b6dfe.description: The xhkarsh turns invisible until it attacks or casts a spell, or until its concentration ends. Equipment the xhkarsh wears or carries becomes invisible with it.

attributes.description: The xhkarsh turns invisible until it attacks or casts a spell, or until its concentration ends. Equipment the xhkarsh wears or carries becomes invisible with it.

e5635a77-7cd0-5f09-ad56-f21b30251298.name: Multiattack (Xhkarsh)
e5635a77-7cd0-5f09-ad56-f21b30251298.description: The xhkarsh makes two claw attacks and two stinger attacks.

attributes.description: The xhkarsh makes two claw attacks and two stinger attacks.

500fcf6b-9fb2-5e3c-abcd-0666c0e444da.name: Seize Strand
500fcf6b-9fb2-5e3c-abcd-0666c0e444da.description: The xhkarsh targets one creature within 5 feet of it whose fate has been corrupted. The target creature must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or a portion of the xhkarsh's consciousness inhabits its body. The target retains control of its body, but the xhkarsh can control its actions for 1 minute each day and can modify its memories as a bonus action (as if using the modify memory spell, DC 15). The target is unaware of the xhkarsh's presence, but can make a DC 18 Wisdom (Insight) check once every 24 hours to notice the presence of the xhkarsh. This effect lasts until the xhkarsh ends it or the target's fate is restored by a dispel evil and good spell or comparable magic. A creature becomes immune to this effect for 24 hours when it succeeds on the saving throw to resist the effect or after the effect ends on it for any reason. A single xhkarsh can seize up to four strands at the same time.

a858dfc0-3ffe-51c7-931a-fd36f400d7f8.name: Stinger (Xhkarsh)
a858dfc0-3ffe-51c7-931a-fd36f400d7f8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or have its fate corrupted. A creature with corrupted fate has disadvantage on Charisma checks and Charisma saving throws, and it is immune to divination spells and to effects that sense emotions or read thoughts. The target's fate can be restored by a dispel evil and good spell or comparable magic.

4543db12-f4c5-5653-9ae2-a07df9cfe475.name: Ever-Sharp Horns
4543db12-f4c5-5653-9ae2-a07df9cfe475.description: The ychen bannog deals triple damage dice when it scores a critical hit with a gore attack.

attributes.description: The ychen bannog deals triple damage dice when it scores a critical hit with a gore attack.

6410a140-bad8-5cbe-93e4-6cc666989a87.name: Overrun
6410a140-bad8-5cbe-93e4-6cc666989a87.description: When the ychen bannog takes the Dash action, it can move through the space of a Large or smaller creature, treating the creature's space as difficult terrain. As it moves through the creature's space, the ychen bannog can make a stomp attack as a bonus action.

2bf4d890-7099-533c-86c9-ebd5da5802d7.name: Peaceful Creature
2bf4d890-7099-533c-86c9-ebd5da5802d7.description: The ychen bannog abhors combat and flees from it if possible. If unable to flee, the ychen bannog can attack a foe or obstacle to clear a path to safety. As an action, a driver or handler mounted on the ychen bannog or adjacent to it can make a DC 16 Wisdom (Animal Handling) check. On a success, the ychen bannog moves and attacks as directed by the driver. On a failure, the beast flees. The driver or handler must have proficiency in Animal Handling to attempt this check.

4113e745-85c1-5f02-8f84-3c2d4444341e.name: Destroying Bellow
4113e745-85c1-5f02-8f84-3c2d4444341e.description: The ychen bannog delivers a fearsome bellow that can be heard up to ten miles away. Structures and unattended objects in a 60-foot cone take 55 (10d10) thunder damage. Creatures in the cone take 27 (5d10) thunder damage and are deafened for 1 hour, or take half damage and aren't deafened with a successful DC 18 Constitution saving throw.

b45d7c78-3ee0-5b52-929c-932bf90cb848.description: The cave dragon can burrow through solid rock at half its burrowing speed and leaves a 10-foot wide, 5-foot high tunnel in its wake.

b621c06f-5aee-5830-910d-a807f51c9549.name: Poison Breath (Young Cave Dragon)
b621c06f-5aee-5830-910d-a807f51c9549.description: The dragon exhales a cone of black poison gas in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (13d6) poison damage on a failed save and becoming poisoned if it is a creature. The poisoned condition lasts until the target takes a long or short rest or removes the condition with lesser restoration or comparable magic. If the save is successful, the target takes half damage and is not poisoned.

00cfcd59-0544-5791-a084-daabc52a115c.name: Ruff Spikes (Young Cave Dragon)
00cfcd59-0544-5791-a084-daabc52a115c.description: When a creature tries to enter a space adjacent to a cave dragon, the dragon flares its many feelers and spikes. The creature cannot enter a space adjacent to the dragon unless it makes a successful DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. If the saving throw fails, the creature can keep moving but only into spaces that aren't within 5 feet of the dragon and takes 4 (1d8) piercing damage from spikes.

fb2f7be4-f746-5f7e-9f1c-3a450b5e99a6.name: Breath Weapon (Young Mithral Dragon)
fb2f7be4-f746-5f7e-9f1c-3a450b5e99a6.description: A mithral dragon can spit a 50-foot-long, 5-foot-wide line of metallic shards. Targets in its path take 21 (6d6) magical slashing damage and lose another 5 hit points from bleeding at the start of their turns for 6 rounds; slashing damage is halved by a successful DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, but bleeding damage is not affected. Only magical healing stops the bleeding before 6 rounds. The shards dissolve into wisps of smoke 1 round after the breath weapon's use

0c7542e4-bd22-5152-9c23-ddb3535d4fd9.name: Tidal Breath (Young Sea Dragon)
0c7542e4-bd22-5152-9c23-ddb3535d4fd9.description: The dragon exhales a crushing wave of frigid seawater in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 27 (5d10) bludgeoning damage and 27 (5d10) cold damage, and is pushed 30 feet away from the dragon and knocked prone. On a successful save the creature takes half as much damage and isn't pushed or knocked prone.

99becabc-f14d-51ba-a640-e58533400df2.name: Tamed (Young Spinosaurus)
99becabc-f14d-51ba-a640-e58533400df2.description: The spinosaurus never willingly attacks any reptilian humanoid, and if forced or magically compelled to do so it suffers disadvantage on attack rolls. Up to three Medium or one Large creatures can ride the spinosaurus. This trait disappears if the spinosaurus spends a month away from any reptilian humanoid.

832ef4b5-4ccf-5243-8e51-884f3060473e.name: Gravitic Breath (Young Void Dragon)
832ef4b5-4ccf-5243-8e51-884f3060473e.description: The dragon exhales a 30-foot cube of powerful localized gravity, originating from the dragon. Falling damage in the area increases to 1d10 per 10 feet fallen. When a creature starts its turn within the area or enters it for the first time in a turn, including when the dragon creates the field, it must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure the creature is restrained. On a success the creature's speed is halved as long as it remains in the field. A restrained creature repeats the saving throw at the end of its turn. The field persists until the dragon's breath recharges, and it can't use gravitic breath twice consecutively.

de8061a7-035e-5ce8-8a5e-a98a050b805e.name: Void Twist (Young Void Dragon)
de8061a7-035e-5ce8-8a5e-a98a050b805e.description: When the dragon is hit by a ranged attack it can create a small rift in space to increase its AC by 4 against that attack. If the attack misses because of this increase the dragon can choose a creature within 30 feet to become the new target for that attack. Use the original attack roll to determine if the attack hits the new target.

fb657cc3-7519-5aec-8aa6-d64affb5b837.name: Breath of Gales (Young Wind Dragon)
fb657cc3-7519-5aec-8aa6-d64affb5b837.description: The dragon exhales a blast of wind in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that cone takes 11 (2d10) bludgeoning damage and is pushed 25 feet away from the dragon and knocked prone; a successful DC 16 Strength saving throw halves the damage and prevents being pushed and knocked prone. Unprotected flames in the cone are extinguished, and sheltered flames (such as those in lanterns) have a 75 percent chance of being extinguished.

The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself with a success.

8e8fa323-84eb-5d3f-89fc-0280a8a894d4.name: Fortified Shell
8e8fa323-84eb-5d3f-89fc-0280a8a894d4.description: The zaratan ignores any attack against its shell that doesn't do 30 points of damage or more. Attacking the zaratan's head or flippers bypasses this trait.

67a6c7fd-1a82-5c21-b760-2a1668e4a217.name: Move (Zaratan)
67a6c7fd-1a82-5c21-b760-2a1668e4a217.description: The zaratan moves up to half its speed.

befe318e-adf1-5cc4-b21c-d5599bbc23ac.name: Multiattack (Zaratan)
befe318e-adf1-5cc4-b21c-d5599bbc23ac.description: The zaratan makes one bite attack and two flipper attacks.

attributes.description: The zaratan makes one bite attack and two flipper attacks.

3e10c4b6-b4bc-59f6-b9f2-9e261b260121.name: Swallow (Zaratan)
3e10c4b6-b4bc-59f6-b9f2-9e261b260121.description: The zaratan makes one bite attack against a Huge or smaller creature it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target takes 26 (3d10 + 10) piercing damage, is swallowed, and the grapple ends. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, but has total cover against attacks and effects outside the zaratan. A swallowed creature takes 28 (8d6) acid damage at the start of each of the zaratan's turns. The zaratan can have any number of creatures swallowed at once. If the zaratan takes 40 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the zaratan must succeed on a DC 20 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which fall prone in a space within 10 feet of the zaratan. If the zaratan dies, swallowed creatures are no longer restrained and can escape by using 30 feet of movement, exiting prone.

771a8c35-fc72-59de-8e05-db6efd813f16.name: Swipe
771a8c35-fc72-59de-8e05-db6efd813f16.description: The zaratan makes one flipper attack.

b1274959-5515-5c13-a5d9-daf00bac8e3b.name: Bite (Zimwi)
b1274959-5515-5c13-a5d9-daf00bac8e3b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature grappled by the zimwi, that creature is swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the zimwi, and it takes 14 (4d6) acid damage at the start of each of the zimwi's turns. If the zimwi's stomach takes 20 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the zimwi must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which fall prone in a space within 5 feet of the zimwi. Damage done to a zimwi's stomach does not harm the zimwi. The zimwi's stomach is larger on the inside than the outside. It can have two Medium creatures or four Small or smaller creatures swallowed at one time. If the zimwi dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting prone.

7735c837-095f-5f09-9419-0ec4d7d15d70.name: Amphibious (Zmey)
7735c837-095f-5f09-9419-0ec4d7d15d70.description: The zmey can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The zmey can breathe air and water.

84088749-02e9-5f87-991f-c38b23dac208.name: Lake Leap
84088749-02e9-5f87-991f-c38b23dac208.description: A zmey spends much of its time lurking in lakes and ponds. When submerged in a natural pool of standing water, it can transport itself as a bonus action to a similar body of water within 5,000 feet. Rapidly flowing water doesn't serve for this ability, but the zmey can leap to or from a river or stream where the water is calm and slow-moving.

0f50e935-7129-556e-b2ed-3533ee9361f3.name: Legendary Resistance (1/Day) (Zmey)
0f50e935-7129-556e-b2ed-3533ee9361f3.description: If the zmey fails a saving throw, it can count it as a success instead.

attributes.description: If the zmey fails a saving throw, it can count it as a success instead.

de0ede56-48b2-5484-8d1f-09d1f5061bd0.name: Multiheaded
de0ede56-48b2-5484-8d1f-09d1f5061bd0.description: The zmey normally has three heads. While it has more than one head, the zmey has advantage on saving throws against being blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, and stunned. If the zmey takes 40 or more damage in a single turn (and the damage isn't poison or psychic), one of its heads is severed. If all three of its heads are severed, the zmey dies.

5839098c-d74e-523d-b6aa-dd73219ecf7d.name: Regeneration (Zmey)
5839098c-d74e-523d-b6aa-dd73219ecf7d.description: The zmey regains 15 hit points at the start of its turn. If the zmey takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the zmey's next turn. Regeneration stops functioning when all heads are severed. It takes 24 hours for a zmey to regrow a functional head.

012336bb-78bd-5335-870a-7a1f2dd0573b.name: Spawn Headling
012336bb-78bd-5335-870a-7a1f2dd0573b.description: The severed head of a zmey grows into a zmey headling 2d6 rounds after being separated from the body. Smearing at least a pound of salt on the severed head's stump prevents this transformation.

77e7f70f-ace9-51dc-9337-7e118d51ceef.name: Claws (Zmey)
77e7f70f-ace9-51dc-9337-7e118d51ceef.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) slashing damage.

b7066969-3108-5ec9-a96a-8a27a1783ad4.name: Fire Breath (Zmey)
b7066969-3108-5ec9-a96a-8a27a1783ad4.description: The zmey breathes up to three 60-foot cones of fire, one from each of its heads. Creatures in a cone take 16 (3d10) fire damage, or half damage with a successful DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. If cones overlap, their damage adds together but each target makes only one saving throw. A zmey can choose whether this attack harms plants or plant creatures.

a5d84237-c6db-5771-9212-35ae6cb1cb9e.name: Tail Attack (Zmey)

1f3a8365-5cca-50ce-aaa2-e7b58725e8f9.name: Trample
1f3a8365-5cca-50ce-aaa2-e7b58725e8f9.description: The zmey moves up to half its land speed. It can enter enemy-occupied spaces but can't end its move there. Creatures in spaces the zmey enters must make successful DC 14 Dexterity saving throws or take 10 (1d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage and fall prone.

2d6e5ffc-b95c-58ad-be43-1ebafde1fde3.name: Amphibious (Zmey Headling)

6e282da7-e107-5668-9621-5fa179142f97.name: Regeneration (Zmey Headling)
6e282da7-e107-5668-9621-5fa179142f97.description: The zmey headling reaver regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn. This trait doesn't function if the zmey headling took acid or fire damage since the end of its previous turn. It dies if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.
